levels.name: Geometry dash
levels.creator: SolexGD
levels.description: Larga Espera ripoff with a fucky name (the first character is a space and the "Dash" part is not capitalised).

levels.name: AlterGame XVII
levels.creator: Serponge
levels.description: Widely regarded as the hardest Hard Demon minigame, being compared with low and even mid Insane Demon minigames. Features a large mix of multiple different microgames WarioWare style.

levels.name: Arnac La Poste
levels.creator: LP44
levels.description: Infamous for its insanely difficult ship and a couple other chokepoints, but most of the gameplay is standard slow timing gameplay. Try not to die after the ship!

levels.name: Binary
levels.creator: JamieZz and Reklaz
levels.description: Features 4 parts that use 2-Player Mode to add these gimmicks. Parts 1, 2 and 4 aren't too notable, however, Part 3 is SUPER tough and it is very easy to forget what to do there.

levels.name: Bleached Heart
levels.creator: RegularDays
levels.description: Super old level which had an update that made it completely impossible, meaning now it can only be completed by a secret way. This basically makes it a memory level.

levels.name: BOSSRUSH
levels.creator: RedlixHD and more
levels.description: The Just Shapes and Beats inspiration is obvious. In this level you constantly move to the left and you can move up and down then right with a dash. With this unique control scheme, you must survive four bossfights without getting hit too much.

levels.name: Depressure
levels.creator: Serponge
levels.description: Intense minigame that was originally much longer but made shorter due to a save glitch. The 2nd player jump button instantly kills you.

levels.name: dooMEd
levels.creator: MaxxoRMeN
levels.description: Have the right allele from your parents.

levels.name: GD10
levels.creator: Floppy
levels.description: A level with parts of some iconic levels copy pasted into a merger level as shown in the GD10 Anniversary video.

levels.name: HAUNTED
levels.creator: EpicSparkZ
levels.description: A strange gimmick level that abuses a bug that allows the icon to jump in and out of the ground for its gameplay. You have 90 seconds to complete the level before you die

levels.name: Haunty Halls
levels.creator: ItzElectrix
levels.description: Haunted house themed 2 player level. Contains a split-screen dual and a mini wave-ship dual. The non-dual parts are very easy.

levels.name: I N S I D E
levels.creator: Crystal CM
levels.description: This is a sidescrolling minigame where you take control of one of six girls. Each of them have different posted difficulties and different methods of attack. One player controls the jump and the other controls the attack.

levels.name: Larga Espera
levels.creator: Nacho21
levels.description: Extremely long level that tells a story about Geometry Dash's update history and the long waits associated with the past few updates.

levels.name: OrbiChord
levels.creator: LKHArchive
levels.description: This is a puzzle game made in GD. You only need to get to level 32 to win, but there is more level after that for fun.

levels.name: Purple Caverns
levels.creator: Manix648 and more
levels.description: Bizarre early 2.0 level that got a random buffdate that made every single ship section extremely difficult and added a long straight fly at the end.

levels.name: Rivals
levels.creator: sheredX
levels.description: A minigame where you are inside a triangle. Your goal is to move to each side so that you avoid the spike walls that are telegraphed by walls outside the triangle moving inwards.

levels.name: satellite II
levels.creator: Sikatsuka and FunnyGame
levels.description: A 2 player FunnyGame bossfight level where one of the players is used to control the game state of the other.

levels.name: Shapes and Beats
levels.creator: kang131
levels.description: A minigame that recreate Just Shapes and Beats in GD. However, you only have left and right movement plus a dash in this level. Plays very faithfully to it's source material.

levels.name: Spunch
levels.creator: Jazari
levels.description: Quite possibly, and I say this with total sincerity, the least functional level in the entire game.  R.I.P Jazari 🕊️.

levels.name: Stay Before Im Gawne
levels.creator: Rockstr99
levels.description: You know when you land on a block that has a slope connected to its left and you bounce up slightly? Yeah. Watch this specific showcase to learn how to avoid these insane frame alignment bugs, or suffer the consequences.

levels.name: Tidal Line
levels.creator: Sp4rce
levels.description: Tidal Wave themed remake of the popular mobile rhythm game Dancing Line, stays faithful to the original by being unable to use practice mode.

levels.name: Trigger Dungeon
levels.creator: JuNiOr202
levels.description: You have roughly 6 minutes to beat a platformer game made in GD 2.1. The controls have a learning curve to them. Also there is a bugged jump at 2:31 in the verification video, it's possible by jumping off the corner of the block.

levels.name: VVV
levels.creator: RadiationV2
levels.description: Unlike the other minigame level based off VVVVVV, this one is an autoscroller. Unfortunately, this level is currently so buggy if might as well be impossible. Highly, recommended to stay away until it gets fixed, if it ever does.

levels.name: War Of The Worlds
levels.creator: iITechnoDashIi and Xine101
levels.description: This could be literally any difficulty. We have lost track of how hard this is given how much it has changed between its several versions. The level on its own isn't clairvoyant either, with insanely janky bossfights Coreosious-style and an invisible healthbar for the icon.

levels.name: aligenigena
levels.creator: classic10 and more
levels.description: Brazilian collab themed around aliens. Features overall flow gameplay with a really hard ship at the end.

levels.name: Altum
levels.creator: ZephiroX and Unnn
levels.description: Old ZephiroX level from 2019 finished by Unnn 4 years later. Features standard modern deco with gameplay that tests every skillset.

levels.name: ArgumShock
levels.creator: 123Ev4n, Anthrax, and ISariaI
levels.description: Literally AureoShock by ZenthicAlpha with slightly jankier and also easier gameplay. Anthrax may have overcooked the deco a little bit. #PromoteAureoShock

levels.name: Astrophile
levels.creator: Hinze and more
levels.description: Space themed art level where the gameplay was noticeably not the main focus.

levels.name: Bicycle
levels.creator: Back
levels.description: The fourth ever Hard Demon and what a bizarre one it is. Contains strange and unorthodox timing gameplay, especially emphasizing usage of the newly released ball gamemode.

levels.name: Blitz
levels.creator: xenbez7
levels.description: Flashy and colorful high CPS clicksync level that has a stressful mirror portal part at the end that's harder than everything else. Entire level has comically large jump indicators making it easier.

levels.name: Carnivores
levels.creator: KrazyKako9
levels.description: Normcore early 2.1 shtick with annoying T3 layering.

levels.name: Chaos Reactor
levels.creator: KarelTheGreat
levels.description: Old 2.0 level that is surprisingly competent for being hack verified. Shows some early flow-like concepts, and takes heavy inspiration from Xaro in some parts.

levels.name: Circulatum
levels.creator: Avelinz
levels.description: Weird 2.0 NC level where your vision is completely obscured by the background effects.

levels.name: Code Name Factory
levels.creator: ruined
levels.description: A 1.4 Hard Demon that delivers well on its factory theme, using saws and cogs everywhere to create a very factory-like atmosphere.

levels.name: Critical Hit
levels.creator: SwitchStepGDYT and more
levels.description: The 9th and final level of the Odyssey level series. 2.2 Robtop style xxl level with an overload of 2.2 gameplay, lots of unique art, a So Retro jumpscare and custom gamemodes, like The Boat.

levels.name: Cry
levels.creator: GDSkele
levels.description: Short and sweet 2.0 themed level that peaks in both difficulty and twerk factor at a wave at the beginning of the drop. Will you survive the cry?

levels.name: Darkness Keeper
levels.creator: AbstractDark
levels.description: One of the hardest 2.1 gauntlet levels, due to poorly telegraphed boss attacks and bugs.

levels.name: Dashplorers
levels.creator: RuebeXPX
levels.description: A level that combines Dash and Explorers, and abuses camera and wall-walking features endlessly. This is the Deadlocked X of 2.2.

levels.name: deluxeedition
levels.creator: JiJangs
levels.description: A 1.5 level with a really difficult ship section at the beginning. The entire ending of the level is the same copy-pasted gameplay section.

levels.name: DISCOTEQUE
levels.creator: sagecore
levels.description: Super chill discoteque/music themed level with overall fine gameplay that will test your nerve control.

levels.name: dissolve
levels.creator: dx9scope
levels.description: Starts out as a chill and slow 6 star and after 87 seconds of that, it evolves into some actually challenging ship and UFO, ending up with a nerve wracking wave. Unsurprisingly very boring to play.

levels.name: Dragonfruit
levels.creator: robV3
levels.description: Vibrant design level that switches up styles frequently. The gameplay has a lot of small timings all over the place with some slightly janky transitions.

levels.name: Drop Box
levels.creator: DaCooki3
levels.description: Weird and gimmicky level that uses 2 player controls to have you Drop a Box to open the path. Would be Fuck tier if it wasn't universally agreed to be Medium Demon.

levels.name: drop dead gorgeous
levels.creator: Aeyooo and draganalus
levels.description: An avant-garde horror work with obscuring and glitchy visuals: "incredibly unpleasant but not exactly wild or chaotic, something like a pinging headache" (dragnalus). First ball is by far the hardest part.

levels.name: Elastic Sequence
levels.creator: InterChange
levels.description: Janky early 2.1 level with a notable difficulty spike in the ending.

levels.name: ElectroMan II
levels.creator: noobas
levels.description: Surprisingly polished 1.9 demon with a lot of fast paced gameplay and a dual that looks way harder than it actually is.

levels.name: electroparty
levels.description: Strange Electrodynamix remake both design wise and gameplay wise. has some chokepoints but mostly focuses on memory. Also cuts off before the song even finishes.

levels.name: Elemelons 2
levels.creator: TheRealSalad
levels.description: A 2.0 level very centered around memory using moving objects, which creates a very unpredictable atmosphere that is very hard to get used to. Those gears should NOT move like that.

levels.name: element 1 H
levels.creator: PMCreatorArco
levels.description: The first entry into the now infamous element series that spawned the legendary Element 111 rg. Uses some very unique design choices to represent the concept of hydrogen, which the level is themed around given the name.

levels.name: Emerald Realm
levels.creator: CastriX and more
levels.description: One of the most object heavy Hard Demons in the game, sporting very pretty nature deco. The base gameplay is really easy but the lenght and the deco (and the lag) adds a lot of difficulty.

levels.name: endless wisdom
levels.creator: pg1004
levels.description: Hard Demon created by pg1004 that has some light memory, but isn’t anywhere near as memory based as his other levels. Has some very claustrophobic and tight gameplay sections.

levels.name: Ethereal Jaunt
levels.creator: nahuel2998 and more
levels.description: Core megacollab that is mostly comprised of not being able to see where decoration stops and hitboxes start.

levels.name: Exile
levels.creator: Spectex
levels.description: Would be a standard 2.0 level if it wasn't for the stupid 💠 bossfight with incredibly confusing attacks.

levels.name: GrindZone
levels.creator: LmAnubis, Manix648, and TurtleBro
levels.description: Construction-themed level that plays better than it looks. Tons of jarring moving objects and interesting gameplay that goes with it. We must sue TurtleBro Inc. for OSHA violations.

levels.name: Guardian
levels.creator: LazerBlitz
levels.description: Intense bossfight level with really cool deco and contains 3 "phases" per se, the 2nd and 3rd of which being a bit harder than the first. Currently the sheet owner (tomm's) 2nd favourite demon.

levels.name: guinea
levels.creator: TUDZ
levels.description: JPEGMAFIA Demon! Decorated in a way to feel like one with the song in a sense, has very disorienting moments, difficult timings as well as some transitions you absolutely need to be ready for.

levels.name: Hell Reality
levels.creator: Wodka and more
levels.description: Well received flow solo level that makes a lot of creative decisions with it's structures. The gameplay unfortunately has a couple rather large chokepoints, but it's still enjoyed regardless.

levels.name: hexagon country
levels.description: Obscure 1.8 Hard Demon with a nasty abyss jump midway through one of the dual sections.

levels.name: HexagonFunk
levels.creator: SMBlacktime
levels.description: Funny old level where it's almost impossible to tell what is and isn't a hitbox.

levels.name: hype
levels.creator: Yannnis and Tartaglia
levels.description: A 2.2 demon with flowy gameplay and crazy visuals, although it does have it's fair share of really awkward transitions. Playing without the NONG is goofy af.

levels.name: Hypercharged
levels.creator: Vitrial and more
levels.description: The other peruvian WGC entry. Made in 9 days, that explains the jank gameplay and the messy "tech city" themed deco.

levels.name: Hyperyard
levels.creator: Alex1304
levels.description: Polished early 2.1 level that plays around with the new triggers in some very unique and interesting ways. Includes some of that classic Alex1304 collectible-based gameplay.

levels.name: ICUP
levels.creator: Arclia
levels.description: Spell the name to instantly Die (High quality collab with overall learny gameplay, tons of 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 art, +3000 inside jokes.

levels.name: INTERCEPT
levels.creator: Iid4sh3riI
levels.description: Early 1.9 memory demon with a very awkward UFO in the middle that serves as the only reason anyone would find this Hard Demon.

levels.name: J E N O V A
levels.creator: YowelGD

levels.name: jarvisgoestothegym
levels.creator: vonic
levels.description: Flowy level with basic decoration that is aggressively fast with high suspense and an awkward last jump.

levels.name: love hurts
levels.creator: OONestorOO
levels.description: Weird art level that flashbangs you every time the song claps.

levels.name: MANRAY
levels.creator: sweetdude
levels.description: MAMAMAA MAMAMAA MAAAAMAMA. Memory level which starts off with a pretty irritating cube, but afterwards, the difficulty relies on learning the patterns for every part.

levels.name: Mastermind
levels.creator: Engion
levels.description: A 2.0 level with weird gameplay at times and a tricky mirror portal section in the middle.

levels.name: mayan
levels.creator: Solvable95
levels.description: Super Duper Raw And Awesome mayan civilization themed level with overall learny and jank gameplay. Features a lot of Creatures that sometimes obstruct your vision.

levels.name: Mr Mr
levels.creator: Hiroquet
levels.description: How many times Mr Mr? 30 + 5. Super silly level which involves some horribly balanced and horrible to coordinate memory.

levels.name: mystic Fantasy
levels.creator: S1l3nce
levels.description: Finally shattering the trend of 2.0 levels that look like 1.9 levels that make sense, mystic Fantasy in it's infinite wisdom plays like an impossible level despite not being one at all.

levels.name: NEEDLES
levels.creator: cerufiffy
levels.description: Beware if you have Trypophobia. The entire difficulty of this level comes from second ship and dual, which are way harder than everything else by miles.

levels.name: Neophyte
levels.creator: Yoshme
levels.description: Another Freshery remake, this time it's 2.2 and a lot more glow.

levels.name: Old but Fools Gold
levels.creator: JoeDaBruh and more
levels.description: A random guy made a random layout in 2017 and a bunch of people decided it would be funny if they just decorated and verified this guy's layout for him. They were correct this level is alien beyond belief.

levels.name: One minute
levels.creator: eggslon
levels.description: Vibe heavy level where the gameplay is heavily obscured by a massive clock ticking up to a minute, hence the name.

levels.name: Piece of CAKE
levels.creator: DarKnix
levels.description: 1.7 Hard Demon that does in fact have a piece of cake in it. Designs are extremely weird for the time and contains loads of blind clicks.

levels.name: PoisonGate
levels.creator: HugoLA
levels.description: Brazilian toxic-themed level with flow gameplay, featuring the character Don Ramón from the TV show El Chavo del Ocho who appeared in the beginning menu and an interlude animation.

levels.name: RadioStep
levels.creator: Unnamedboy and more
levels.description: Memory level featuring old school decorations and a relatively hard mini ship compared to the rest.

levels.name: Rakott krumpli
levels.creator: trexhun
levels.description: Pretty generic looking glow flow with some cool gameplay ideas, took forever to hunt for the NONG due to the creator not saying what the song or offset is in the level. Name is a Hungarian food for some reason.

levels.name: Shaii
levels.creator: LeoGinN and more
levels.description: Another 2.1 purple glow level with fast paced learny gameplay and some jank mixed in. This could be referring to over 30 levels.

levels.name: Silent Hill
levels.creator: MaJackO
levels.description: MaJackO's first full level, and also his first rated level. An absolute pain in the ass to figure out what to do.

levels.name: Slopefunk
levels.creator: Noriega
levels.description: Old gold with very odd structuring that vaguely follows the progression of Clutterfunk, with slopes of course.

levels.name: space travel
levels.description: Strange pre 1.9 memory level with a difficult to learn maze in the first 25%. After that, the level becomes significantly easier.

levels.name: stamina
levels.creator: drane
levels.description: Relaxing, slightly gimmicky little timing adventure where the difficulty comes from not falling for easy to spot fakes.

levels.name: The Castle
levels.creator: matty2003 and Viper Arctarus
levels.description: Rafer-inspired level featuring custom 8x speed portal and violent shakes.

levels.name: The Road Runner
levels.creator: DieXDi
levels.description: Fast paced robot-only level that has a red-blue switch gimmick that turns on and off when you click or not, with a 2003devin decorating style

levels.name: THE SUN VANISHED
levels.creator: WakySky and DarkCacti
levels.description: A level based off The Sun Vanished ARG. Plays through a nail-biting crawl under and over various grounded obstacles, with a lot of troll indicators.

levels.name: Theoretical
levels.creator: Xalepit
levels.description: Extremely glowy remake of Theory of Everything 2 that is oddly reminiscent of HASH. Starts out difficult but gets consistent fast.

levels.name: Thermal Madness
levels.creator: ManiacDan
levels.description: Beginner-friendly 1.9GDPS 2-player level with a difficulty spike at the end. Can You Survive The Heat?

levels.name: THROUGH THE WOODS
levels.creator: JUNCO and more
levels.description: Chaotic glow flow with negative CPS that doesn't match the song at all and has a surprisingly functional dual.

levels.name: tile
levels.creator: shrympo
levels.description: Early 2.2 level that doesn't hold back on experimenting with the new features, using reverse/vertical gameplay, gradient triggers and shaders in cool ways.

levels.name: titan speakerman map
levels.creator: YapoIIICPapu
levels.description: Super Skibidi 1.9 GDPS level with some ahh ahh duals at the end that will make you go hawk tuah!

levels.name: Vast Stride
levels.creator: oleki
levels.description: Chill design level that never speeds up to match its lo-fi type music. The ship can be a bit difficult.

levels.name: VorteX
levels.creator: Albinomaster
levels.description: Late 2.0 level that has some really obnoxious ship chokepoints throughout. In classic fashion of a level that uses Machina, it's a bad transition factory belt.

levels.name: Xylem
levels.creator: doominator222
levels.description: Super learny level that feels like its gonna break at any moment.

levels.name: 13 Electroman Adv
levels.creator: Minemario
levels.description: An update sandwich made by MineMario that is a gross fusion between 1.6 and 1.9. Technically the first XL Hard Demon and focuses very heavily on memory.

levels.creator: DarkoGD
levels.description: Red glow level that's supposed to be futuristic themed but looks like every other red glow level in existence, has a strange amount of invisible hitboxes and bad transitions.

levels.name: 7NSffect
levels.creator: Sawarty and more
levels.description: A flow level that looks like you have to do a lot of clicks, but in reality you do about 1 every 4 seconds.

levels.name: a  space trip
levels.creator: StarBombKR
levels.description: Gray Clubstep remake with some weird timings, fairly tight ship parts, and a LOT of orbs. The two spaces in the title is very important.

levels.name: ACC
levels.creator: PDKGD and more
levels.description: Very mediocre glow flow level, has the same click pattern for most of the level except for a few select fuck you chokepoints. The level does not fit the song at all.

levels.name: ACCELERATE
levels.creator: ivyteal
levels.description: This is a fast-paced level at its core. The level is basically a long wave part followed by some ship before turning into more flowy gameplay.

levels.name: Accelero
levels.creator: Non4med
levels.description: 2.0 fossil rate featuring some very ahead of its time decoration, but not ahead of its time moving object gameplay.

levels.name: Adrenaline Stream
levels.creator: MikeWheelerFan
levels.description: Wave challenge level with some transition gameplay in the middle, has a random memory part at 70 for some reason. Good therapist, tells you good job two different times.

levels.name: Affright
levels.creator: Vermillion
levels.description: Greyscale very early 1.9 Hard Demon that has some tricky ball timings and memory in the first half. Notable for using Nine Circles before the Zobros level did.

levels.name: ANTIHERO
levels.creator: Super79 and imbaz
levels.description: Greyscale clicksync level that uses a phonk song, much better with Lets Bounce.

levels.name: Arcturus
levels.creator: Intensa
levels.description: Fossil rate from late 2.0 that constantly switches up gamemodes much like the modern flow style, but with more traditional old-school gameplay instead.

levels.name: Armadillo Dash
levels.creator: DYZEX
levels.description: The second of DYZEX's 2 rated levels that feature the "Armadillo" gimmick, which is just a robot with a black orb on top disguised by the 'dillo. Anyways, the 2nd armadillo part has a visual bug and the ship at 70% is no laughing matter.

levels.name: ascension
levels.creator: wamiq
levels.description: Purple 2.0 fossil rate with some decently jank gameplay as expected of korean levels of the time. One of the most obscure 2.0 Hard Demons.

levels.name: Astreans
levels.creator: MrSpaghetti and more
levels.description: See "Stormshard" and "Adrenaline Chamber". Easiest of the Artificial Ascent ripoff trilogy, but still retains every single issue that affects Stormshard. Adrenaline Chamber is a whole other beast. Features a lot of parts that consist of long autos

levels.name: August 2022
levels.creator: Janucha and more
levels.description: The name perfectly reflects the average level of that time period (mid flow level with wacky balancing).

levels.name: Auto
levels.creator: Mulpan and Sogogi
levels.description: Complete sensory overload. Nearly every single object is moving at all times. The level is uploaded by Mulpan despite being entirely made by another creator. Sadly not actually auto.

levels.name: Backasswards
levels.creator: Wav, TriStorm, and kale
levels.description: Quirked up, flashy memory level with creative indicators and structures that you can just Ignore. Notably difficult ship.

levels.name: BadLand
levels.creator: GenteelNoobie
levels.description: Raw early 2.2 pixelcore level with over the top effects and a bossfight against a tribal cube with tomahawks. This difficulty has such weird levels.

levels.name: Bastion Adventure
levels.creator: likelihood
levels.description: Insane 2.0 alloy that is made up of 40% autos, 60% heartfelt dialouge, and 100% awesome.

levels.name: bb circles
levels.creator: Mindcap
levels.description: A whole level comprised of purely Nine Circles predrop gameplay. The bb stands for blueball, because of the song hilariously edging the drop the whole way through.

levels.name: BeatCoin
levels.creator: Hann and... someone anonymous
levels.description: Elon Musk please promote my Coin. I xeet all day and xeet all night for you, please my lord grant me this (batshit crazy early 2.1 level that is doing entirely too much. Watch out for the green part in the middle its much harder than the rest).

levels.name: black off
levels.creator: Vlacc
levels.description: Ancient level that got a random buffdate that added several awkward timings.

levels.name: Boom headshot
levels.creator: NASHII
levels.description: Unhinged level with an unhinged song and an extremely out of place and laggy bossfight.

levels.name: Castle of Redemption
levels.creator: Grabajusz
levels.description: Extremely early 2.1 looking memory level with a "bossfight" at the end that gets much easier as long as it goes. Was one of the easiest Insane Demons for a noticeable amount of time.

levels.name: Chronos
levels.creator: ViPriN
levels.description: Geostorm level themed around time travel, infamous for its gameplay.

levels.name: Club Force
levels.creator: RealSoulDash
levels.description: Super early 1.9 update sandwich that barely resembles a club OR force. The gameplay for most of the level is pretty straight forward but then SoulDash decided to be a dickhead and added some ICDX-type ship swoops at the end.

levels.name: Coarse
levels.creator: f3lixsram
levels.description: An arguably Hinds-styled level. It is also extremely fast paced as the drop is entirely 4x speed and features several difficult wave sections. But don't forget about the pre-drop, it's also quite tricky.

levels.name: Collaboration
levels.creator: saRy GMD and more
levels.description: The second ever demon megacollab. Starts off easy and simple, until the host's part comes along, violently spiking from Easy Demon gameplay to Extreme Demon gameplay.

levels.name: Creacionist
levels.creator: Bryan1150
levels.description: Simplistic styled 1.9 level with an intimidating ship at 58% and an even more tormenting wave at 76% due to the unnatural frequency of rectangular-cuboid like structures.

levels.name: Crystal Power
levels.creator: Picha and more
levels.description: Old design collab bolstered up by it's impressive lineup of creators. Doesn't mean they knew how to not make the wave parts way too hard and slightly stinky.

levels.name: Cycle Of Space
levels.description: Strange 1.8 level with 2 really hard jumps at 54%, being invisible spike quintuple spikes. The ending dual is also very weird to play and the level is overall an odd experience.

levels.name: DANCE JAM DANCE
levels.creator: Gostley
levels.description: Level built for the JamAttack Gridlocked CC that threw in an extra twist and adds a minigame bossfight in the middle. The dual afterwards is also very strange with a hint of jank.

levels.name: Dark angel
levels.creator: Terminus M
levels.description: A 1.9 Hard Demon updated in 2.1 to add a lot of various strange additions. Including a bunch of random orbs invisible portals at the end making it a very confusing part to learn.

levels.name: Dark Angels
levels.creator: GdTheTactiq
levels.description: A 2.0 psuedocircles that employs a Nine Circles effect near the end and has some janky UFO gameplay.

levels.name: Dark Spear
levels.creator: Softable
levels.description: A late 1.9 level that manages to be funny, interesting, and actually fun to play all at the same time, with the majority of its victors calling it "a banger". Contains very skill based gameplay and a technical memory part at the end.

levels.name: DarnoClub Step
levels.creator: ZelLink
levels.description: Former hardest Medium Demon with insanely janky gameplay especially near the end with the final UFO, and is overall not very well-built.

levels.name: Data Stream
levels.creator: ZingerX
levels.description: Great strange gameplay practice with its weird mix of spam, auto parts, odd duals, and memory sections.

levels.name: Deadly Theorystep
levels.creator: TG Gboy
levels.description: This is deadass just a buffed version of R3kedge's "TheoryStep". The UFO at 65% is definitely something that's for sure.

levels.name: Death Step
levels.creator: FunnyGame
levels.description: The lesser known map pack Hard Demon. The pre-drop and first ball are very difficult, but the level eases up a bit afterwards.

levels.name: Definite Integral
levels.creator: Rabbitical
levels.description: This is a former hardest verified level made in 1.4. The entire level is memory from 0-100%, and also contains some really evil trolls at the end. Very well made for the time, though.

levels.name: Demon of Time
levels.creator: KeiAs
levels.description: 1.7 Hard Demon by KeiAs that has some very creative but frustrating memory sections near the end and the start, well as a huge difficulty spike in the UFO.

levels.name: Demon Sunrise
levels.creator: GW Crepuscule
levels.description: Old level featuring a super weird beginning section but luckily relaxes the difficulty for the rest of it. Was actually the hardest verified level for quite a long time! Memory everywhere and the first jump is a quad spike. Trust me it's FNAF.

levels.name: demons dry out
levels.description: Level made for BBDDEE's “Demons” series, of which this is the only currently rated entry since most of the others were verified with secret ways. Memory throughout the entire level with a nasty blind click at the halfway mark.

levels.name: Desolated
levels.creator: Noppler
levels.description: Milktoast design level with an awkward dual near the end.

levels.name: destiny of nature
levels.creator: StarBombKR
levels.description: An entry into StarBombKR’s “Destiny of” series. Contains extremely janky and awkward timings, most of which are huge chokepoints. A product of its time.

levels.name: Destructible World
levels.creator: Shig
levels.description: A level that uses the highly underutilized breakable blocks in a variety of creative ways. Has a tough ball at the beginning.

levels.name: DISCOMANIA
levels.creator: nikverr and more
levels.description: A quite pretty party/disco-themed Russian clicksync level that, traditionally for Russian clicksync levels, is kinda buggy. Uses a song you might recognize.

levels.name: Domine A
levels.creator: Lfritz
levels.description: Clicksync based level that also requires some skillful maneuvering and manages to flow somewhat naturally (rare for Lfritz's lower-end demons).

levels.name: Dont Let Me Drown
levels.creator: MaxxoRmeN
levels.description: Super cool metal-themed level that uses a Bring Me The Horizon song. Any sign of difficulty evaporates after 28%.

levels.name: Eastal
levels.creator: XanN and more
levels.description: Deceptively awful 2020 megacollab where all the difficulty comes from random bugs, chokepoints and an extremely difficult ending.

levels.name: eggdogs and pingpong
levels.creator: ThunderBat
levels.description: Run-of-the-mill modern style demon from late 2.1, packed with an eggdog bossfight and a horribly autotuned song

levels.name: Electrodynamix II
levels.creator: iv4n24
levels.description: Fairly average 1.9 level until about 60% where you're thrust into awkward early 2.0 moving object gameplay that carries all difficulty. Has literally nothing to do with Electrodynamix.

levels.name: electronic clubstep2
levels.creator: mrjaakko
levels.description: Weird early 2.0 level with somehow less than 5 moving objects and a frankly bullshit UFO.

levels.name: Ember
levels.creator: noobas and Rek3dge
levels.description: Late 1.9 level emulating some of the decoration from the upcoming 2.0 update that acts as a seriously impressive bad transition museum. Really funny last click.

levels.name: EnIgMaTiC
levels.creator: Berkoo
levels.description: Formerly one of the easiest Insane Demons in the game. Very strange 2.0 level with a lot of memorization involved.

levels.name: Entropic Dreams
levels.creator: LepszyGD
levels.description: Devin styled level hard carried by the first ship and wave. "Remember too slide :)"

levels.name: ERIC VAN IMPOSSIBLE
levels.creator: PyroGix
levels.description: How's it going guys today we are going to see if some levels are impossible. Creative effect level with an EVW boss fight and an animation that mocks Waboo's infamous video

levels.name: Escaping Gravity
levels.creator: gggkal
levels.description: Clicksync level with very awkward screen movements and an ending that tapes orbs to a cube.

levels.name: EUOUAE
levels.creator: Vadi
levels.description: Nerfed from a mid Extreme Demon to a lowly Hard Demon because it sucked too much. How the mighty hath fallen.

levels.name: evolution of music
levels.description: What if the memory cube in Cyber Chaos was a full-length level? Let's find out! Also some cool effects among the memory parts ig.

levels.name: Fairy Dynamix
levels.creator: kukizi
levels.description: Ugly ripoff of Shambler by Loogiah that somehow plays better than the level its ripping off. Stupid ship transition at 56%.

levels.name: FinalEscape
levels.creator: Dorami and Edwin
levels.description: Mc1.9 demon that repeats the very obnoxious first 30% of the level for the last 30% of the level down to the pixel.

levels.name: Final Sector
levels.creator: vismuth
levels.description: Old vismuth level that got rated years after its release. Features very unique design and structuring, as well as 2 wacky mazes.

levels.name: Fire Star
levels.creator: Dans2jours
levels.description: Empty early 2.0 level that somehow doesnt even breach the 1.8 object limit. The gameplay is annoyingly frontloaded.

levels.name: FireFrost Rebirth
levels.creator: Minesap
levels.description: The first 2.0 demon, and quite representative of the update. Beware of nonsensical movements and erratic teleportation. It's honestly beautiful.

levels.name: ForestHell
levels.creator: Dorami and Zelda
levels.description: Forest themed 1.9-2.0 memory level by Dorami. Has some pretty awkward UFO gameplay in the middle section and is an overall weird level to play.

levels.name: Forgotten Metropolis
levels.creator: GGLudvigg
levels.description: Legendary rated Hard Demons with multiple pathways at the start, as if you're exploring an advanced, yet forgotten civilization.

levels.name: Fort Castle
levels.creator: ghostface and GdTheTactiq
levels.description: 2.0 Hard Demon with a pretty tough UFO section at the 30% mark. A product of its time definitely and misspells the word watch midway through (awesome).

levels.name: foxtail socks
levels.creator: Lightbulbb
levels.description: A 1.5 Hard Demon with creative yet awkward gameplay for the time making it a pretty weird experience all around. Also named after a Soundodger stage.

levels.name: Fractalize
levels.creator: Vlacc
levels.description: Memory-based level with clean designs, coins are much harder than the standard route.

levels.name: Fracture Breaker
levels.creator: TroxxP1
levels.description: Extremely laggy 2 player level. Features are rhythm based mini game first, then a short 2 player symmetrical dual wave. The finally an extremely long dual ship control section that lasts for 40% of the level, and they are opposite gravities too.

levels.name: Freedom Flame
levels.creator: Rob Buck
levels.description: One of the less clinically insane Rob Buck levels, but still obviously Rob Buck, built in the hilariously dated 1.9-started 2.0-finished era.

levels.name: frozen castle
levels.creator: BurstStar
levels.description: Ice-themed level that is primarily focused on memory and ship. With the ship parts being very reliant on how well you can time your releases.

levels.name: Fuze II
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha and GDSkele
levels.description: Extremely energetic and learny level that acts as ZenthicAlpha's farewell to the GD community. His reign of terror will not be forgotten. Has a lot of moving object spam as per the requirements in the GDSkele construction booklet.

levels.name: Geometrical Domi V2
levels.creator: Nik Gambardella
levels.description: Wack-ass remake of Geometrical Dominator that is the literal definition of early 2.0.

levels.name: Glitch Gremlin
levels.creator: Evasium622
levels.description: Fast-paced level that decides to throw everything at you once the drop starts. Challenging ship, UFO and wave gameplay (the wave in particular having stunning hitboxes), a funky dual and a transition at 84% that can mess your alignment up easily.

levels.name: Golden Hope
levels.creator: Terron
levels.description: BUT MY HOPE WILL NEVER DI- Considered one of the easier Nine Circles Hard Demons, this gives the player a test of dual wave and memorizing the fakes everywhere.

levels.name: Goodbye II
levels.creator: Freyda
levels.description: Give up. :) Very skill based level following a glitchy layout style for the most part. Beware of the moving object ship.

levels.name: Grey Trap
levels.creator: Clasi
levels.description: Slow, dual-heavy level with jank UFO and ship gameplay to follow.

levels.name: hacker fly rebirth
levels.creator: nabbbbbb
levels.description: Exactly as advertised, it's a 1.9GDPS redecoration of the 1.5 disliked medium with... questionable buffs to the original

levels.name: HazardSector 4
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha
levels.description: One of the final entries into the Hazardsector series (thank god) with very odd orb timings.

levels.name: Hell Karma
levels.creator: F5night
levels.description: An absurdly learny level heavily inspired by jakerz. The gameplay feels very disjointed, helped in large part by the constant speed changes and teleporters.

levels.name: Hellaven
levels.creator: Clasi
levels.description: A Classy Classic (get it?). Very unique beginning with some really cool concepts and animations, but sadly falls off at the drop becoming just another generic 1.9 demon.

levels.name: hexagon force v3
levels.creator: Noriega
levels.description: A pretty unique Hexagon Force remake for its time utilizing the brand new technology of asymmetrical duals pretty well and overall being a fun and dynamic level, until the slope bug at 83.

levels.name: Hidden Powers
levels.creator: f3lixsram and more
levels.description: Basically Spacial Rift's older brother where the same creators are in this one, but it's much less janky (somehow???) and the transitions still aren't great.

levels.name: Horror Hate
levels.creator: B U R N
levels.description: Black and white maze thing with no right paths. I still don't understand how this level works.

levels.name: Hydragon
levels.creator: MalZir
levels.description: Funny 2.0 level with the worst song ever and- wait its NONG??? Since when??? At least the actual song is pretty penis too but this is like finding out that Santa isn't real.

levels.name: HydroCity
levels.creator: Zorochase
levels.description: Short 1.8 level that has very ahead of it's time design decoration and gameplay.

levels.name: ILLUSION OF SPACE
levels.creator: Oasis and ItzKiba
levels.description: EXTREMELY SYNC-FOCUSED LEVEL WITH A LOT OF THE DIFFICULTY CONCENTRATED AT THE FIRST DROP. WILL NOT STOP SCREAMING.

levels.name: in rainbows
levels.creator: Lfritz
levels.description: The majority of this level is made up of clicksync gameplay. Due to how the song is, this means lots of burst clicking in the clicksync parts. We have banned Radiohead

levels.name: INCINERATE
levels.creator: Yoshme
levels.description: Meltdown by Darwin if it was Hard Demon. Features very fast ships and waves, plus has a ball maze in the middle.

levels.name: Infinite Power
levels.creator: whitepythor
levels.description: THE quintessential early 2.0 level, featuring jank moving objects, weird teleportation, and odd 2.0 visuals.

levels.name: insomnia dreams
levels.creator: Iid4sh3riI
levels.description: An entirely grey and black 1.9 memory level that can't go 2 seconds without having you float on spikes.

levels.name: ITS STEAMPUNK
levels.creator: MinigunGD77
levels.description: A steampunk themed level made JamAttack's 5 Creator Contest. This energetic level keeps a brisk and bouncy pace throughout the whole level making it tricky to learn.

levels.name: Jawbreaker
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha
levels.description: Another one of the OG NC's, often compared to the original; has lots of tricky gravity portal segments.

levels.name: JeyBreak
levels.creator: Axthicy
levels.description: 2.0 fossil rate that frequently bounces between themes and has some extremely responsible usage of 2.0 features compared to other levels of it's time, minus a weird LazerBlitz style dual at 68.

levels.name: Kill Stealer
levels.creator: Dzeser
levels.description: A 1.9 medium length red demon, with most of the difficulty coming from the very long wave section that takes up the middle of the level, and the ball right after.

levels.name: Labnity
levels.creator: Jo2000
levels.description: Former Top 10 Medium Demon that fortunately got promoted. Most of it's difficulty comes from tight ship parts.

levels.name: Lake of Fire
levels.creator: weoweoteo
levels.description: Classic well aged 1.8 demon that is notable for being one of the very first hell themed levels in the game, and also being the one to truly kickstart the trend. Mainly memory with an unorthodox memory ship part.

levels.name: Lightning Speed
levels.creator: LazerBlitz
levels.description: Hard Demon remake of Fast as Lightning by Rabbatical, taking the duals and adding new ideas to them. Beware of the last dual.

levels.name: Limen
levels.creator: Mulpan and FunnyGame
levels.description: Venture on a perilous journey through a wide variety of sceneries with 1 goal in mind: slay the deity who torments the land. Are you worthy? XXL level featuring tons of sudden transitions, a boss at the very end, and a few laggy parts. Don't discount the insanely optimized LDM either.

levels.name: lost beneath
levels.creator: denberZ
levels.description: Well received, supremely over-the-top hell level with extreme strobing effects and penis music.

levels.name: Maniac
levels.creator: PhantomX
levels.description: Demone with very past faced gameplay and some light memory here and there. Also... the song.. SWEARS !!!! (WTF?????)

levels.name: Megalovania
levels.creator: EternaswipVMAX
levels.description: Much like the other EternaswipVMAX Undertale levels, this is almost completely carried by the wave sections. If you die at the robot you will slap yourself in the DICK.

levels.name: METAL TEST
levels.creator: 100foxes
levels.description: A very experimental level with gimmicky orb sections everywhere and a small tidbit of memory.

levels.name: Metallic Torment
levels.creator: Minesap and ViPriN
levels.description: Known for being the prequel/inspiration to Mental Torture. Dictionary definition of early 2.0 memory level with the start of the drop being frankly unhinged.

levels.name: meteor strike
levels.creator: Devilmine
levels.description: A very fast-paced 2.2 demon heavily reliant on orb centered gameplay. The first drop cube section also has some slopes you need to hold on to avoid flinging into obstacles.

levels.name: Mission MADISON II
levels.creator: AgentJDN
levels.description: The sequel to Mission MADISON. Introduces yet another gamemode concept that takes much longer to get the hang of than the ones in the prequel.

levels.name: Mountain Flowers II
levels.creator: OrBiTaL
levels.description: Very odd core level that trades the difficult everything of the original level for the even more difficult waves it has today.

levels.name: NeoN 18
levels.creator: Xender Game and DspectrumNGK
levels.description: Xender Game and DSpectrumNGK collab that's relatively long and learny with most of the level not having any bossfights. You'll spend most of the time learning the bossfight at 33, but the rest of the level is easy to choke.

levels.name: Nightmare Realm II
levels.creator: EternaswipVMAX
levels.description: Raw, uniquely purple hell-themed demon that repeatedly insults the player throughout the level.

levels.name: Nine Circles
levels.creator: Zobros
levels.description: H3LL DEMON!!! The original NC level, a classic. Notable for its heavy usage of wave, nerve wracking ending, and surprisingly tricky pre-drop ship.

levels.name: Nomostros Cosmos
levels.creator: GamerKnight750
levels.description: Somehow beat Ring Trick for best Hard Demon of 2023 even though Ring Trick won in the same creator contest this was made for. A space themed NC level that is reminicent of Bli's style.

levels.name: Nowise
levels.creator: Darwin
levels.description: One of the hardest 2.1 gauntlet demons with a silly "bossfight" ending.

levels.name: Number 15
levels.creator: Chills
levels.description: Burger king foot lettuce. The last thing you'd want in your Burger King burger is someone's foot fungus. But as it turns out, that might be what you get. A 4channer uploaded a photo anonymously to the site showcasing his feet in a plastic bin of lettuce. With the statement: "This is the lettuce you eat at Burger King." Admittedly, he had shoes on. But that's even worse. The post went live at 11:38 PM on July 16, and a mere 20 minutes later, the Burger King in question was alerted to the rogue employee. At least, I hope he's rogue. How did it happen? Well, the BK employee hadn't removed the Exif data from the uploaded photo, which suggested the culprit was somewhere in Mayfield Heights, Ohio. This was at 11:47. Three minutes later at 11:50, the Burger King branch address was posted with wishes of happy unemployment. 5 minutes later, the news station was contacted by another 4channer. And three minutes later, at 11:58, a link was posted: BK's "Tell us about us" online forum. The foot photo, otherwise known as exhibit A, was attached. Cleveland Scene Magazine contacted the BK in question the next day. When questioned, the breakfast shift manager said "Oh, I know who that is. He's getting fired." Mystery solved, by 4chan. Now we can all go back to eating our fast food in peace.

levels.name: One Eyed Man
levels.creator: flash
levels.description: Extremely middle-heavy level, being carried by a super bizarre UFO section, and the dual that follows right after.

levels.name: PAY
levels.creator: PDKGD and more
levels.description: Average glow-flow collab inspired by Caution with random difficulty spike waves. Also ACC's sibling.

levels.name: Permafrost Caverns
levels.creator: LMAnubis
levels.description: LmAnubis recreates his childhood Canadian experience with his usual orb trickery and once-stellar art decoration. He really did see a mammoth (lie)

levels.name: permafrost village
levels.creator: FyreDragan
levels.description: Cube only hard demon that consists mostly out of slope gameplay, making the level awful to play. You can only collect 3 coins altogether and the path is very complicated, it actually makes the level hard demon difficulty. Was thankfully fixed for 2.2.

levels.name: pg clubstep
levels.creator: pg1004
levels.description: The hardest Map Pack level, has gone through multiple updates, both harder and easier than the current version. Right now it's just a memory-heavy clubstep remake with some nasty ships near the end.

levels.name: Phase 3
levels.creator: danerdogger
levels.description: Lava themed level that uses a lot of misdirection but is otherwise straightforward.

levels.name: PixelLocked
levels.creator: gmdmann
levels.description: Not pixelated Deadlocked. Upbeat level with click sync gameplay and a dual in the second half. The creator basically reused most of the deco aspects for the first half from Mystic Bounds, effectively destroying most mobile devices.

levels.name: Plevel
levels.creator: Djdvd17
levels.description: Early 2.1 level comprised of the creator taking other people's creating styles and making them ugly.

levels.name: Pneumatic Tokyo
levels.creator: Sechsan
levels.description: Old 2.0 level with some strange decoration cohesion and actually responsible moving objects. It also looks like it has waaaaaay higher CPS than it actually does. Where exactly the pneumatics in this level hide remains a mystery.

levels.name: Potatoguy Adven 3
levels.creator: BearWare
levels.description: 1.8 memory-based Hard Demon created by a well-known Super Mario Maker course maker, Bearware. has creative memory throughout and is overall a solid level for its time.

levels.name: Prismatic Vortex
levels.creator: BibbyDib
levels.description: Fossil rate from early 2.1 with some weird gameplay choices. The most notable thing is that this was a green user rate, as it was made on a Kindle which is apparently a thing.

levels.name: Procyon Naos
levels.creator: LuisGX12 and more
levels.description: 2.0 collab + Ichor by Xtrullor, you do the math. Most notable thing about the level besides the gameplay is the number keys part, you have to pick all of the right ones or die.

levels.name: Psychedelic Blaze
levels.creator: OhNine and more
levels.description: Old 2.1 megacollab that got fossil rated 7 years later. Contains a lot of fast paced gameplay and constant part changes, but with the caveat of the first third being significantly more awkward than the rest.

levels.name: Radio Breakers
levels.creator: Terron
levels.description: Well received 1.9 memory level with a very quandarious wave section near the start.

levels.name: Reflection
levels.creator: willy5000
levels.description: This description is in honor of SpaceLUC, who valiantly tried (and failed) to do this as their first Insane Demon. Fly high, you legend (old 2.0 level carried in difficulty by a few scringly inputs).

levels.name: RGB
levels.creator: Sillow
levels.description: Simplistic block deco flashing pure red, blue, and green consistently. Consists of XL gameplay containing challenging wave and ship parts and an extremely fast and nerve-racking ending. The song is a lie.

levels.name: Running in the 90s
levels.creator: Findexi and more
levels.description: The quintessential early 2.1 collab: goofy decoration, odd gameplay choices, meme song, totally unbalanced part sizes (JerkRat takes up the last 30% alone in a roster of 8), and multiple weirdly spammy moments.

levels.name: Sakura
levels.creator: zGodYT and more
levels.description: Wholly unremarkable glow flow with lots of clicksync, move along.

levels.name: SAWMERANG
levels.creator: Split72
levels.description: Abrasive feeling level that was dislike bombed on release due to the creator being "discovered" to be a furry (it was very obvious.) The gameplay largely consists of timings, a bunch of UFO portal worms, and a dual, each in three seperate sections.

levels.name: Severe winter
levels.creator: noobas and pg1004
levels.description: Strange winter-themed art level from 1.9 with some tough gameplay thrown into the mix. Curiously uploaded nearly three months into the year despite bearing huge text saying "HAPPY NEW YEAR 2015".

levels.name: Shcheloch
levels.creator: Unbihexium and Unbipentium (so true)
levels.description: Very strange Alkali/Hinds styled "collab" between Unbihexium and Unbipentium. A lot of the difficulty in this level comes from knowing what can kill you because there is a lot of visual clutter.

levels.name: SIMG Factorial 4
levels.creator: LunarSimg
levels.description: The 4th entry into LunarSIMGs SIMG Factorial series. Used to be harder but Lunar decided to nerf it at some point. Extremely memory based with the ending being an almost completely black memory section.

levels.name: SIMG Factorial 9
levels.creator: LunarSimg
levels.description: A level that's a nice blend between skill-based gameplay and memory. Used to be way harder and have one of those flashy mazes where the UFO pillars were, but in the end got removed when the level had a nerfdate.

levels.name: Skittles
levels.creator: CDMusic
levels.description: Spacey rainbow themed level that has a large amount of its difficulty centered around its duals, specifically a dual ship that feels heavier than it is.

levels.name: Sky Watching
levels.creator: gogBone
levels.description: Heaven themed level where the balancing is almost entirely based on the second half.

levels.name: Solstice
levels.creator: Loltad
levels.description: Solar-themed older Loltad level from when he just kinda threw shit at the wall until it stuck. Somehow flows well.

levels.name: Soulwind
levels.creator: ViPriN and Nox
levels.description: Classic 1.9 demon with some brutal timings in the predrop and multiple difficult UFO sections at the drop.

levels.name: Sound of Infinity
levels.creator: RealSoulDash
levels.description: Standard 1.9 level with some tricky waves and a lot of buffers.

levels.name: Souring
levels.creator: Psynapse and more
levels.description: Very chaotic Psynapse-hosted collab with 3 others. In typical fashion, Psynapse's parts are the hardest, but not by much, Kllnex' buildup ship is not easy.

levels.name: Steampunk
levels.creator: Vermillion
levels.description: A 1.9 memory based Vermillion Hard Demon that executes its steampunk style pretty well for its time (miss the pink orb at the end I'm begging you).

levels.name: strawberrypizza
levels.creator: aqwaris
levels.description: Very weird lil 2.2 level that violently spikes up in difficulty in the second half for some godforsaken reason.

levels.name: Strike 3
levels.creator: Jayuff
levels.description: Baseball themed level where a decent amount of it's difficulty comes from the dual cube at 68%.

levels.name: SUBVERT
levels.creator: JustaGDplay3r
levels.description: Fast-paced megacollab with a massive amount of glow flashbang, put your sunglasses on before playing.

levels.name: Sundivine
levels.creator: Softable, Uero, and Ranar
levels.description: Very memory heavy and involves a ton of holding. Also has a secret way but don’t take that shhhhh it doesnt exist.

levels.name: Supreme
levels.creator: Doujo and EnZore
levels.description: Effect level that shifts between modernistic and glow styles in a smooth fashion with well-recieved gameplay.

levels.name: Teatherd soul
levels.creator: Rek3dge
levels.description: Early 1.9 trailblazer with fair gameplay that invented the effect that is used in the iconic flashing ball part in Cataclysm. Also would go on to partially inspire Frozen Space, Nether Sector, and more despite its obscurity.

levels.name: Technolocked
levels.creator: Dudex and TMNgaming
levels.description: 2.0 level with... interesting structuring, as well as decoration that you would probably never associate with the two people who made it. Emotional storyline at the end with the bossfight.

levels.name: Temple Travel
levels.creator: Simarlet
levels.description: Frontloaded level loosely inspired by JamAttack. The creator's hardest used to be The Nightmare, leading to weird gameplay tropes

levels.name: The Bone
levels.creator: AnielChasseur
levels.description: You messed up and killed small boners in the valley, for that crime you have to face the wrath of... BEHOLD! the GREAT. the MIGHTY. The Bone. Will you survive The Bone's Hellish's Temple, And manage to defeat all of his colleagues? or will you succumb to your sins and pay for them. Lets Find Out

levels.name: The experiment ii
levels.creator: NachoLag
levels.description: One of the first levels to prioritize flow and it's a raw early 2.0 off-the-wall level. Study up, glowflow creators, this will be on the test.

levels.name: The Regresson
levels.creator: vismuth
levels.description: Chaotic Vismuth level that was made after Niflheim. Features a lot of awkward slope jumps and less-than-favourable transitions.

levels.name: The Undying
levels.creator: EternaswipVMAX
levels.description: Another EternaswipVMAX level using an Undertale song. This one has an annoying wave that got buffed by adding spikes everywhere, as well as a mean last jump.

levels.name: Theory of a Remix
levels.creator: ML500
levels.description: Basically Theory of Skrillex but much harder and reverse balancing, meaning the wave is the hardest part rather than the beginning.

levels.name: Theory of Duality
levels.creator: LazerBlitz
levels.description: An old 1.9 Lazerblitz level that features several wacky duals. It will definitely take some time to get them down, but they aren't too bad after that. The pre-drop also has two quite difficult jumps for no reason.

levels.name: Theta
levels.creator: r y u
levels.description: A fast-paced high CPS Hard Demon that is NOT an entry into MindCap's iconic series. Features a lot of skippable orbs.

levels.name: Time Adventure
levels.description: An old Hard Demon infamous for its 2 quadruple spikes in the middle of it. Aside from these massive chokepoints, the rest of it is relatively easy.

levels.name: Tomb of the Ancients
levels.creator: LmAnubis
levels.description: Or suffer my curse....

levels.name: torrential
levels.creator: pg1004
levels.description: Contains a lot of very weird memory sections and overall the design of the level makes it a super confusing experience from start to finish.

levels.name: tower descent
levels.creator: pocke
levels.description: A level made by pocke for Viprin's mcc4. This level also spans the whole editor heigh and is the shortest Demon in the game gameplay-wise: 23 seconds, which results in the gameplay being extremely learny, good luck.

levels.name: Toxic Ruins
levels.creator: Ggb0y
levels.description: Iconic Ggb0y level carried by a difficult to learn 1.9 mini cube dual (the horror) and some tight ship sections.

levels.name: Tricksters Funhouse
levels.creator: LmAnubis
levels.description: Circus themed 1.9 memory level that is quite short and has some tricky timings throughout. The beginning is a lot harder than the rest. The primordial circus levle

levels.name: ULT
levels.creator: An Gyung
levels.description: A fast-paced semi-memory level with a lot of spammy sections and a ton of portals in the UFO parts. Has a very chokeable ending ball dual as well.

levels.name: Ultimate Phase AgaiN
levels.creator: SrMDK
levels.description: A 2.1 The Ultimate Phase remake that keeps all the finnicky jank that the original had, especially in the dual sections.

levels.name: Underground
levels.creator: AbstractDark
levels.description: A very impressive recreation of 2.1 in 2.0 made by AbstractDark. Unfortunately due to the level not actually being created in 2.1 though, some of the recreated gameplay elements suffer from jank issues, like the dash orb and black orb.

levels.name: USSR Mode
levels.creator: creeperus and Arrmix42
levels.description: Soviet Union themed level that progressively gets harder as you play. Features the infamous Mechanical Pony Stalin boss fight at the end

levels.name: Volare
levels.creator: Keyblade and GaidenHertuny
levels.description: Unapolagetically Spanish early 2.1 level with difficult to learn mini cube sections that demand holding for very specific amounts of time.

levels.name: WAR
levels.creator: caerbanoc
levels.description: Cartoonishly comic book style level with a post-apocalyptic theming.

levels.name: Watch in Chaos
levels.creator: zaRIKU
levels.description: Ridiculous pre 1.9 level where literally none of the gameplay makes any sense and the difficulty is completely carried by a very difficult orb chain in the middle of the map.

levels.name: Water Temple
levels.creator: Michigun
levels.description: The most forgotten Temple level, essentially just being a blue and harder Fire Temple. Difficulty drops after 31%.

levels.name: white women
levels.creator: heatherhayes
levels.description: Do you beat white women? Cos I do! Yuk yuk! Timing level with a lot of learny and memory elements mixed in.

levels.name: Y
levels.creator: geomania
levels.description: Blue remake of X with a strange affinity for teleportals and awkward gameplay.

levels.name: Ziege
levels.creator: Seabers and TheDevon
levels.description: Action packed late 2.0 level that keeps everything above board, at least when compared to its contemporaries. Features a couple awkward transitions but pretty standard beyond that.

levels.name: 4uck
levels.creator: iNubble
levels.description: As you would for iNubble's other works, expect cutesy characters and silly rainbow theming :) Hitboxes are way more lenient than it may seem.

levels.name: absolute atom
levels.description: Weird old level created by the goat gw nys15 that joins it's product-of-its-time cousins in the wtf tier.

levels.name: Absolute Zero
levels.creator: ToastLord
levels.skillset: Learny, Dual, The worst Ice Monkey T5
levels.description: Sequel to ToastLord's oldest level Black Ice, with better gameplay and deco.

levels.name: Absolute Hotness
levels.creator: ToastLord
levels.description: ToastLord level featuring the same gameplay elements as every other ToastLord level but this time really really hot.

levels.name: Acid Rush
levels.creator: Serponge and more
levels.description: First level of the Acid Rush trilogy. The level is fast-paced as the name suggests, LDM is highly recommended due to Serponge’s literal stunning effects near the end.

levels.name: ADAMANTIUM CORE
levels.creator: Sminx and scrumpy
levels.description: A much easier remake of the Insane Demon TITANIUM CORE. Features some 2p gimmicks, like a laser gun and a bossfight where you can control the x position of your icon.

levels.name: Agitation
levels.creator: KoDTIFF
levels.description: Features several duals throughout the entire level that just barely avoid completely ripping off LazerBlitz.

levels.name: Aleph 0
levels.creator: Shiryuu7
levels.description: A 1.0-styled level that showcases novel effects and can get atmospheric at times.

levels.name: Aleph Zero
levels.creator: IlluminatyByN
levels.description: Imagine Aleph 0 with a mathematical acid trip, the first 15% in particular being motion sickness hell as well as the hardest part by FAR. Might wanna grab a bucket for this one, vomit is inevitable.

levels.name: Ancient Temple
levels.creator: Serponge
levels.description: 1.6 styled level made for a Zobros creator contest. Has some extremely hard ball timings in the 2nd half.

levels.name: Another Infinity
levels.creator: Tundra and stardust1971
levels.description: Extremely stereotypical early 2.0 level that has a surprisingly condensed first half, which makes the already abnormally long length drag on even more.

levels.name: antichamber
levels.creator: LavonAffair
levels.description: Digital chlamydia. (Basically a 7 star for the first half, then you're thrown into a dick-tight corridor of consistency hell as well as an unpredictable wave, and finally a cube that was absolutely shat on by 2.2)

levels.name: Appearance
levels.creator: crossblade and Korita
levels.description: Ridiculous early 2.1 level witha lot of offscreen gameplay and a song that won't quit twerking.

levels.name: ascending
levels.creator: skywalker14
levels.description: The short level before dooMed happened. There's like 12 clicks in the whole level but half of them are crazy difficult. Flying Lotus song hell yeah

levels.name: Astral Decay
levels.creator: ToastLord
levels.description: ToastLords best received level, with fast paced, learny gameplay and a dual that’s way harder than everything else.

levels.name: atop monrai
levels.creator: ivyteal
levels.description: The beginning, yeah. It takes a while to figure out what is going on, and is sure to be a pain in the ass.

levels.name: atrium
levels.creator: Meroo
levels.description: From making one of the most infamous levels in the game, Castling, to this it is very clear that Meroo learned from their; mistakes. Does song representation very well and has one of the coolest wave parts ever. Also has some very difficult coins.

levels.name: Axion II
levels.creator: Hubtos and Velsk
levels.description: Super fucking awesome 2.0/early 2.1 styled level somehow released in the latter half of 2.1 with a very sharp learning curve, lots of fake orbs, and a lot of satisfying fast paced gameplay.

levels.name: Azure
levels.creator: eddydo
levels.description: Remarkably straightforward azure colored Nine Circles level with a ginormous amount of intensity.

levels.name: backbeat MANIAC
levels.creator: SpooFy
levels.description: This level features Spoofy's signature decoration style with a cool pause/fast forward gimmick and a spammy ending.

levels.name: Be Exuberant
levels.creator: MrKoolTrix and goose
levels.description: Just as chaotic as you think a collab between MrKoolTrix and Goose would be, features a ton of moving objects as expected and a lot of fake orbs scattered around.

levels.name: BlastWAve
levels.creator: Darwin
levels.description: Basically just a Darwin-ified version of SoundWave by Toxic GD (play it youll get what I mean).

levels.name: Bleed
levels.creator: Gaero
levels.description: Obscure 2.0 level that looks surprisingly good for the time it was made in.

levels.name: BlindFold
levels.creator: lioleo and more
levels.description: Very Korean casino themed level with poor playtesting that is held up by it's first and last parts being way harder than everything else.

levels.name: bloody room
levels.creator: f3lixsram
levels.description: Nonsensical early 2.0 level littered with invisible portals and orbs, as well as 2 random straight flys. Formerly one of the easiest Insane Demons.

levels.name: BrainFreeze
levels.creator: AnnoyingBaby
levels.description: Strange 1.9 level carried heavily by a predrop with slow, shockingly tight timings and an awkward ship.

levels.name: Brainiac Maniac
levels.creator: CriChin
levels.description: 𝒟𝑒𝒶𝓇 𝒫𝓁𝒶𝓎𝑒𝓇,    𝒲𝑒 𝒶𝓇𝑒 𝐹𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓀𝓎. 𝒲𝑒 𝓌𝒾𝓁𝓁 𝓉𝑜𝓊𝒸𝒽 𝓎𝑜𝓊𝓇 𝒷𝓇𝒶𝒾𝓃𝓈.     𝒮𝒾𝓃𝒸𝑒𝓇𝑒𝓁𝓎, 𝒯𝒽𝑒 𝒵𝑜𝓂𝒷𝒾𝑒𝓈

levels.name: bury the sun
levels.creator: MCres
levels.description: Atmospheric art level themed after a storm in the desert. The first drop is by far the learniest part. Features several odd hitboxes. Has a 39 second auto sequence at the end.

levels.name: C4R CR45H
levels.creator: N17R00000000000
levels.description: Gimmicky level that spikes in difficulty at the 64% UFO, just to drop again from there.

levels.name: Cant Let Troll
levels.creator: Defectum
levels.description: An entry into Defectum’s troll main level series. Known for its facade as a free demon, it’s just Cant Let Go but with a bunch of trolls added making it memory based.

levels.name: CapaStep
levels.creator: AAAAAlex
levels.description: Clubstep remake with a lot of memorization. Was humorously rated Insane Demon for some time.

levels.name: Catena di Montaggio
levels.creator: uan
levels.description: Factory themed solo with wacky tile placement and a very difficult first half

levels.name: Charred bricks
levels.creator: Yakimaru
levels.description: Sightreadable but lightning quick nerve control challenge with a big difficulty spike in the second half.

levels.name: Civic
levels.creator: LuchioX, ShyGuy, and Alkali
levels.description: Old Psychosis spinoff with satisfying, skill based gameplay. Reportedly not affiliated with Honda but we know better than that.

levels.name: Clash
levels.creator: GmD SamUL
levels.description: Reeks of 2.0 in the most raw of ways, the completely real not clickbait Shadow Monster Bossfight at the drop still holds up super well, especially for the time.

levels.name: Classical
levels.creator: Hakkou
levels.description: One of the many Nine Circles levels that so happens to have a pretty tough second half along with a bit of memory around some parts.

levels.name: Cocco Bello
levels.creator: Pennutoh and more
levels.description: Massive Pennutoh click-sync collab, biased towards the end. Not much else to say, if you like Pennutoh's work, you'll surely like this too.

levels.name: Colorful Burst
levels.creator: DubbyBall and more
levels.description: 1.9GDPS collab. Syncs pretty well, but gets flashy and hard to see as it progresses

levels.name: Colorful Caverns II
levels.creator: VeXyn
levels.description: Known for being the former hardest Medium Demon. What else do I say? N-no there's nothing else on the script. What do you mean improvise it? There's literally nothing about this level. There's memory sometimes? Who the hell cares about memory sometimes? I give up dude, you give me the dumbest shit to describe. How about you sell a used Ford Focus with seven digit mileage and piss and nuts spray painted on the sides. C'mon, flourish me. Enrich me, dumbass. You make me do the dumbest stuff. Fuck you.

levels.name: Companion Cube
levels.creator: Shig
levels.description: Unique 2-player level where one player is essentially stationary for the entire drop. Using how gamemodes interact with each other to its advantage.

levels.name: Compound
levels.creator: Mazl and Platnuu
levels.description: Late 2.0 level that has some dramatically deceptive difficulty spikes in the waves and duals.

levels.name: Crimson Comodo
levels.creator: joshteautwins
levels.description: Bossfight level carried by the bossfight (woah). An update turned the ending of the level from auto to actually have gameplay, and removed text in the bossfight telling you how to play it.

levels.name: Cyberpunk Love
levels.creator: Lucoraf
levels.description: Generally well liked 2.0 solo which features unique design choices that are still looking very good even for today standards. Notable for taking more than 4 years to finally receive rate.

levels.name: Dart
levels.creator: Cirtrax and more
levels.description: Dart-only ultracollab that is about as stupid as you would expect. Has an utterly rancid comment section because of the three (3) parts that contain a trans flag. Trans rights foreva!!!!!!

levels.name: Database eRrOr
levels.creator: Goodbye GD
levels.description: Strange early 1.9 memory level with some pretty cool effects and some genuinely very impressive art at the end, but rather out of place as the original song wasn't even from F-777.

levels.name: Deep Echo
levels.creator: DangerousROBOT
levels.description: Extremely pretty and mostly very slow-paced XXL level. Uses a cursedsnake song extremely well, despite the variety in design choices.

levels.name: Demon machine
levels.description: A super unbalanced level that contains an extremely tight straightfly section at the end. Overall the level is pretty poorly made and is very very janky at parts, especially at the halfway mark with its really RNG based mini-ball section.

levels.name: Demon Sky
levels.creator: Gelt
levels.description: Challenging memory-based Gelt Hard Demon from depths of 1.8. has a ton of fakes and some hard ship sections, and involves a lot of going under things and missing random orbs.

levels.name: DemonTheory
levels.creator: Rabb2t
levels.description: I can't believe is not TOE2. Another Theory of Everything remake that feels more like a Toe II v2 v2 than anything. Ridiculously high CPS wave parts near the end of the second drop (unless you take the coin).

levels.name: Desolation iii
levels.creator: ch4rlie03
levels.description: Chill timing level that concluded a trilogy, where the first 2 levels were below 5 star difficulty. Can be quite the challenge if you're timing deficient.

levels.name: Despacito Circles
levels.creator: Terron
levels.description: This is so sad. Alexa, play Despacito. Nine Circles level with cool designs and nice colours with a handful of fakes and a fake last jump. (Please note that entering the divorce portal late at 83% will kill you).

levels.name: DEVIOUS
levels.creator: whlt
levels.description: DEVIOUSly high CPS gameplay over bright pastel rainbow eye-singing colors. Other than the first ball, the rest of the level is well indicated. No DEVIOUS behavior here.

levels.name: Diamond Cave 2
levels.creator: Myinus
levels.description: Korean maze level that follows the trend of 2.0 levels that are built like 1.9 levels being shockingly polished and responsible.

levels.name: Diamond Rose
levels.creator: MrMeurick
levels.description: Nothing in this level makes sense to the point where I can't even pinpoint a specific skillset. I think it might be fast paced and maybe clicksync. This level reinvented its own wheels but made them octagons.

levels.name: Different Descent
levels.creator: Danke and more
levels.description: Forgettable Digital Decent remake with parts that are sometimes worse than the original.

levels.name: Disco Caverns
levels.creator: CarioX
levels.description: Early 2.0 remake of Dark Disco that was the start of CairoX's career. Made up of the classic Deadlocked tunnels style, with a heavy emphasis on the cascading flashy effects.

levels.name: Ditched Machine
levels.creator: Jeyzor
levels.description: Jeyzors most popular level by far, expect some batshit crazy duals and memory parts. Bitched Machine amirite.

levels.name: DoomsDay
levels.creator: ElectricBass
levels.description: Was once humorously buffed to a near-Bloodbath difficulty Extreme Demon, filled with galores of awful chokepoints. Post-revert its just another goofy 2.0 hell level with some weird moving object memory and tough ships/waves.

levels.name: Double Dash
levels.creator: Zoroa
levels.description: No, not the Mario Kart game, but rather a long level with only dual gameplay. Unbalanced and somewhat inconsistent for the most part.

levels.name: Dreamcatcher
levels.creator: crysticai
levels.description: This is a pretty standard Hard Demon with some gimmicky gameplay using orbs. Then at 40ish%, you have a randomized split path gimmick that you must deal with too. They do reconverge shortly after though.

levels.name: DreamLand Mark II
levels.creator: Rob Buck and more
levels.description: An old impossible level collab from way back in early 1.9 that got nerfed and verified legit right before 2.0 released. Looks like Rob Buck forgot to nerf Hinds' part though, as it's by far the hardest chunk of the level.

levels.name: eel
levels.creator: Polarizing
levels.description: Exclusively cube and robot slow timing gameplay while your eyes get assaulted.

levels.name: Electro Hive
levels.creator: RadiationV2
levels.description: Funny 2.0 bossfight thing against a futuristic bee colony where none of the attacks are indicated or even really visible.

levels.name: Elquiness
levels.creator: Mulpan
levels.description: Learnyearly 2.1 stereotype with a lot of high CPS bursts. Known most for being featured in The gasoline by The Funky Team.

levels.name: Energy Magmatic
levels.creator: Shatt3rium
levels.description: Early 2.1 level that is definitely feeling it's age. Carried a bit by the barrier of entry being to high for Medium Demon despite being easy for skilled players to squash.

levels.name: Everett
levels.creator: An Gyung
levels.description: Straying away from An Gyung's more conventional Hinds-esque style, this level mainly focuses on the usage of clean 2.2 effects and design, with some moderate timings making up the gameplay. Also Aph was born here.

levels.name: Excursion
levels.creator: KingmanTV and chaosXstream
levels.description: Very raw old 2.0 collab with a lot of crazy colorful designs and an intense second half. Very much a product of its time, but it still holds up in gameplay quite well to this day.

levels.name: Extermination
levels.creator: Mazl
levels.description: Very dated 2.1 level that relies heavily on dash orb timings and awkward transitions for difficulty, and has a buildup ship with hitboxes so shit they could kill a child.

levels.name: Extreme AnnoPark
levels.creator: Annon
levels.description: Cool Extreme Park spinoff with a much higher colour variation (mainly cos of EP being 1.0) and a surprisingly tough learning process.

levels.name: f3hcs
levels.creator: durianhead
levels.description: 1.0 limitations sequel to smohcs. Formerly used to contain an incredibly hard ship section near the end, which has since been nerfed.

levels.name: Flaklypa
levels.creator: LinkTheGamer
levels.description: Early 1.9 skill based level with a lot of tight ship and wave segments. Kickstarted LinkTheGamer's career who would go on to make several more levels on this sheet.

levels.name: Flower Spark
levels.creator: kelemsk
levels.description: 1.9 PS level based on traditional asian festivals, mainly due to the song choice. It starts off as a 7 star and then you get to a dual that is incredibly inconsistent even with visual cues.

levels.name: follow me
levels.creator: TheRealXFuture
levels.description: Follow the mouse, and that's it! How hard could it be...?

levels.name: For Matilda 2
levels.creator: Jeyzor
levels.description: Very wacky 2.0 level with a long and drawn out UFO section at the end.

levels.name: Forcing Hex Gemstone
levels.creator: whyrarka
levels.description: Imagine Hexagon Force if it had shaders everywhere, was a lot faster and more ship focused. Also doesn't use Hexagon Force as the song for some reason.

levels.name: forsaken crewmate
levels.creator: Artaire and SigRp
levels.description: Slightly altered 1.9GDPS remake to Forsaken Neon, which replaces some gameplay issues of the original with its own

levels.name: Forsaken Neon
levels.creator: Zobros and TriAxis
levels.description: Infamous 1.9 demon that has been widely panned for its lack of balancing, janky gameplay and numerous bugs.

levels.name: FuryStep
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha
levels.description: Extremely memory intensive 1.9 level with an awkward ship at the end.

levels.name: Future Funk
levels.creator: JonathanGD
levels.description: Iconic XXL mashup of Clutterfunk and High Life and JonathanGD's most famed work.

levels.name: Galactic Interface
levels.creator: realwhata and more
levels.description: Incredibly stupid and non-functional glow/flow that can only be described as Budget Void Wave. Incredibly second-half heavy, too.

levels.name: Ginseng
levels.creator: iIFrostIi
levels.description: Extremely raw 2.0 level with the coveted Swingcopter Bossfight of terror, in which the main antagonist has an intense monologue and cussing fit before being swiftly murdered. Proceeding that is a rather stunning "Take A Break" part.

levels.name: Gleam
levels.creator: xVoidGD
levels.description: Weird and energetic glow level where you click once every two seconds at best, despite the looks of a fast level with lots of duals.

levels.name: glowfishD
levels.creator: LupoDZN
levels.description: Very interesting 2.2 level that was a perfect 10 enjoyment on the GDDL for a good while. Whilst fast-paced, it's very consistency and click-pattern focused.

levels.name: Golden Mine
levels.creator: Leksitoo and more
levels.description: Private server remake of legendary MaJackO level Gold Mine, this time with more polished gameplay and visuals.

levels.name: growl
levels.creator: whitepythor
levels.description: Very unorthodox level which has a big bulk of the difficulty weighed into the first spider and first robot. The second half, whilst consistent and generally easier, features a couple moments that may cause some runs to come to an end.

levels.name: heatstroke
levels.creator: Eggsncoffee
levels.description: Sizzling hot timing level with a fairly noticeable lean in balancing towards the first half.

levels.name: Hecatomb
levels.creator: ToxYc and more
