levels.description: Strange 2.1 megacollab that loses its fucking mind every other part.

levels.name: Hellish Trip
levels.creator: LaZye
levels.description: LaZye 2.0 level (uh oh) with some gnarly ship chokepoints dusting an otherwise fairly standard level. This would go on to be the blueprint for Step to Hell.

levels.name: HexaBit
levels.creator: Vitol64
levels.description: Yet another Hard Demon carried by one insane dual part half way in. The offender here is the ship and spider part of the dual being absurdly inconsistent to do.

levels.name: HindSight
levels.creator: Manix648 and LazerBlitz
levels.description: A level inspired by Hinds levels and collab parts. Manix dipped his parts into rainbow glue on accident while LazerBlitz space-ified the second and last quarter of the level.

levels.name: hmmmmmmmm
levels.creator: TheRealXFuture
levels.description: Janky idea dump with a lot of awkward timings and a downright despicable pixelated part.

levels.name: Holy Power
levels.creator: Dorami and NASHII
levels.description: Early 2.1 janky level made by Dorami and NASHII (oh no), for some reason was a weekly demon, good job Robtop.

levels.name: Horuseus
levels.creator: F5night
levels.description: Third and final installment in the reality-changing Osiris series. This one being verified by jakerz instead of made by him. Contains a lot of the usual stuff you would expect from Osiris and Anubis Gate, except dumbed down for an easier difficulty.

levels.name: How 2 F4rt
levels.creator: melX0exe
levels.description: 1. Prepare your ass: bend forwards at a 90 degree angle 2. Place hands on cheeks and spread them apart 3. Exert 4. Withhold exertion otherwise you may sh1t

levels.name: HyperioxX
levels.creator: Rlol and xtobe5
levels.description: Very 1.9 1.9 Hard Demon (if you know what I mean), the wave at the drop just has saws everywhere, and the memory cube doesn't work sometimes but other than that it's a pretty solid level.

levels.name: Hypnotic Travel
levels.creator: Alkatraz
levels.description: Infamously known as one of the longest Hard Demons. Expectedly very boring to play.

levels.name: I Dont Wanna Go
levels.creator: ZeroSR and Convie
levels.description: XL layout-style flow level that changes gamemodes pretty frequently. Throws in bits of memory near the beginning and ending.

levels.name: I Dream in Pixels
levels.creator: Metalface221
levels.description: 60hz players' worst nightmare. Very unbalanced flashy level with absurd, borderline insane demon ships. Did I mention the ships are hard?

levels.name: I Said Baaah
levels.creator: Seabers and more
levels.description: Funny level featuring some famous creators. Weirdly balanced but fun to play if you can handle the occasional jank.

levels.name: idolize
levels.creator: zSejun and more
levels.description: Goofy AI generated flow level with a snow theme to it. There are a surprising amount of skips in the gameplay.

levels.name: IM GOING UP
levels.creator: Gogglas
levels.description: Quite flashy 2.2 level featuring almost entirely cube gameplay, focusing on repetition and representing the lyrics of the song in a literal sense. The last part has spider orbs with a surprisingly tight timing window, watch out!

levels.name: Infrananas
levels.creator: iIsane and more
levels.description: Rather well-received easier 1.9GDPS remake of Infrared with a tough ball maze in the middle

levels.name: Insomnia v2
levels.creator: Nox
levels.description: A buffed remake of Insomnia by Glittershroom that makes everything way harder, and adds a really awkward UFO dual.

levels.name: Kerusakan
levels.creator: MYKM
levels.description: Crazy effect level where you can just mash buttons and be totally fine. Some very difficult wave parts splashed throughout the level.

levels.name: LAN Party
levels.creator: RyanAB
levels.description: Another relatively normal but still peak RyanAB creation, this one is especially wave carried even for one of his levels.

levels.name: LightShow
levels.creator: oleki
levels.description: Extremely fast-paced medium length level, 40% of which is a relatively hard wave part.

levels.name: Line Apocalypse
levels.creator: HDJump
levels.description: Absolutely insane early 2.0 level with tons of moving objects, an absurdly difficult first half, a bossfight in the second half, etc... There is simply no way to describe it, you have to see it to believe it.

levels.name: loving u is wrong
levels.creator: skywalker14 and 100foxes
levels.description: Who creamed all over my orange (timings with obscuring visuals)

levels.name: LUKOJE
levels.creator: gradientxd
levels.description: The first 60% is pretty easy to get through, however, the last 40% is a giant memory maze that is extremely tricky to figure out and lasts for a long time.

levels.name: Martian Invasion
levels.creator: Archibot and more
levels.description: AI generated collab where every single piece of gameplay and deco feels like it was grown in a lab. Watch out for that extremely scary jumpscare in the last dual and the brutal first 30%.

levels.name: MEMORY
levels.creator: BIANOX
levels.skillset: Read the name of the level
levels.description: The first of Bianox's dedicated memory trilogy, and by far the easiest. Formerly an Insane Demon for god knows why, the ending has some deceptively tricky timings involved, and a devious ending ship.

levels.name: MiracleFunk
levels.creator: Ggb0y
levels.description: Formerly one of the easiest Insane Demons, most notable for possibly starting the "split screens" trend in memory levels. Features a brutally hard ship for no reason.

levels.name: Mongadishu
levels.creator: SweetyDaniX
levels.description: Horrors Beyond The Comprehension Of Mankind (extremely easy first half followed by a bossfight using advanced follow triggers).

levels.name: Mordax
levels.creator: Star77
levels.description: Very raw level with some intense backgrounds at the drop. Too bad it takes like a full minute of predrop to get there.

levels.name: MyMisery
levels.creator: motheye
levels.description: Learny and awkward level with some strange hitboxes and a unique artstyle.

levels.name: Mystic Impact
levels.creator: Rabbitical
levels.description: Surprisingly well-aged 1.9 level with decorations that still look neat to this day, beware of a tight ship near the end.

levels.name: Nanoparticle
levels.creator: vonic
levels.description: Energetic and fast paced vonic solo that experiences some pretty difficult timings in some parts and takes the usual amount of time to learn by vonic's standards.

levels.name: Nirvana
levels.creator: PROTOMED1Z
levels.description: Extremely overdecorated level with gameplay matching the song to the point of spam, sometimes even surpassing the song in BPM.

levels.name: Nitronic Freedom
levels.creator: Rek3dge
levels.description: Very early 1.9 pioneer of effects that partly inspired Cataclysm along with Teatherd soul. Very janky and unfair in some parts.

levels.name: Ocellios
levels.creator: dolphe
levels.description: A Dolphe level that features a XenderGame inspired bossfights that continues the worldbuilding of the other Dolphe levels to come before it.

levels.name: Octagon Force
levels.creator: JamAttack
levels.description: A sequel type level to Hexagon Force. Most of the difficulty in this level comes from its dual parts. Definitely a good level to get a feel for Hard Demon difficulty duals.

levels.name: Paranormal
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha
levels.description: An old level that is undeserving of the dislikes it has. The first cube is easily the hardest part to learn, but the rest of the level is not nearly as difficult after that.

levels.name: periwinkle
levels.creator: SkiesCore
levels.description: Low key timing level with some unorthodox gameplay and a decently tricky wave part at the end.

levels.name: Pirate Afterparty
levels.creator: Vojin007 and more
levels.description: Black Flag if it was made in a crack den.

levels.name: polychromatic
levels.creator: goose
levels.description: Former MDL Top 1. The level is extremely learny and features the classic goose thing of everything moving at all times. Despite that, it's very consistent once learnt.

levels.name: Primordial Chamber
levels.creator: MeRlO CreatoR and xcy7
levels.description: Who's ready for the industrial revolution? Strange collab from late 1.9 that is severely carried by its cube and ship dual. It seems buggy at first, but the old adage of "not bugs, just timings" definitely applies here without sarcasm.

levels.name: Quasar
levels.creator: Allan
levels.description: A pretty well liked 2.0 Nine Circles level. The most notable things about it are that is has a memory ball, a weird fake or two in the wave, and a goofy cube and ship dual towards the end. Other than that it's a Nine Circles level.

levels.name: Radioactive
levels.creator: ViPriN and Hinds
levels.description: Classic for a good reason, it's fast-paced, intense, and a very well received trailblazer of the XL style of levels despite no longer being XL due to how level length measurements being changed.

levels.name: Redux
levels.creator: LinkTheGamer
levels.description: Short 1.9 map that makes up for its length by just having consistently really hard gameplay.

levels.name: Resurgence
levels.creator: Geom3zon
levels.description: 2.2 pixel level where the last 40% is a diabolical ending with tricky fast-paced timings and and a 180 degree rotation.

levels.name: Risk
levels.creator: creeperus
levels.description: Flashy level with lots of very unorthodox sync and some shockingly difficult timings. Mad Top Gun vibes from this one.

levels.name: Sacred Fire
levels.creator: CreatorAurum
levels.description: Essentially just Spacial Rift but worse, as it is insanely carried by bad transitions and poor gameplay choices. This was also rated 6 stars at one point.

levels.name: Selaphobia
levels.creator: PenguSit
levels.description: Raw as balls 2.0 level that was vaguely inspired by Cautious by DefThlow, and old impossible level.

levels.name: Serpents Shrine
levels.creator: LmAnubis
levels.description: Precursor to the infamous Serpents Wrath that is built entirely out of structures that look like snakes snakes and more snakes.

levels.name: Shackles
levels.creator: Cheeseguy, LuchioX
levels.description: Goofy early 2.1 level that is focused on it's difficult predr- wait what do you mean this isn't "early"? It came out WHEN????

levels.name: Shadow Monster
levels.creator: Riqirez
levels.description: Iconically bad early 2.0 level with an iconically 𝑒𝓋𝒾𝓁 Shadow Monster. Do this as a milestone demon or face my wrath.

levels.name: Shadow Temple
levels.creator: Michigun
levels.description: One of the many Temples that the late Michigun created back in 1.9. Contains a LOT of memory based gameplay as well as a lot of Michigun's timing based gameplay. The last jump at 89% is still actively killing hopes and dreams daily.

levels.name: shutup
levels.creator: NovaBean32
levels.description: 1.9GDPS reimagination of Shutdown by OliSW. The difficulty rises towards the second half

levels.name: SIMG Factorial 10
levels.creator: LunarSimg
levels.description: The end of the SIMG Factorial series. An overall nice albeit a bit outdated-looking 1.8 demon that has some clever fakes but is overall way less memory based than its 9 predecessors.

levels.name: SIMG Factorial 5
levels.creator: LunarSimg
levels.description: Doesn't really excel at being the hardest Factorial level, but definitely excels at being the most black. With almost 2/3rds of the level having a black background, there is of course, a shit ton of memory.

levels.name: SIMG Factorial 6
levels.creator: LunarSimg
levels.description: Why was this ever an Insane Demon? A very good level for it's time with some pretty creative fakes throughout the level but that drop ball part...

levels.name: Sine wavs
levels.creator: GREEN
levels.description: Dorami's Sine Wavs' irrelevant 2.0 cousin if it was green and made by GREEN. The majority of the level is just typical 2.0 Hard Demon nonsense (so hardly typical) but then it goes insane at the ending and turns into a total mess.

levels.name: SiriusX
levels.creator: Manix648
levels.description: Hard Demon remake of Sirius by Funnygame. The gameplay follows a the exact order as the original, but with changes here and there to spice things up.

levels.name: Snow v2
levels.creator: KeiAs
levels.description: Supremely festive 1.9 demon that remakes a superbly underrated 5 star. Super memory heavy in the first parts but calms down from the ship onwards. Has a nonsense ball click near the halfway mark.

levels.name: Solar Wind
levels.creator: willowrowan and more
levels.description: Nine Circles-like Hard Demon with flowy gameplay. Make sure to watch out for the slopes in the spider part since they can bug out if you hit them wrong.

levels.name: SoulStorm
levels.creator: MinAY and more
levels.description: One of the stranger megacollabs out there, with each part being the dead opposite of cohesive with the others and having tons of very questionable gameplay.

levels.name: Space Dance
levels.creator: Loltad
levels.description: A space themed Loltad level with a predrop that has several really strange and difficult timings. The rest of the level is pretty standard Loltad gameplay.

levels.name: Spaces Forgotten
levels.creator: Terraform
levels.description: Level with various different design styles such as the drop which is similar to flash's decoration style. There is a different ending that involves clicking some trigger orbs at 59.

levels.name: spwipi
levels.creator: Scrumpy, para and 13spades
levels.description: Sleek with pastel colors and cloudy atmosphere. Notable for the fast-paced corridor cube gameplay and for the unreasonable amount of remakes this has.

levels.name: star crush angel
levels.creator: gogBone
levels.description: Black and white level that starts out with a very easy cube for the first half before thrusting you into an epileptic part for the second half.

levels.name: starShip Showdown
levels.creator: GMDDEEPSPACE
levels.description: Stupid early 2.1 former Medium Demon with an extremely difficult ship section.

levels.name: Subterranean
levels.creator: goose, Andr03d, TheDevon
levels.description: In a similar fashion to it's prequel, Warhead, the predrop has some weird timings and oddly difficult to learn movements. Once you get to the drop the level then explodes into some intense but oddly satisfying moving object mayhem. Oil up Boy.

levels.name: SumPlusWorld
levels.creator: SumPlusWord
levels.description: Rare level where the creator decided to put whatever the hell came across their mind. Shoutout to Super Mario Bros. 3!

levels.name: Surrender
levels.creator: Hydrocynic
levels.description: Plays like a decorated challenge level, but not in the bad way you would expect. Due to its short length, the skill heavy gameplay is rather compressed, making a level that is only as low as it is because of said length.

levels.name: SW50ZXJzdGVsbGFy
levels.creator: Mazl and stardust1971
levels.description: Name is coded in base64, and translates to Interstellar as the title. Competent for its genre, but is riddled with timing and ship chokepoints.

levels.name: SWERVIN
levels.creator: calidaer
levels.description: Starts with a cube that gives you less than a second of reaction time for the first 10%. It has a headache inducing second half that is super flashy, making it difficult to learn.

levels.name: Temple of Time
levels.creator: DavJT
levels.description: Created as a tribute to Michigun after his passing, featuring the 6 temple levels in short parts for the levels runtime. ΔΔΔ

levels.name: TENTEN
levels.creator: shawm and more
levels.description: 1.9GDPS megacollab which took 3 years to complete. Has some nasty chokepoints and a long credits ship part which extends it to XL length

levels.name: Terminal Void
levels.creator: Aquatias
levels.description: Was known for being one of the widely considered easiest HDLs until it fell into the legacy list. Yes, this was on the HDL.

levels.name: The Bad Day
levels.creator: Yoruonomi
levels.description: A diet version of Edict's The Badland which is a diet version of LazerBlitz's Spacelocked combined with a diet version of the Fabrication maze which is a diet version of the Betrayal of Fate maze. Zero Sugar Demon.

levels.name: The Big Black
levels.creator: alexANDgame
levels.description: Former thought to be impossible level from early 1.9 that was originally considered to be harder than Cataclysm. Was built to look much harder than it is and was carried to the ILL by it's intimidation factor and rather uncanny vibes.

levels.name: The Missed Call
levels.creator: RaffaDaKing, eMastres, and Unbipentium
levels.description: Your average beginner Hard Demon except it has a long Insane Demon ship towards the end that really tests your patience if you aren't prepared. Massive skill check.

levels.name: The New Phonics
levels.creator: Tronzeki
levels.description: Early 2.0 level with strange memory gameplay and a part with numbers in the background but the the words and letters the title refers to. deadbush wrote this description and it makes no sense

levels.name: The Yatagarasu
levels.creator: Manix648
levels.description: A poorly optimized Manix level that was controversial for using stolen assets. The whole level is memory thanks to all of the moving objects and three bossfights.

levels.name: Theory of Insomnia
levels.creator: Dorami
levels.description: The 2nd level in Dorami’s Theory series, this level switches between memory gameplay and skill based gameplay multiple times.

levels.name: ThermoDynamix
levels.creator: flash
levels.description: A nerfed version of Akron by crohn44. Shame on you, Flash, for such blatant plagiarism >:(

levels.name: timeless dawn
levels.creator: sscyt
levels.description: Interesting and short 1.9 GDPS level that has a chokeable ending, has some hard wave and ship parts too.

levels.name: ToE II v2
levels.creator: IIINePtunEIII
levels.description: The most difficult of the NeptunE v2 levels. It's basically just ToE 2 but harder, except the 80% ship which will likely be easier.

levels.name: Toxin Lab IV
levels.creator: Xaro
levels.description: Well received last installment of the famous Toxin Lab series, that starts off really strong in the drop but, just like the song, gets significantly less cool in the drop.

levels.name: Triangle Out
levels.creator: MaJackO
levels.description: Aside from the extremely obviously hard ship section at 64%, the rest of the level suffers from having numerous extremely awkward UFO sections, fairly innocuous chokepoints, and just general old MaJackO weirdness.

levels.name: Twin Valley
levels.creator: Gouns and more
levels.description: Early 2.1 megacollab with an iconically weird song and a jakerz part at the end that is as learny as you would expect. Fun fact: The publisher of this level used to be called BloodStorm GD, but changed their name to... Gouns.

levels.name: Twisted Fantasy
levels.creator: ToastLord
levels.description: Well-received ToastLord creation, overall sync-based and learny, have fun with the dual.

levels.name: TWO
levels.creator: skungang
levels.description: Pretty authentically early-mid 2.1, even down to the Azazal song. Has some rough wave sections.

levels.name: Veteris Iniuria
levels.creator: Vral
levels.description: Intense ass Opila Bird bossfight with a lot of wacky duals and absurdly jank inputs that uses the 2.1 features for some rather strange contraptions that add nothing to the level besides being funny.

levels.name: Warhead
levels.creator: goose and more
levels.description: Late 2.0 collab with a lot of moving object abuse, but not in the bad way. Very consistent and intense drop parts make up the bulk of the difficulty.

levels.name: WFLYTD
levels.creator: Tinraz and ivyteal
levels.description: Very fast-paced mostly red level focused entirely on representing its ridiculously intense song. Has a lot of sync-based timings and a very chokable wave at the end.

levels.name: Wolfram alpha
levels.creator: Twoots and Watis
levels.description: From what you may have learned to expect from Twoots, this is actually rather uninteresting. Especially for 2.0 standards. Consists of a lot of long high CPS click consistency parts, and sometimes a timing as well.

levels.name: WONDERPOP
levels.creator: TriStorm
levels.description: Unique and colorful TriStorm level with a signature modern style. Second half uses a lot of wacky effects and 3D making it a bit learny.

levels.name: YOQUIERO
levels.creator: vrymer
levels.description: Vrymer level with a vibrant color scheme and abstract effects. Has a 2 player part at the end that can be a little disorienting.

levels.name: Zaphkiel
levels.creator: SincejastlrXD
levels.description: A 2.1 level that has a custom 2.2 backwards part and is based off of the angel Zaphkiel, not the extreme.

levels.name: 1326C
levels.creator: mordroc7 and TheRealXFuture
levels.description: An extremely hot level with some nice sync, cool duals, and weird quirky gameplay. Also has a bossfight in it for no clear reason and then it just kinda leaves.

levels.name: A Farbidi Christmas
levels.creator: TMco
levels.description: "Geometrical Dominator but jolly as fuck". Features a very questionable beginning and a lot of tight robot gameplay.

levels.name: Amethyst Valley
levels.creator: fufafac
levels.description: Yet another overdecorated level with extremely learny gameplay, featuring a lesser known Camellia song.

levels.name: Another Cataclysm
levels.creator: Findexi, Minesap, and Tygrysek
levels.description: Basically another nerfed remake of Cataclysm. The level does feature two insane duals in addition to the usual, as well as a true MLG pro skillz moment in the end.

levels.name: Arcturus
levels.creator: Team Proxima
levels.description: Laggy Team Proxima collab featuring various noteworthy creators. Starts slow but once it drops it remains fast and learny with some sudden transitions to boot.

levels.name: Astronaut 13
levels.creator: Minesap
levels.description: A gray Nine Circles level which is much more frontloaded than the others that were made in the trend.

levels.name: Bass Lab
levels.creator: bloodshot
levels.description: A strange amalgamation of deco from Toxin Lab mixed with the gameplay from the mastermind behind Bass Cave. The cutscene at 90% is extremely emotional and should win an Oscar for best picture.

levels.name: BassRift
levels.creator: Unbipentium and Hynaedon
levels.description: Average Unbipentium level with weird structuring. Basically a nerfed Subsystem Scramble.

levels.name: Betelgeuse
levels.creator: Team Proxima
levels.description: Visually appealing and learny biohazard-styled level. Also a rare EVW verification.

levels.name: Blood Temple
levels.creator: Spectex
levels.description: The first half is pretty much 5 clicks total. If it's that easy and chillax in the beginning, and it's this high up, just draw your own conclusion as to what happens later.

levels.name: Bloom
levels.creator: fhewi
levels.description: Backloaded WOOGI-inspired level that was a "McInsane" for a while. Generally well received.

levels.name: Blue Impact
levels.creator: Mulpan and more
levels.description: Solid level with fast paced, skillbased gameplay and some weird dua-what the fuck is that orb chain.

levels.name: Breaking Point
levels.creator: Helpegasus and more
levels.description: Quite atypical for a LazerBlitzstyle, with space themed backgrounds and only a singular very short dual the entire way through. Still manages to be very learny.

levels.name: Broken Reality
levels.creator: Tsuzuito and ORte
levels.description: The bulk of the difficulty is the ship part it opens with, the rest is a decent, albeit laggy flow level with a somewhat broken dual near the end.

levels.name: Brutal Velocity
levels.creator: Rob Buck
levels.description: Classic Rob Buck level with lots of memory and lots of inputs that are somehow difficult despite being buffers.

levels.name: Burnout
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha
levels.description: Fire themed 2.0 Zenthic level. The deco certainly shows its age, but the gameplay still holds up in spite of some weird transitions.

levels.name: C h l o e
levels.creator: Wod
levels.description: Dedicated to Wod's pet cat Chloe that sadly passed on. Has weird skill based gameplay and a very difficult dual.

levels.name: Cataclysmic drive
levels.creator: TheRealArtee
levels.description: Another nerfed shitty Cataclysm to join the growing Horde.

levels.name: Chaotic Hell
levels.creator: MrSaturnuz
levels.description: 1.9 hell themed demon carried by some difficult timings toward the start and oodles of fakes.

levels.name: Chaoz Airflow
levels.creator: Juffin
levels.description: Fast memory level that is entirely carried by the first dual. Be aware of the last orb in the blue portal.

levels.name: Charcoal
levels.creator: OliSW
levels.description: Industrial memory level that uses its unique theming and structuring to craft some very creative fakes.

levels.name: Comodence
levels.creator: Fridge
levels.description: 2.0 memory level that manages to be quite brutal despite the slow speed for the majority. Has some especially annoying ship parts with invisible gravity changes.

levels.name: Conchetumare X
levels.creator: Nacho21
levels.description: Early 2.1 level with some very experimental gameplay for the time and simple deco, as such it's aged super well. Despite this, the level is still very cruel by edging you with coins you can't get through the whole level.

levels.name: cosr
levels.creator: llertt
levels.description: Early 2.2 to the core, weird, angled timings, sudden side switches, camera controls and those wonderful new ship physics!

levels.name: CP Machine
levels.creator: pla and more
levels.description: Atmospheric remake of Pain Elemental that gets a large difficulty spike of awkward sections in the second half. Please refer to this as Creator Point Machine on Discord to avoid being banned.

levels.name: CraZy
levels.creator: DavJT
levels.description: The foremost in the CraZy series themed around circuses: Legendary intro ship and a notoriously difficult ending. Huge inspiration to many weird circus and clown levels.

levels.name: Critical Core
levels.creator: RedPed
levels.description: Very clear ripoff of the Manix/LazerBlitz style. Has a lot of concerningly awkward transitions with very little reaction time given.

levels.name: CryoTherapy
levels.creator: ellninja
levels.description: Obscure level with a "cold" color scheme and an absolutely bonkers cube dual halfway through and a chokable wave after.

levels.name: Crystal Blizzard
levels.creator: Loltad
levels.description: Another level in the older Loltad style, this one being heavily focused on timings more than anyhting else and being lightly Black Blizzard inspired.

levels.name: Crystal Temple
levels.creator: BGames and TheKris
levels.description: One of the weirder Temple spinoffs, this time with an absolutely atrocious UFO and first cube that carry almost the entirety of the difficulty.

levels.name: Curse Calling
levels.creator: Minesap
levels.description: 1.9 Minesap creation, as such its a mix of fast memory as well as skill gameplay.

levels.name: Cyber Abyss
levels.creator: Flex
levels.description: Level that uses a rather unusual choice of song for some rather nefarious ship and wave parts and a random insane difficulty spike of a black orb (you'll know it when you see it).

levels.name: Cybernetic Showdown
levels.creator: Tongii
levels.description: Sequel to that one level in the demon gauntlet, majority of the gameplay is rehashed but made much more difficult. Peaks with two brutal ship parts.

levels.name: Dance Massacre
levels.creator: Hinds
levels.description: Super popular Hinds level (of course) with a slightly unconventional UFO and completely brutal robot part. Watch out for the last ship.

levels.name: DarkSide
levels.creator: xExvill and more
levels.description: SIGMA HELL FLOW GAMEPLAY SFXSHOTS TO ENJOY 2.2 TO (very learny phonk hell level).

levels.name: Deadlocked V2
levels.creator: Nik Gambardella
levels.description: Slightly crusty Deadlocked remake that takes a lot of liberties with its gameplay composition, as well as having the hard parts not be where you'd expect them to be.

levels.name: Demonic Burst
levels.creator: Venomite
levels.description: The beginning is UBER DEMON and after that its that classic pretty chill 1.9-updated-2.0 memory gameplay. First jump is absolutely ludicrous. Used to have 2 unique routes but the one up above the level got blocked off :(

levels.name: Desert Temple
levels.creator: Michigun, Venomite, and The Bil
levels.description: The only Michigun temple level to not actually be made by him. Instead agents of chaos Venomite and The Bil, made it and gave it to Michigun to verify and upload to his account. Follows the style of the other levels in the series quite faithfully.

levels.name: Devoid
levels.creator: Hdow
levels.description: Incredibly first half heavy with some absurd ship control and wave gaps, as well as a sort of learny asymmetrical dual.

levels.name: Diabolical Error
levels.creator: Flukester
levels.description: Insanely raw early 2.1 level formely known as Danque, before it was deleted and reuploaded for unknown reasons. Has a lot of goofy early 2.1isms and spammy gameplay, with a rude ending to bat.

levels.name: DIE BVVVH
levels.creator: Unnamedboy, Stamina, and Lyal
levels.description: Wod 1.9 CC entry heavily inspired by Hinds. It placed 3rd, which isn't bad

levels.name: Divine Descendance
levels.creator: TroxxP1
levels.description: A bastard child of Kyrie Eleison and Ouroboros that is even laggier than both of them. This time there's three different coin routes in which you fight a divine dragon, one of which buffs the second half if you toggle a black orb. Beware of the invisible spike at 83.

levels.name: Dog of Wisdom 2
levels.creator: DrallumGC and more
levels.description: 2.0 megacollab where most creators made fairly normal and well balanced parts, except for RadiationV2 who woke up on the wrong side of the bed and decided to put a microclick at the very end of the level.

levels.name: Doomsday II
levels.creator: IIINePtunEIII
levels.description: The 2nd and last official doomsday level, has a lot of memory and was one of the first well-known levels to use the mini-block mini-cube memory you see in like every single memory level.

levels.name: Driproom
levels.creator: softable
levels.description: Utterly unhinged memory demon with copious amounts of meme references and a TABLE BOSSFIGHT?????? WEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEED YEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE

levels.name: DubStep
levels.creator: CreatorRC
levels.description: Bizarre clubstep remake where all the memory makes no sense whatsoever and every fake has a second layer of fakeness. It's horrifyingly well crafted to be the way it is.

levels.name: Earthquake
levels.creator: crackmiklox and more
levels.description: Stupid Spanish GD Forums-built update sandwich with a recent tab ending and a messed up ball section at 30 that contains a really strict frame perfect.

levels.name: Eternelle Vehemence
levels.creator: vrymer
levels.description: Nearly six minutes long with several different decoration styles and a very controversial song. npesta owns this level!

levels.name: ETOH
levels.creator: 100foxes
levels.description: Quirky neodesign level (as you'd expect from 100foxes). Consists of some unorthodox timing gameplay, as well as a pretty challenging dual.

levels.name: Evolution
levels.creator: Spectex
levels.description: Chaotic but polished early 2.1 level with a lot of moving scenery, vertical-focused gameplay, and very difficult coins.

levels.name: Extinguish
levels.creator: Squizaaard
levels.description: Rather boring predrop before throwing you into annoying 4x-speed timings with the spider, UFO, and robot.

levels.name: Fairydust
levels.creator: MKComic
levels.description: The second ever Nine Circles level, and a step-up from the original in difficulty. A short pre-drop and a tough beginning wave, but it gradually gets easier.

levels.name: Fearless
levels.creator: Xplosives22
levels.description: 2.0-2.1 update sandwich with a lot of generic albeit serviceable tropes from the era, including a VERY 2017 song and a long string of just-functional-enough duals.

levels.name: Fennec Fox
levels.creator: NinKaz
levels.description: Super INFLATION Demon. This level is overall pretty solid, except for some annoying anti-orb skip mechanism and a randomised wave pattern.

levels.name: Flashy
levels.creator: Azuvy
levels.description: Basically just an easier version of Energizer but with more mediocre decoration, featuring flow gameplay and a couple of bugs.

levels.name: Foxtrox
levels.creator: TheFakeLogik
levels.description: Very fast paced level with vibrant colours. Invisible portals jumpscare you and crazy movements all-around; hallmark of 2.0's golden age.

levels.name: Geometrical Insanity
levels.creator: TheDevon
levels.description: Pretty much just Geometrical Dominator v2, doesnt really try anything new and a lot of the memory is easy and predictable except for the dark part.

levels.name: Headrush
levels.creator: Toxic GD
levels.description: Famously the only NC level that Riot didn't beat (before Sonic Wave got verified). Got updated sometime in 2.1 and in order to bugfix it in 2.2, Toxic decided to revert it to the 1.9 version. Absolute genius.

levels.name: heyyeh
levels.creator: Szilu
levels.description: Old school design level with 2.2 features. Difficulty spikes at the wave near the end.

levels.name: Horror maze
levels.description: A poorly made 1.5 level containing a literal secret way that skips like 30% of the level. It's just not good.

levels.name: Ice hell escape
levels.creator: Minemario
levels.description: Weird cryptid of a memory demon that was updated in 1.9 to include many epic features.

levels.name: Inexistence
levels.creator: Fynzyme
levels.description: One of the stranger 2.0 demons. This level doesn't feel real, from the gameplay to the decoration and even the song. I guess it fits the name, sorta.

levels.name: insidious step
levels.creator: noobas
levels.description: Clubstep remake with a red-blue color scheme. Features the first proper usage of the dual ship gravity change mechanic, as well as one of the first swingcopters in a rated level. 9/14/2024 Never Forget 🪦💻

levels.name: Insomnia
levels.creator: MattMrn
levels.description: 1.9 level mostly carried by an insane ship in the predrop, but has some other tough timing intensive parts as well.

levels.name: Japan Modern Thing
levels.creator: GrenadeofTacos and SigRp
levels.description: Very well-themed 1.9GDPS duo collab spanning over 3.5 minutes. Contains some brutal waves and an incomprehensible ending

levels.name: Jawbreaker
levels.creator: ViPriN and TriAxis
levels.description: Very nice looking 1.9 Hard Demon with some solid design choices for both gameplay and decoration, until the infamous ViPriN UFO shows up to stretch its legs at the end.

levels.name: Lambda
levels.creator: Tchotchke
levels.description: Remake of BBosom3's 19zz effect layout which is mostly just adding background and block design while overhauling a few parts from the original entirely. Just like the original, the dual assaults your eyes with 4 different cubes to look at.

levels.name: LastLocked
levels.creator: NASHII
levels.description: NASHII level with NASHII balancing verified by Dorami that loosely resembles Deadlocked. Carried by a bunch of random scattered timings, mostly robot jumps and ship swoops.

levels.name: Lunatic Nightmares
levels.creator: SigRp
levels.description: Features some very concentrated difficulty to compensate for its shorter length. Has a habit of making timings that require prior setup.

levels.name: MasterLocked
levels.creator: ML500
levels.description: Very polished Deadlocked remake where ML500 shows off a little. Features an extremely hard quote before the cave section.

levels.name: Mechanic Megaforce
levels.creator: TecHNeT
levels.description: 1.9 memory that was responsibly updated in 2.0. Most of the difficulty is concentrated in the first 30%. I like cyan fudge, do you?

levels.name: Mechanical Bits
levels.creator: URean
levels.description: Unhinged 2.0 level with lots of clever memory and surprisingly well received gameplay.

levels.name: Mehdi
levels.creator: Carminius
levels.description: A different looking Nine Circles level filled to the brim with awkward wave gameplay and weird balancing.

levels.name: Metal Shock III
levels.creator: SMBlacktime
levels.description: One of the most levels ever, containing a lot of moving object based memory and a bossfight against, of all things, dancing sawblades.

levels.name: Moire
levels.creator: Astrala
levels.description: A failed attempt at making an 8*. Takes advantage of a lot of 2.2 mechanics and decoration consuming a lot of device power.

levels.name: Monody Caverns
levels.creator: iDarkBy11 and TrueCopa
levels.description: Old 2.0 Insane Demon that used to be extremely buggy before recently getting a fix that nerfed the level down to Hard Demon. Very well received by modern players.

levels.name: MoonStone
levels.creator: chipzz and Matterz
levels.description: CuluC if he was a good creator. One of the funniest rates. Silly design level mixed with silly art and silly movements. Belongs in the Louvre.

levels.name: Neonbreak
levels.creator: Zelda9912
levels.description: 1.9-made 2.0-updated Korean Map with lots of Fast Tap and Tricky Memorize.

levels.name: Nocolor
levels.creator: DoliaX
levels.description: Slightly weird new-age solo with bouncy gameplay and a slight difficulty spike near the end. Has color despite the name, fuck this bitchass creator for betraying our trust. Cancelled.

levels.name: ObamA RebirtH
levels.creator: DanZmen
levels.description: Very unbalanced level with a 6 star predrop and an impossible dual input at 73.

levels.name: Obscurum
levels.creator: Bryan1150
levels.description: Ultimate Zobros Mix.

levels.name: Pain Elemental
levels.creator: Loogiah and Pennutoh
levels.description: Well known Loogiah level that focuses on your ship capability, particularly in the second half.

levels.name: Phantom
levels.creator: MalZir
levels.description: Odd 2.0 level that is known for its sheercliff chokepoints, especially its infamous frame perfect ball input near the start that properly filters out casual players.

levels.name: Phantoms Manor
levels.creator: ViPriN, LmAnubis, and Panman
levels.description: Haunted house themed 2.0 level with annoying transitions and some tough timings.

levels.name: Prickly Pear
levels.creator: Vapen, Failure444, and Marwec
levels.description: Quality glow design level with Marwec's iconic gameplay, sadly there's no cactus in the level.

levels.name: PUBLIC RESTROOM
levels.creator: benches
levels.description: Extremely laggy hell and heaven themed level that sets out to portray the experience of using a public restroom. A lot of the gameplay is very janky and unwieldy, with many sudden chokepoints.

levels.name: Puzzlemania
levels.creator: Shig
levels.description: Formerly one of the easiest Insane Demons in the game, this level is pretty creative with its gimmicks, although some of the sections can feel a bit random at times.

levels.name: Rain Hell
levels.creator: SwagzZilla and more
levels.description: Infamous 1.9 megacollab with some of the weirdest gameplay structuring ever and very epileptic wave effects.

levels.name: Rainbow Future
levels.creator: dhk2725
levels.description: A fast paced 1.9 level featuring a lot of mirror portal gameplay and an insane dual, which makes this level quite hard to learn.

levels.name: RAMRungkader
levels.creator: MystikMan
levels.description: 2.2 level heavily inspired by JonathanGD's Rambreaker, even containing the imfamous RNG orbs from it, although, toned down.

levels.name: Reduxien
levels.creator: Rustle and Erdyuri
levels.description: Ugly 2.0 collab where the name of the level is somehow misspelled in-level. Despite that, it is surprisingly functional (mostly).

levels.name: Rising Storm
levels.creator: xSkylighter
levels.description: Plays like Thinking Space but green and somehow even more awesome. We do not tolerate Anti-Rising-Stormites here.

levels.name: ROADRUNNER
levels.creator: SophPaprika
levels.description: Wacky gameplay that is fast and learny, plus several transitions can feel unfair or give little reaction time.

levels.name: sandstorm
levels.creator: VEALT
levels.description: Extremely frontloaded level that looks like a sandstorm. Who could have guessed? Has some quirky moments with various gizmos and doohickeys.

levels.name: scissors
levels.creator: 2003devin
levels.description: 2003Devin's goal of a full dual level being executed on. Surprisingly lacks some of Devin's well known gimmicks, but doesnt lack in contemporary art pieces strewn about.

levels.name: Sedulous
levels.creator: Samifying
levels.description: Visually impressive solo built over the course of three and a half years, stunning the mainstream GD community. Until people realized that spending a lot of time just adding more and more bright glow doesn't actually make a level all that good.

levels.name: SHOWDOWN
levels.creator: Manix648
levels.description: Raw 2.0 level that seriously deviates from the normal Manix playbook with a lot of effects and little to no block design. Contains a lot of teleportals and abrupt transitions.

levels.name: silhouette
levels.creator: Wolfkami and AirForce
levels.description: Edgy 2.0 level with a symmetrical dual that really hates remaining symmetrical.

levels.name: slope inc
levels.creator: DoliaX
levels.description: Welcome to the incorporation of slopes... Industry-themed level with basically slope gameplay as the name suggests, surprisingly functional.

levels.name: Snap to Grid
levels.creator: universedevon
levels.description: Former hardest Medium Demon. Awkward timings and corridors with classic universedevon spike shapes.

levels.name: Space Invaders
levels.creator: DeeperSpace, Manix648, and LazerBlitz
levels.description: The poster child for early 2.2. Complete with lots of camera controls, shaders, and the new swing. Due to all of this, the level is quite learny.

levels.name: Spacelocked
levels.creator: LazerBlitz
levels.description: LazerBlitz classic with a lot of transitions that dont really like to work sometimes.

levels.name: Spaghetti Slide
levels.creator: Namtar and JerkRat
levels.description: 1.9 level that's fairly high-quality for its time. Fast-paced and colourful for the most part, and has a pretty chokeable cube part near the end with a couple of near-blind orb timings.

levels.name: sparked magenta
levels.creator: QuazeryIceCube
levels.description: The middle third of the level is a very strange and learny swing, flanked by much easier cube parts on both sides. As with any Quazery level, there are many possible paths

levels.name: Sparks Fury
levels.creator: noobas
levels.description: Another member of the classic noobas roster. This one being the one with the extremely vertical opening of a memory cube that played a major role in the inspiration of Ozpectro, followed by the ship that I promise is more doable than it looks.

levels.name: Spectroscopy
levels.creator: Crafactor
levels.description: Pretty average design level with functional gameplay and a couple minor difficulty spikes mixed in, especially the very goofy wave gameplay at the end.

levels.name: Stardust Pillar
levels.creator: Minesap
levels.description: Terraria inspired demon featuring some asymmetrically designed duals and atypical gameplay structuring à la Minesap.

levels.name: Starlight Storm
levels.creator: BibbyDib111
levels.description: Very dynamic rainbow effect level with a dark color theme and constantly changing scenery. The gameplay starts a little awkward but gets very consistent very fast.

levels.name: Stellar Sands
levels.creator: RavingRafters and more
levels.description: Every Wave-Carried player's nightmare. A Swing only level with three parts. A claustrophobic slow first section, a dual lower-gravity middle section, and a chaotic high-speed finale with many orb timings.

levels.name: Swiftness
levels.creator: diamondstorm
levels.description: A complete spamfest for most of the level with some ship and wave control near the start and end. Please play FLEETING RACE instead.

levels.name: Taken
levels.creator: Hinds and AeonAir
levels.description: Disqualified Zobros 1.6 CC entry and a collab with AeonAir of all people. Backloaded, although definitely consistent

levels.name: TECHnos II
levels.creator: stubbypinata
levels.description: High CPS version of TECHnos except there's no bossfights and theres an insanely spammy dual at the end, as if the level wasn't spammy enough.

levels.name: Templarium
levels.creator: kira9999
levels.description: Memory level known for winning Wod's 1.9 CC. Fun and balanced gameplay, except for a UFO part at the start. Pays gentle homage to vismuth's masterpiece "pandemonium" (which is on this sheet too) through small decorations.

levels.name: The Caverns
levels.creator: Pasiblitz
levels.description: Classic cave themed early 1.9 level that introduced some iconic dual contraptions such as the fabled shipcopter.

levels.name: The Divine Chord
levels.creator: 569Zilla and unne
levels.description: Extremely chill level set to a song by The Avalanches. the gameplay is quite strange and very learny, but still well synced.

levels.name: The X Files
levels.creator: MAYEROSA
levels.description: Bizarre and gimmicky XXL with some strange design choices and excellent decoration. Has both a custom swing and a real swing for some reason. Can you guess what its themed around?

levels.name: Tiger
levels.creator: Alkatraz
levels.description: 🐯SPINNING TIGER FACE🐯 2.0 effect showcase level with basically no block decoration and everything you would expect from a level this old.

levels.name: To Tango
levels.creator: illybwoy, Viot, pocke
levels.description: Two player level entirely made up of rhythm based duals, with the difficulty ramping up significantly in the second half.

levels.name: Toxic Starnight
levels.creator: DreamZoneGD
levels.description: Extremely detailed and very learny 1.9 GDPS level, with some of the best decoration you'll see coming out of there. Has a very strange dual, as well as a lot of fast-paced gamemode changes.

levels.name: twist the knife
levels.creator: wless
levels.description: Rainbow demon with some slightly offsync clicksync and a finnicky last dual. Watch out for the transitions.

levels.name: Two Invisible Eyes
levels.creator: Elisione
levels.description: Early 2.1 level with a difficulty at the wave at 80% that changes size frequently.

levels.name: U L T R A  W I D E
levels.creator: J27Blaze
levels.skillset: S H I P , W A V E
levels.description: W I T H E V E N M O R E S P A C E T H A N I T S P R E D E C E S S O R . A L S O V E R Y S K I L L B A S E D .

levels.name: Ultra Drivers
levels.creator: LazerBlitz
levels.description: Super popular LazerBlitz demon known for it's learny duals and mean last wave blip at the very end.

levels.name: Unique Girl
levels.creator: Omar2010
levels.description: Questionable xxl level with jank gameplay and deco that looks straight out of 2.0. This released in 2021. Like if you are unique and a girl.

levels.name: Voidluto
levels.creator: iIsane and Flex
levels.description: Fast-paced level that's entirely clicksync, with some pretty challenging duals and a NEFARIOUS straightfly at the end of the drop.

levels.name: widder
levels.creator: 2003devin
levels.description: Pretty much exactly what you would expect from Devin. Features all of his ice-block gimmicks, detailed art, and random text. Difficulty is concentrated in a dual at the end.

levels.name: will ferrell
levels.creator: Elisione
levels.description: Trippy and psychedelic Nine Circles level where a lot of the difficulty is packed into the first 10%. Uses a very unique song made by the creator.

levels.name: windige welten
levels.creator: sauerbraten
levels.description: Odd level that cycles through different gimmicks between parts mostly using orbs, culminating in a bossfight with some misleading indicators. Has a very unique hand drawn style. Coin requires you to do 3SH at the start.

levels.name: Zap
levels.creator: Darwin
levels.description: Enter a distinctive level centered on the theme of electricity! Zap features coin routes that take you to various different spots in the level!

levels.name: Animatronics II
levels.creator: FlacoGD
levels.description: AWWWWWWWWW YEAHHHHHHHH! Older bossfight level with some iconic designs and a weirdly hard wave spam towards the end.

levels.name: Arbuz
levels.creator: oleki and kreno
levels.description: Erebus remake themed around watermelons. Life is peculiar sometimes.

levels.name: Astronaut 14
levels.creator: SirZaiss
levels.description: A remake of Mindsap's Astronaut 13. The pre-drop has been known to stump some. However, the main star here is the 4x speed wave parts that contain several fakes. Very easy on the eyes for a Nine Circles level.

levels.name: Back on Mountain
levels.creator: MaJackO
levels.description: Formerly legendary impossible level that got nerfed and received a decoration update to make it actually possible. It is notable for having a ton of that classic MaJackO nonsense timing gameplay.

levels.name: BEATDEMON
levels.creator: YoReid
levels.description: HA HA HA... Another product of YoReid's ingenious take on retro and video game themed design, finally putting him in the spotlight of as one of the best creators. The bossfight comes with an option of a guide line (no coin though).

levels.name: big  daddy
levels.creator: DeadVoxelx
levels.description: Takes a lot of inspiration from old 2.0 effect levels, primarily FunnyGame.

levels.name: Big Blast
levels.creator: Alex084
levels.description: Rather unhinged 2.0 memory level where much of the difficulty comes from suddenly moving structures or invisible structures altogether.

levels.name: blast processing co
levels.creator: RobTopArchiver/durianhead
levels.description: Weird level in the copy series that is entirely carried by a janky wave and a shockingly tight release timing at 78%.

levels.name: BlitzVortex
levels.creator: Wolfkami and LazerBlitz
levels.description: The embodiment of the average scuffed LazerBlitz collab 2.0 Hard Demon. Has a really funky dual at the end and lots of invisible portals.

levels.name: Breakthrough
levels.creator: Hinds
levels.description: Classic former top 20 from super early 1.9 that is notable for its fast paced memory gameplay, iconic wave segments, and a very technical ball part in the middle.

levels.name: Broken Circles
levels.creator: Stutes and Abyssinia
levels.description: Balengu Vortex reminiscent Nine Circles level with a lot of portal clicks and some janky gameplay, also features an asshole blind click

levels.name: BUZ BAM
levels.creator: PentuGD
levels.description: Generic 2.2 timing level that was randomly buffed to confirm its placement on the Hard Demon List. Later got reverted after the creator was confronted about adding a CBF blocker that kills you when you don't have CBF (yes really).

levels.name: Candy Cane
levels.creator: Dartling
levels.skillset: High CPS, On kill: A small health pack is dropped
levels.description: A fast-paced, high CPS, retro-themed level with an unnecessarily hard ending. The only thing that relates to candy canes is the effortless large candy cane as the endscreen. I'M ALIVE!!!

levels.name: Carbon Faze
levels.creator: Rob Buck and TriAxis
levels.description: Another janky Rob Buck level with an awkward dual and ball corridor right at the very end.

levels.name: Careless
levels.creator: goose
levels.description: The most epic and energetic of all goose levels, this one being paired with multiple ridiculous Exploring Space inspired waves.

levels.name: CARMINE
levels.creator: DOMIANGELI and more
levels.description: Fairly chill red and orange megacollab based off a layout by para. Has some weird difficulty spikes and a strange ending cube part that has the spikes move toward the player.

levels.name: Celestial Dimension
levels.creator: Anya21
levels.description: Learny flow level with some odd, sometimes dependant timings, remains very fast paced as soon as it drops.

levels.name: Celestial Inertia
levels.creator: ZzStriker and more
levels.description: Standard purple flow level where all the difficulty comes from trying to get consistent at the random difficulty spike from 60-80%.

levels.name: Collision
levels.creator: Psynapse and DreamEater
levels.description: Rated wave challenge.

levels.name: Color Flashin
levels.creator: Sycro
levels.description: Colorful level with a crazy dual and bossfight. Has some blind transitions during the first half but is still well received.

levels.name: Common Loon
levels.creator: Wyntaee
levels.description: Strange timing gameplay paired with unique decoration ideas, as you'd expect from wyntaee. Represents the titular song by Xiu Xiu very well

levels.name: Conclusion
levels.creator: Giron and Codex
levels.description: Old 1.9 Giron level that has its entire difficulty carried by one absurdly difficult ship part at the start of the drop.

levels.name: Corruption
levels.creator: G4lvatron
levels.description: Ancient G4lvatron level with some fire designs (literally) and a part that goes almost completely blind at 65%

levels.name: Crimson Cavern
levels.creator: willy5000
levels.description: Obscure HDL Legacy level that is surprisingly well received by the very few people whove beaten it. Scringly dual at the drop.

levels.name: Crystal of Miracle
levels.creator: WOOGI1411
levels.description: Very old WOOGI level featuring plenty of clicksync and a very lazy ending (probably due to the object limit of the time). Once had a rated dupe in the form of a Raszagal level that had been updated to it for whatever reason.

levels.name: Crystal Splash
levels.creator: TrueParadoxTeam
levels.description: Extremely frontloaded Russian flow megacollab with very little coherence of deco and gameplay styles. These people would somehow go on to create Frozen Cave and no jokes.

levels.name: Dark Disco
levels.creator: Jeyzor
levels.description: Crazy dual with interweaving players! Don't worry, you can skip the whole thing. Chill *disco* atmosphere meets classic 1.9 design.

levels.name: Deadly ClubStep
levels.creator: IIINePtunEIII
levels.description: A brutal remake of Clubstep that was thought to be impossible until LunarSimg beat it. Lots of memorization, very tricky ship sections, and one extremely difficult ball in the middle.

levels.name: DeCone
levels.creator: Pennutoh and GrenadeofTacos
levels.description: Another DeCode remake thing for DeCode day, this one is most notable for the last cube being randomised with four possible sections, none of which being particularly sight-readable so good luck!!!!

levels.name: Dim Distorsionada
levels.creator: IDegelI
levels.description: This shit is not dim. 1 bajillion object level that blasts your eyes with the concentrated power of gays and an “infinite” ship section.

levels.name: Dimensional Chaos
levels.creator: TMNGaming
levels.description: Hyper unbalanced eyesore with some of the weirdest cube and ball gameplay (early 2.0 art levels in a nutshell)

levels.name: Discord
levels.creator: Hdow
levels.description: Surprisingly normal early 2.0 level with some difficult ship maneuvers and decently learny timings.

levels.name: Dizzy Spell
levels.creator: BridgetTheCroco
levels.description: Strange level with unsettling vibes and a very stupid mini cube that takes forever to learn. In it's defense, it does give you ample warning of what's to come.

levels.name: Eden Decision
levels.creator: Stamina and AngryBoy0644
levels.description: Black and grey level where there's very little going on until you're thrown into a weird dual at 67%.

levels.name: EFEU
levels.creator: kreno
levels.description: Heavily sync-based level with lots of tricky ship maneuvering, a learny UFO part and a punishing ending.

levels.name: Effulgent
levels.creator: AlbachungusGD
levels.description: Long colourful level that comes with a dual difficulty spike at 49% that drops immediately afterwards. I feel like I've seen this one before...

levels.name: Emfialomeni Entropia
levels.creator: Unbipentium, Hinds, and An Gyung
levels.description: Hinds styled collab that """supposedly""" happens to feature Hinds himself built entirely out of annoying wave chokepoints. Sports one of the worst transitions in a Hard Demon at 89%.

levels.name: Encroachment
levels.creator: MrLorenzo
levels.description: Shambolic-esque level with lightning quick gameplay, some crappy transitions, and a drop transition that startled the shit out of the people who had just pressed play again after laughing at the titlecard.

levels.name: End of the Circles
levels.creator: Serponge
levels.description: A very strange level by Serponge. Contains a really difficult ship part in the middle and two tricky wave sections, with a fun chokepoint gap in the first. Also the boss at the end is annoying.

levels.name: Experiment 204
levels.creator: HHyper
levels.description: April fools HDL weekly demon 2023. It's so laggy, please my grandma has arthritis she can't handle this

levels.name: Feels
levels.creator: RyanAB
levels.description: Feature the classic RyanAB jank gameplay. The first 50% is filled with several absurd chokepoints, but after 50%, the level gets significantly easier. Abuses shakes like it's nobody's business.

levels.name: Fiesta
levels.creator: Kavle
levels.description: Modern style timing level that progressively gets harder and jankier. Don't let that beginning lure you in or you'll be in for a rough time!

levels.name: Flaklypa
levels.creator: Insendium
levels.description: Fairly easy and slightly annoying level... until you get to 73%, where you are thrown into a super janky dual part.

levels.name: FlashFunk
levels.creator: Djoxy
levels.description: The most tangible manifestation of early 2.1 as a concept we have yet seen. Features Richter-breaking shake triggers, memeable text, and duals that are guaranteed to make you double take or your money back.

levels.name: Fnafbass
levels.creator: Fawxu, Farting, and ThatKai
levels.description: A message from the beloved Fnafbass creator Fawxu: Take based mode Boy (Nine Circles level that spawned from a random inside joke in vc and somehow saw itself all the way to completion. Kinda unbalanced).

levels.name: Forests Of Sherwood
levels.creator: DysprosiaX
levels.description: Duel the knight Boy. Extremely well aged 2.0 level with some crazy good medieval theming and some batshit insane coins.

levels.name: Forest Temple
levels.creator: Michigun
levels.description: Widely regarded as the hardest temple level in the series, consisting of a tough predrop, followed by a fucky wave and more fucky gp afterwards.

levels.name: Formula X
levels.creator: Havok
levels.description: Tem un flinq meu no flo. 10%.

levels.name: Forsaken Crypts
levels.creator: Dr4c0z184 and Trusta
levels.description: Features a very finicky dual, many awkward transitions and a 60hz frame perfect at 80%.

levels.name: Fresh Fruit Festival
levels.creator: Twisterdude161 and more
levels.description: The most refreshing frutiger aero level in this catalogue. Tastes like fast-paced and learny.

levels.name: From the Future
levels.creator: Jo2000
levels.description: This was likely the hardest dual in the entire game at the time of its creation. There is no learning this dual or a click pattern, you just gotta KNOW.

levels.name: FROST SPIRE
levels.creator: Cirtrax and more
levels.description: Jank ice themed flow megacollab with a bunch of awkward timings and a big middle difficulty spike.

levels.name: Futuristic Road
levels.creator: MaxiS9 and Ares
levels.description: Late and well polished 1.9 level with a lot of smaller memory moments, and a harder ship in the middle, and a tricky first and last memory cubes.

levels.name: Galactic
levels.creator: Mazl and GDSpeed
levels.description: Speed and Mazl duo collab, difficulty comprises mostly of ship bursts with some high CPS moments.

levels.name: Galactic Blackout
levels.creator: Black0ut
levels.description: Abomination unloved and forgotten by God.

levels.name: Gaster
levels.creator: EternaswipVMAX
levels.description: Abomination but we love it. The black swan of the famous Undertale series, featuring extremely unorthodox memory gameplay and just generally an alien level.

levels.name: Generic
levels.creator: Metalface221
levels.description: Purposefully generic-looking level with a pretty brutal ship near the end.

levels.name: gimmix
levels.creator: RatQuesadilla
levels.description: The color palette of each of the 5 parts refers to the orbs that are used. Overall chill level with a nightmare-difficulty ending ship.

levels.name: gleam
levels.creator: StarMiki and OasiZ
levels.description: Slightly janky but overall far more on the hinge than other iNubble creations. This one taking the form of a pretty standard design level with skill based gameplay.

levels.name: Glitch Goblin
levels.creator: iNubble
levels.description: Far more standard and sequitur level than you would usually expect from iNubble, this one just being a fairly standard design level with fast paced and skill focused gameplay.

levels.name: Gloomy City
levels.creator: BlackCat
levels.description: Gimmicky black and white chokepoint heavy memory level, with multiple pathways for a few parts. Be ready to die a lot at the first UFO.

levels.name: Gloomy Purgatory
levels.creator: Deadly Sins
levels.description: An Acropolis rip-off from 2.0 that has some really stupid timings at the start but becomes much easier after the first ball part.

levels.name: Gocus
levels.creator: Ficelo
levels.description: Highly skill based level that used to be an Insane Demon before it got a balance update that made it not terrible anymore.

levels.name: good morning
levels.creator: iNubble
levels.description: Bright n' Silly n' Goofy n' Havin' a fun' time :) Very similar to 4uck in style and gameplay, with difficult wave and dual segments!

levels.name: Hallownest
levels.creator: xMrFinlandx
levels.description: Hollow Knight themed level where you fight the Radiance except the attacks require a quick reaction time including homing spike balls. Has a stressful ending where you traverse the abyss and embrace the void.

levels.name: Hellaven II
levels.creator: Clasi
levels.description: Memory level which starts off with some ship fakes that the player needs to memorize, before the difficulty randomly spikes at the start of the dual at 35%, which then gradually depletes from here.

levels.name: Hydrarion
levels.creator: Boosh72 and more
levels.description: Early 2.1 collab with a Super Cool Dual around half way through and a couple scary choke points in the last quarter. HUZZAH!

levels.name: hydrocarbon
levels.creator: Uistreel
levels.description: Former 9 star that got correctly changed to demon. The duals of this level are the highlight and they can be rather tough to figure out. If you are too cool for that, the last coin let's you skip the last dual.

levels.name: HyperDimension
levels.creator: ChaSe
levels.description: Gimmicky level made by ChaSe that uses two player. You start out collecting coins to earn attacks to kill a boss later on. There is also a symmetrical two player dual at the end. This level can feel janky at times.

levels.name: HYPERMANIA
levels.creator: Para
levels.description: Sequel/remake/remaster? of RatQuesadilla's Mania, which para also made the gameplay of; the parallels in gameplay are obvious. Neo-modern futuristic designs paired with extreme colorful flashes. Beware the unorthodox last ship.

levels.name: Insidious
levels.creator: TD Epic
levels.description: Much like Jeopardous vs Emperors, TD Epic tried to copy someone's homework and thought that adding a bunch of typos would throw the teacher off. This time it's ripping off polychromatic, but admittedly it does a few more things different this time.

levels.name: Kitty
levels.creator: f3lixsram and Darwin
levels.description: Hinds styled level with tight ship and wave parts coupled with an annoying spam section at 60%, Was also the first ever weekly demon before quickly being replaced for being too hard.

levels.name: Lazer City II
levels.creator: M3nhHu3 and RayOriens
levels.description: Monsterous abomination of a 2.0 level with a bunch of actually really creative gimmicks involving reflecting lasers off mirrors and a weirdly high amount of clicksync. Too bad the first half works about as well as a paper clip works as a car jack.

levels.name: Lightning
levels.creator: RyanAB
levels.description: Possibly RyanAB's most normal level, but that doesn't mean its not peak. Features a difficulty spike in the dual at the start of the drop and some blind timings for good measure.

levels.name: lily of the valley
levels.creator: cerufiffy
levels.description: This level is like a Buzzfeed quiz: Based on the way you do the ship, we can tell you what The Office character you are!!! If you skip all the orbs, you're Todd.

levels.name: Luciferian
levels.creator: Emadeus
levels.description: Egrigously badass early 2.1 level that leans into it's hell-like theme in a way unlike any levels that came before or after. Entirely slow timing gameplay with an intimidating wave at the end.

levels.name: Mechanic
levels.creator: KeiAs
levels.description: Bizarre early 2.1 KeiAs level that has a freakishly high PPC (portals per click).

levels.name: miami car trip
levels.creator: OliXor and Rowanm
levels.description: Psychadelic vaporwave, soft and soothing on the eyes. Other than the memory cube at the start, every platform consists of the 1 by 2 slope. Orbs tend to be weirdly timed.

levels.name: Milk Party Redux
levels.creator: nasgubb
levels.description: Early 2.0 level with random theming and some In The Dick chokepoints.

levels.name: Mind Control
levels.creator: Lalter
levels.description: Ancient 1.9 level with some very stereotypical and dated effects. Has some annoying bits such as the UFO halfway in and the dual wave near the end.

levels.name: MIRAI Harbinger
levels.creator: FreeedTheDolfin
levels.description: Strange tech-themed level filled with buggy brief gimmick sections that look bizarre. The last part isn't that hard you literally just click when you need to bro

levels.name: MULTIVERSE
levels.creator: jiseop and more
levels.description: Korean flow level themed around the lack fo a theme. Every part is in a different style in both gameplay and decoration, the idea being that you are jumping between universes hence the name. Extremely well received for a flow level.

levels.name: Nano Lights
levels.creator: NateFH
levels.description: Generally well liked vibrant level with fast paced gameplay, has a very mean spider part and a nerve wracking ending.

levels.name: Nexus
levels.creator: stardust1971 and Giron
levels.description: Early 2.0 levle that is an absolute manifestion of all the stereotypes of the time in the best way possible, plus a Crackdown-style wave part that is blatantly unbalanced.

levels.name: NIE
levels.creator: Deciduous
levels.description: Very atmosphere slow timing level. Interesting every part has jump indicators, include the psuedo-memory ending cube.

levels.name: NOEM
levels.creator: Cloud72 and more
levels.description: Extremely unbalanced megacollab where all the difficulty is centered around the predrop and duals. Thankfully bears no relation to Kristi Noem.

levels.name: OUTBY16
levels.creator: wokecat and OliXor
levels.description: Bright level that stays true to its song by using very repetitive and spam based gameplay throughout the entire level. Replaces one of Waterflame's best songs because fuck you.

levels.name: Overclock
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha and more
levels.description: In classic late 2.0 collab fashion, Goose and Rustam made special appearances and created parts that are far too brutal for the rest of the level. Goose's part also frequently breaks in practice mode.

levels.name: owen is she ii
levels.creator: ljisl
levels.description: Level themed around the popular Touhou character Remilia Scarlet that ends at 83%.

levels.name: Paracosm XII
levels.creator: RheaSilvia
levels.description: Among the least balanced levels in the entire game. The beginning is legitimate Extreme Demon gameplay and absurd jank, while the drop is a buffed Nine Circles XII wave.

levels.name: Patatrak
levels.creator: DextrinE and more
levels.description: Apocalyptic wasteland themed collab with unconventional UFOs and difficult balls.

levels.name: PIXEL LOVE
levels.creator: Insidee
levels.description: Fast paced and extremely flashy timing level, being mostly cube with one ball part.

levels.name: Popsicle
levels.creator: Usermatt18, ViP3r, and EnZore
levels.description: Upbeat demon that represents the better half of the early 2.1 community. Has some difficulty shoved into the middle with an awkward cube part.

levels.name: POWER GRID
levels.creator: atPorcelain and The Goola
levels.description: Sync-based level with very satisfying gameplay. The first ship is a major roadblock, but it gets consistent eventually.

levels.name: Promethium
levels.creator: cyanog3n
levels.description: 4x speed dual jumpscare in a bossfight at the end with strangely incomprehensible indicators.

levels.name: Psicho Forest
levels.description: A 1.8 level entirely composed of bushes, filled with chokepoints and very difficult ship sections. Mainly known for both having the worst spelling of Psycho of all time, and the KrmaL showcase having sub-potato quality.

levels.name: PSYCHOTROPIC
levels.creator: DataGhost
levels.description: A visually captivating ballad of loneliness and vice akin to Martin Scorsese's Taxi Driver. Starts off easy, until you are confronted with the biggest fever dream of a dual at 53%.

levels.name: Python
levels.creator: joojmiguel and more
levels.description: Early 2.1 flow megacollab with a gargantuan difficulty spike at the 60% mark, where the parts become immensely learny and are immediately forgotten if you go back even a couple checkpoints.

levels.name: Rapture Poetry
levels.creator: BridgetTheCroco
levels.description: One of Bridget's older levels. Has some broken gameplay throughout along with a really hard ship at the very end. R.I.P

levels.name: Reduction
levels.creator: hiavl
levels.description: 2.1 remake of Malfunction by Haru that keeps the level's uniqueness intact, as well as making it incredibly frontloaded.

levels.name: Refreshery
levels.creator: Dawnf4ll
levels.description: More standard Freshery remake, this one turning it into a simple glow level with clever fakes.

levels.name: rhythmic machine
levels.creator: pg1004
levels.description: Nonsensical learny Korean thing from the stone age. Pretty nonsequitur gameplay, especially the confusing duals and the weird ship where you just hold a bunch.

levels.name: Ring Trick
levels.creator: Zoroa
levels.description: Experimental Nine Circles level from the same creator contest that starred tipo B, very long and gimmicky predrop, with a downright cruel last click.

levels.name: Ronald Goes To McDon
levels.creator: GDSkele
levels.description: Two number 9s, a number 9 large. A number 6 with extra dip. A number 7, two number 45s, one with cheese, and a large soda. Has a long memory part followed by a long dual part and a song that doesn't quit twerking.

levels.name: Ruined Galaxy
levels.creator: Vapen
levels.description: Raw 2.0 level that makes a lot more use of sync than it's contemporaries, plus some wacky UFO clicks.

levels.name: Second Science
levels.creator: CoolCreeper
levels.description: Creative science theming, unfortunately, or hilariously, the sciencey gimmicks are not made so well. Good luck trying to figure out how the last part works.

levels.name: severe head injury
levels.creator: Trifoon
levels.description: Fast paced timing level themed around braining yourself on the underside of as many blocks as possible. Hard hats advised.

levels.name: shambler
levels.creator: Loogiah
levels.description: Fairy Dynamix when no za.

levels.name: Shining Caverns
levels.creator: Brandonlarkin and ZepherGD
levels.description: Weird 2.0 demon that is heavily skewed towards the absurdly difficult ship part and one of the strangest dual ships you'll ever see.

levels.name: SHRED THE BONE
levels.creator: OuhNo
levels.description: 2.2 level with a ridiculously hard offset dual at the drop that carries the level to Hard Demon. Somehow took like 7 mod sends to get demoted.

levels.name: Silhouette
levels.creator: Havok
levels.description: One of the harder NC's from 1.9, known for its weird balancing. Lots of portal position choke points, difficult wave gaps, and an absurdly easy dual wave in the middle that lasts for a very long time.

levels.name: sky Rush
levels.creator: kaacu
levels.description: Fucking petrifying. Horrendously buggy 1.9 GDPS level with a frightening slope cube section towards the end.

levels.name: SkyLine
levels.creator: Loogiah and more
levels.description: The first Italian megacollab! Starts off strong by not only getting their flag backwards at the end (😭) but also has a lot of very awkward chokepoints, especially leaning towards the outer thirds. Basically 1.9 Pijatelo.

levels.name: Sokudo
levels.creator: harris7n
levels.description: Essentially just an 8 star with a super difficult dual on the end.

levels.name: Sparkling Hope
levels.creator: Vadi
levels.description: Another Vadi clicksync level, this time being a glowy Nine Circles level with a repetitive predrop and awkward second wave.

levels.name: SPYTY III
levels.creator: NekronVoid
levels.description: Reminiscent of JonathanGD's levels, this comes with a dual difficulty spike at 56% that drops immediately afterwards. Essentially JonathanGD but better.

levels.name: Stabber
levels.creator: DesTicY
levels.description: Chokepoint after chokepoint after chokepoint after chokepoint. Theres like 15 chokepoints. Besides that the level is a fun albeit awkward fast-paced gauntlet of late 1.9 skillbased gameplay.

levels.name: Stormshard
levels.creator: Kelleyxp and more
levels.description: See "Astreans" and "Adrenaline Chamber". The most modern and visually polished of the three Artificial Ascent jerkoffs, but still suffers from most of the same gameplay issues that plague anything that level touches.

levels.name: TEBBtBE
levels.creator: cw2003 GB
levels.description: Short for "The Early Bird Begets the Bone Election". A surreal level where you mess with celestial beings and deal with election fraud. It's as absurdist as you can get.

levels.name: The Bridge
levels.creator: T3mpl4te
levels.description: Odd old thing with some esoteric structuring and minimalist decoration. +2000 aura

levels.name: The Eschaton
levels.creator: Xender Game
levels.description: A nearly five minute long level that features not one but five Xender Game bossfights. A lot of time will need to be spent learning the bosses, but the rest is just nerve control after that.

levels.name: The GClub
levels.creator: TG GBoy
levels.description: Clubstep remake from Gboy's old account with ICDX-like ships, memory parts filled with jank timings, awful balancing, and one of the most evil UFO setups known to man.

levels.name: The Nebula II
levels.creator: arcGMD
levels.description: Extremely laggy early 2.1 level with raw decoration but unfortunately dreadful gameplay. Most of the level consists of awkward timings and transitions that make you wonder if this was hack verified.

levels.name: The Purgatory
levels.creator: whitepythor
levels.description: Above average 2.0 level with a janky dual in the middle.

levels.name: The Theory
levels.creator: JustBasic and GDLev
levels.description: Pretty generic spam based HDL legacy level most notable for the really stupid ending wave corridor.

levels.name: The Vigor
levels.creator: NASHII
levels.description: Funny NASHII level infamous for its sudden transitions and very awkward robots.

levels.name: Theory of FirePower
levels.creator: Dorami
levels.description: 1.9 memory level that has gone through several different versions of varying quality and difficulty throughout its history. The current version leaves it in this mess of blind timings, jank transitions and a few bugs to top it off.

levels.name: Theory of WOOGI
levels.creator: Any guesses?
levels.description: Very early WOOGI level where you can start to see his classic style develop. Has a couple waves that look harder than they are, plus some ships and a last jump that are actually pretty tough.

levels.name: THEVOICESARECOMING
levels.creator: Robanana
levels.description: Red phonk shaderspam with a luckily extremely powerful LDM. Known for its awkward and generally hostile gameplay.

levels.name: TOE III
levels.creator: CrisanGD
levels.description: Your average Theory of Everything 2 remake. It's mostly standard v2-type gameplay but there's enough uniqueness in it to make it stand out from Neptune's.

levels.name: Ton Neru
levels.creator: Instinct01
levels.description: Odd effect level that takes place in a three block wide tunnel for the majority of it. Unlike Three blocks wide, there was actually an attempt at a fun level here, but it is still unfortunately rather awkward. The LDM also impacts this level a lot and is recommended.

levels.name: Translucent
levels.creator: Yakimaru
levels.description: Quality glow design level made in early 2019 featuring intense ship parts.

levels.name: Underwater
levels.creator: MoVavi and more
levels.description: Underwater themed flow level with high cps clicksync based gameplay. The levels difficulty mostly comes from learning, with the dual in particular being difficult to figure out. They had no reason to go that hard on the endscreen.

levels.name: Vega
levels.creator: Velocci and more
levels.description: Late 1.9 level that was uploaded illegitimately with the obscure but iconic Silent Club skip. As expected from an illegitamate verification, it's hard to say it's well balanced

levels.name: Vile
levels.creator: Wav
levels.description: Dark and gritty colors paired with a calm song. Quite hard timings, though the last wave composes most of its difficulty.

levels.name: Walkman
levels.creator: JamAttack
levels.description: Fast paced JamAttack solo with a green color scheme and some basic albeit clean gameplay that peaks at a very climactic ship part. Unfortunately has a 2.2 bug at 7% where the transition randomly kills you occasionally.

levels.name: Where Flowers Lead
levels.creator: Snoozzzing
levels.description: Very calm and slow-paced memory level, loosely themed to nature. First half is mostly timings and a wave with little flowers indicating where to go, while the ending ship and ufo are entire mazes.

levels.name: Windy Circles
levels.creator: KeiAs
levels.description: Rainbow Nine Circles level that is very well balanced and known for a very funny secret way.

levels.name: WRAP
levels.creator: Swagmasta001, EndLevel, and DarkCacti
levels.description: spit

levels.name: screamroom
levels.creator: GMD Condor
levels.description: "It's all timing. If I can get it 9 times out of 10 it's bug free." GMD Condor, 2015.

levels.name: 8E8E6
levels.creator: cynir
levels.description: A vaguely computer-themed level from late 2.1 that makes some pretty cool-looking gameplay choices. The balancing is largely dependent on your skillset

levels.name: Acid Ruins
levels.creator: DreamEater and Riqirez
