levels.description: Regular "late to the party" 1.9 Hard Demon until about 79% where the difficulty takes a massive jump. The last 5% wave is luck based as well which can be very frustrating.

levels.name: Acidulus 8
levels.creator: 14Circles
levels.description: Hidden gem that snagged a very fortunate fossil rate. One of the rare 2.0 effect levels that doesn't spam color and move triggers. The gameplay has a noticeable uptick in difficulty around 40%.

levels.name: Action
levels.creator: MarshMarlow and more
levels.description: A remake of Motion by TamaN that stays true to the original level. Tons more moving objects and flashing lights, along with some of the cleanest transitions. Very intense gameplay all the way through.

levels.name: Agon
levels.creator: Glittershroom
levels.description: This level is not very long at all, yet it feels the weight of 5 minutes as each part slowly goes from manageable into a nailbiting dungeon crawl through awkward chokepoints every 6 or so seconds.

levels.name: Altair
levels.creator: ViPriN and more
levels.description: Popular blue ViPriN megacollab with MAJOR sandwich balancing, leaning towards the beginning and especially the ending.

levels.name: AMELANCHIER
levels.creator: surveyor23
levels.description: A long, extremely well received atmospheric journey with some absolutely mind-blowing effects and a very difficult coin.

levels.name: Anarchy Road
levels.creator: Komatic5
levels.description: Early 2.2 level that uses too many shaders and sound effects. Turn on the LDM options for the sake of all that is good.

levels.name: Arcanum
levels.creator: Legacy
levels.description: Weird cryptid of a level that got an update in 2.0 to just be even weirder. Each part takes shifts in being the "hard part" throughout the experience.

levels.name: Armageddon
levels.creator: Hakkou
levels.description: Quick as lightning 1.9 level with a UFO that acts more like a puzzle than anything else.

levels.name: ascension to walmart
levels.creator: vayulena
levels.description: Its jank gameplay may teach you a lesson; never purchase a level from Walmart.

levels.name: Backstreet Boy
levels.creator: LudiumGD
levels.description: 2.2 timing level with sluggish and poorly structured timings strewn about.

levels.name: Badland
levels.creator: TamaN
levels.description: By far TamaN's hardest level. Stays true to their typical gameplay style albeit with trickier timings, learnier gameplay and a bossfight towards the middle.

levels.name: Brightest Melody
levels.creator: iITNCIi
levels.description: TNC megacollab with various colorful glow styles and bright themed parts near the end. Not to be confused with Hunter Nightmares.

levels.name: BSOD
levels.creator: Yakimaru
levels.description: Tech-themed level with an absurdly difficult dual near the end, and yeah that quadruple spikes.

levels.name: C1u6
levels.creator: nabbbbbb and more and more and more and more
levels.description: Those "Build Your Clubstep Monster" recent tab levels but 1.6 private server and actually finished. Top 5 most pointless levels ever.

levels.name: Cake By The Ocean
levels.creator: Kampos and more
levels.description: Flow level built with the popular song of the same name that took several months after it was verified to get rated. Has some hard timings sprinkled throughout but massively spikes in difficulty with the last wave part at 83%.

levels.name: Chaoz Implosion
levels.creator: Elvii and more
levels.description: Overall poorly executed flow level that apparently takes inspiration from Chaoz Impact, but this is only reflected in 1, debatably 2 parts. It's just got weird and unwieldy gameplay that leaves many mouths soured.

levels.name: Cheeto
levels.creator: Giron and EVAD3
levels.description: Short 2.0 collab where the song ends before the levels even done. In classic Giron fashion, theres a part thats far harder than the rest. This time it's a rather tight dual ship at the end.

levels.name: Chrono Sanctuary
levels.creator: Deevoo and Pan
levels.description: Fast paced 2.0 level with very skill based gameplay that will test all of your skills including a dual at the end the functions surprisingly well.

levels.name: Cloud Nine
levels.creator: Aurora123
levels.description: Bright and happy level with some clicks that are guaranteed to make you exclaim "thats a timing?????".

levels.name: CPU
levels.creator: James and more
levels.description: Tech-themed modern stage with a breakcore song. Last ship is way harder than the rest of the level.

levels.name: Crimson Chamber
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha
levels.description: Used to be notorious for having a super hard dual at 60%, but was recently nerfed by 2.2. June 29th 2015-December 19th 2023. Despite all that, it still barely functions.

levels.name: CRUNCHDOWN
levels.creator: Cynir
levels.description: Fast paced timing level with a big ending difficulty spike. Creator really wants you to believe its not like ATOMIC CANNON, but you know better, don't you?

levels.name: Cryo
levels.creator: We4therMan
levels.description: Relatively short timing-heavy level with most of it's difficulty concentrated into the first 20%, as well as the dual at 50% which just about works.

levels.name: Cyber Illusion
levels.creator: Al3xTitan
levels.description: Extremely weird core-style level with a hint of jakerz and an extreme difficulty spike in the last 30%, where the level devolves into a bunch if awkward and inconsistent cube timings.

levels.name: Dark Incantation
levels.creator: Wav
levels.description: Poorly received demon that would be way better if it didn't have the cube flicker between our world and the ethereal plane every other frame. This extends into the already difficult wave chokepoints, which just serves to make a frustrating experience.

levels.name: Dark Realm
levels.creator: stardust1971
levels.description: The epitome of early 2.0, with crazy moving objects, funny coins, memeable text, and an insane dual composed of two mini cubes.

levels.name: Deadbeat
levels.creator: Darwin
levels.description: An all-rounder type level. Most notable sections are some tricky ship parts, wacky/blind transitions, and a memory ball at the end.

levels.name: DeCodeX
levels.creator: Rek3dge
levels.description: Self remake of DeCode in 2.0 thats been heavily buffed from the original. Has a coin inside a block in the first part that's completely invisible.

levels.name: demonic clubstep
levels.creator: CreatorChess
levels.description: A 1.8 Clubstep remake uploaded in early 1.9. Ludicrously difficult to learn with the amount of fakes it has in every single section.

levels.name: Devour
levels.creator: Avelinz and more
levels.description: Massive staple of the HDL, being infamous for its super luck-based and spammy dual at 55%. Has a very nasty first cube and last robot.

levels.name: Dissonance
levels.creator: Hdow
levels.description: Hardest of the Hdow collection, this one having a lot of skill-heavy timings and a predrop that never stops being difficult.

levels.name: Dr Raszagal Pheonix
levels.creator: Raszagal
levels.description: Gas station version of Theory of FirePower. Lots of memory sections, hardly functioning duals, and a strange contraption of sorts at the end.

levels.name: Droppy
levels.creator: TeamNoX
levels.description: Extremely frontloaded circus themed XL flow megacollab with a goofy sounding song. Do NOT research Droppy girl.

levels.name: Dryin Out
levels.creator: Annon
levels.description: 2.2 memory level which, like Annon's other memory levels, takes inspiration from pre 1.9 memory levels. Uses some wacky camera controls as well.

levels.name: earth shatter
levels.creator: Devilmine
levels.description: The classic 1.9 styled level made in 2.1, complete with some polished, skill based gameplay and clicksync drop parts.

levels.name: Ebony
levels.creator: UlasP
levels.description: Somehow one of the more tame UlasP levels, this one featuring a short 2 player part.

levels.name: elo2
levels.creator: durainhead
levels.description: Only known work of legendary human micostaGD. This level pulsates like a heart. That's the only way I can describe it. Highly unconventional gameplay with a very hard coin.

levels.name: Emerald run
levels.creator: officialfreck and more
levels.description: Prophetically bad megacollab with downright ridiculous transitions that even terrorists think twice about before building. Practically every part will find new exciting ways to upset you.

levels.name: ESPER
levels.creator: Simwamwi
levels.description: Devin-styled level that gains a lot of difficulty at the drop with tricky wave sections and awkward timings.

levels.name: EuroChannel
levels.creator: CarnicoGG, Extrmol, and Gcevaltd
levels.description: 2.0 Hard Demon that's basically like an easier version of Demonic Bass. Steals a ton from Galatic Fragility and also just has the Fexty swingcopter inside of it.

levels.name: Eurodancer
levels.creator: Motu
levels.description: Plagiarism level recreation of Labnity where the first UFO is extremely awkward and insanely difficult.

levels.name: EUVECTOR
levels.creator: nathsad103
levels.description: Relaxing and intense Knots styled level with some difficult ball timings at the beginning and a wave at the drop that is a little bit learny.

levels.name: Evil Gameboy
levels.creator: Djman13 and more
levels.description: Hack verified megacollab with solid base gameplay that is completely obliterated by the sheer quantity of bugs.

levels.name: EVORSUS
levels.creator: Jamby (Anonymous)
levels.description: Harder 1.9PS remake of Ditched Machine where the true creator chose to be anonymous. I don't blame them, this level kinda sucks as it's infamously buggy and inconsistent.

levels.name: EVVK
levels.creator: Revontuli
levels.description: It's difficult to make gameplay this bad on purpose, let alone on accident. Contains some terrible timings, a boring predrop, and some of the worst spider gameplay ever made.

levels.name: Fallen Angel
levels.creator: MinAY
levels.description: Level that has 4 million downloads because a bunch of kids thought the level was actually tiny in length. Pretty claustrophobic level that has 2 spider clicks at 29 that are way harder than the rest of the level.

levels.name: Fearless
levels.creator: Psynapse
levels.description: Obnoxious early 2.1 level that crams teleportal aligners into all the transitions that don't need them, and none of the ones that do. You will frequently be sent down half a block out of nowhere, which contributes to this level's janky nature.

levels.name: Flirt Drive
levels.creator: hyp3rdemente
levels.description: 1.9 level that got an update to include some 2.0 stuff, like sudden moving structures, invisible orbs and portals, but despite those poor changes, its base gameplay isn't too terrible.

levels.name: FLORAL STROBE
levels.creator: ivyteal
levels.description: Greg beats to study too. Click sync heavy and very learny, consists mostly of short 2-3 click wave bursts.

levels.name: Freedom Travel
levels.creator: Nikuomi
levels.description: You know where the best place to put jank duals is? How about 4 minutes into a Hard Demon. Basically just distant cousins with Effulgent.

levels.name: glass eyes
levels.creator: Turbo868
levels.description: Slow paced atmospheric/timing level that uses a Radiohead song and gets significantly easier in the second half.

levels.name: GOLD RUSH
levels.creator: SportsCarz11 and more
levels.description: "Horrible level hosted by the worst person ever. Contains chokepoints. Where are they? Couldn’t tell you if I tried because everyone disagrees on their location." -SportsCarz11

levels.name: Handshake
levels.creator: Yuuchouze
levels.description: Long-awaited and incredibly well received 1.9GDPS solo. Has interesting and engaging gameplay to go along colorful and intricate designs

levels.name: Haywire
levels.creator: Mega0of
levels.description: One of the more original Hard Demon NC levels deco wise. Something unique is that the drop is more than just a wave section. About half the drop is general fast paced gameplay.

levels.name: Heat Haze
levels.creator: universedevon
levels.description: Did you like Snap to Grid? It's pretty similar, though with 2003devin ice block mechanics.

levels.name: Hunter Nightmares
levels.creator: iITNCIi
levels.description: TNC megacollab with various colorful glow styles and dark themed parts near the end. Not to be confused with Brightest Melody.

levels.name: Hyped Up
levels.creator: LordeQuacc and more
levels.description: Just your average 2.1 glow-flow megacollab. Despite how the gameplay looks, there is way less clicking than you think.

levels.name: HyPerTehnO
levels.creator: MeRlO Creator and more
levels.description: Fairly standard 1.9 megacollab featuring some strange dual parts. Among the list of notable creators there’s a guy named Kebab.

levels.name: Kasrat
levels.creator: Aqualime and Vornickon
levels.description: Joke level that's basically just a spam challenge. Has a random triple trial secret way far into the level.

levels.name: KaWa
levels.creator: HazukiClub
levels.description: Literally just baby tsuki but easier and has a randomised visual bug at 67%. Is extremely backloaded.

levels.name: KOSTOK mode
levels.creator: Kostok
levels.description: 2.2 RussianStep level with an ear bleeding song with some questionable timings at the drop.

levels.name: Laser Box
levels.creator: Pennutoh
levels.description: v liquid laser :v v Gimmicky Pennutoh level with some pseudo-memory gameplay and a stupid wave section at 48%. Also utilises the buggy dual ball physics in a surprisingly functional way.

levels.name: Lets Bounce
levels.creator: Pasiblitz
levels.description: 1.9 Pasiblitz level with some goofy balancing. Starts with a tricky memory part, really difficult duals, tight ships, and then all the difficulty drops with a few nasty chokepoints spread around.

levels.name: LOCK IN
levels.creator: sparktwo
levels.description: Minimalist design level with a mean first robot and some silly waves. Gets easier as it goes.

levels.name: Luminescent
levels.creator: SouljaBoyCrankD
levels.description: Take two IDL levels being Fishe and Atmosphere and blend them together into a single ungodly jank creation.

levels.name: Mario Judas
levels.creator: Woom and Kyhros
levels.description: Red and white medium length level with headache inducing visuals and gameplay. Does anyone know where Mario Judah is?

levels.name: Massacre
levels.creator: SirHadoken
levels.description: A memory level that reeks of early 2.0, with sudden moving objects, obscured memory wave gameplay, jank transitions, and an ending that's just wave spam for 10% of the level.

levels.name: Mastermind
levels.creator: Hinds
levels.description: Well know former insane demon with great designs, solid intensity, and an abundance of easier-to-learn memory for a high-end hard demon.

levels.name: Mechanical Torment
levels.creator: Aquatias, Terron, and herozombie80
levels.description: As the level lovingly dubs itself as, Mechanical Terronment is a late 2.0 demon that uses some "jerky" gameplay with a heavy emphasis on mirror portals. The ship and UFO part near the end is awkward and difficult to learn.

levels.name: mem
levels.creator: benissad
levels.description: Memory (duh) level filled to the brim with difficult timings in multiple gamemodes. The memory is much easier to learn than executing the timings, but it's still no pushover.

levels.name: Necrofantasia
levels.creator: Mulpan and more
levels.description: Korean flow esque collab that's very learny due to its fast gameplay, features one of the rare Acid Notation songs that isn't extremely loud. Touhou banger alert.

levels.name: Neds World
levels.creator: TheLasaga, Zyl, and fredjones
levels.description: Walmart 1.9 private server level that has a lot of densely concentrated chokepoints in the first half that take the form of weird orb chains and awkward slope clicks.

levels.name: Neon Overdrive
levels.creator: Ggb0y and Giron
levels.description: 1.9 level with some genuinely impressive designs for the time. Very memory based, and the dual ball is not to be trifled with either.

levels.name: Nitronic Chaos
levels.creator: Rek3dge
levels.description: The last of Rek3dge's Nitro series, and is by far the hardest. Was very intimidating back in 1.9, but many of its features are ripoffs from other levels of its era, and it barely hangs together.

levels.name: Omicron
levels.creator: Vlacc
levels.description: Old 1.9 level that was randomly promoted to Insane Demon for years. The level itself has some very awkward and claustrophobic structuring making the wave and ship parts difficult in particular.

levels.name: overnight
levels.creator: sonyaBMW
levels.description: Former failed Extreme Demon that took the wave from biohazard and slapped some Hard Demon ship and UFO gameplay onto it. Post nerf its just a regular high end Hard Demon with tight ship parts.

levels.name: pandemonium
levels.creator: aurumble
levels.description: Forgotten classic 1.9 level with some advanced effects and designs, and helped vismuth realize his main account was inexplicably cursed.

levels.name: Pandoras Seal
levels.creator: RadiationV2 and more
levels.description: Short and fast speedbuild that really loves altering ship gravity.

levels.name: panic attack
levels.creator: loserchik67 and Xaro
levels.description: Strange rainbow level with some of the design choices of all time. Very epileptic and second half heavy. Also S H A K E T R I G G E R S

levels.name: Paradoxy
levels.creator: Kaito
levels.description: Really unique 2.0 level with some strange gameplay decisions, including an insanely weird ball dual at 70% that takes a long time to get used to.

levels.name: Plasma Dominator
levels.creator: PlasmaGD
levels.description: Geometrical Dominator remake that is surely more colorful than the original, requiring more base skills and memorization.

levels.name: Popcorn
levels.creator: Noriega and more
levels.description: 2.0 megacollab featuring gameplay that resembles modern flow gameplay, entirely carried by Goose and Noriega's parts at the very end of the level.

levels.name: Praxediant
levels.creator: MinAY
levels.description: The most early 2.1 level ever but it wasnt even early 2.1, but instead came out in the tail end. Hard carried by the wave at 40% and the ship at 65%. Watch out for that HIGH CPS PRAXEDIANT RHOMBUS BOSSFIGHT!!!

levels.name: Psychosis
levels.creator: Hinds
levels.description: Super popular 2.0 Hinds level that is notable for being one of the most common levels people do before their first Insane Demon. Features a lot of famously stressful and nerve-wracking gameplay.

levels.name: Pulsate
levels.creator: Phantomech
levels.description: Mysterious 2.0 level with a sharp learning curve and some difficult waves.

levels.name: Queerios
levels.creator: GrenadeofTacos
levels.description: 1.9 level with decoration based off of pride flags, including trans, pansexual, lesbian, and many more. The gameplay takes a sharp difficulty spike near the end with very awkward ship and timings.

levels.name: Recess
levels.creator: Sands
levels.description: Extremely stressful "1.9 themed" level that turns up the difficulty in the backend. Spends almost the entire level at 4x speed which makes the normally simple gameplay quite technical. Welcome to the longest 1 minute and 40 seconds.

levels.name: Regenerate
levels.creator: Espii and Ecli
levels.description: Freshery remake that starts as a 7 star and slowly ramps up into an omega learny last cube that most of the playtime will be devoted to.

levels.name: Regret
levels.creator: ViPriN
levels.description: Insanely front-loaded but great looking level from 1.9.Gets easier as it goes on, and includes some memory parts here and there with some harder than expected timings.

levels.name: Saguaro
levels.creator: Fury0313
levels.description: Violently strong skill check from a long-gone time when those still had merit. This churns out a well balanced and polished early 2.1 level with no blatantly buggy gameplay like so many of it's kin.

levels.name: Sanguine Wasteland
levels.creator: H108
levels.description: Atmospheric timing level that is slightly reminiscent of Loltad and gets really hard in the second half.

levels.name: scarred hands
levels.creator: Elisione
levels.description: Highly weirdcore level with tesselating Escher-esque structures and a warm almost-uniform color palette. The long dual segment takes some time to get used to.

levels.name: Scorched
levels.creator: equist and more
levels.description: Generic 2.1 megacollab with really bad transitions and some goofy bugs. Questionably learny with some awkward gameplay choices.

levels.name: SECLUSION
levels.creator: GretaThumberg
levels.description: Stupid jank 2.2 level with abused shaders here and there, especially the last jump which is basically blind. Hey at least it's relatively short.

levels.name: Shambolic
levels.creator: MrLorenzo, Nosef, and Roomen
levels.description: Early 2.1 collab that was one of the first ever weeklies until people complained it was way too hard, and they would be right. This level pulls no punches, particularly with the ship at 64% and the ending both being ridiculously hard.

levels.name: Sharp Road
levels.creator: pg1004
levels.description: Late 1.9 level that takes Windy Landscape and puts the pg1004 spin on it, and mixes in some pretty horrifying ball timings.

levels.name: Sky temple
levels.creator: TheFakeLogik
levels.description: Tribute to Michigun's temple series with a luck based wave-ball dual near the end of the level. Beware of the last click because it is EVIL.

levels.name: Slime
levels.creator: Sillow
levels.description: Just a regular ass Sillow level.

levels.name: Sneering Woods
levels.creator: Lp44
levels.description: Weird level that has a deceptively difficult first half with awkward timings and awkward waves. Then get through a Wobbling Machine x Hard Machine spam part and it becomes a brain melting nerve test.

levels.name: SoaP
levels.creator: IAteSoap
levels.description: PUBLIC RESTROOM but 1.9 and 1000x better. The ending parts are noticeably harder than the rest.

levels.name: sometimes
levels.creator: tenzk
levels.description: Gorgeously-decorated highcps clicksync level with an incredibly nerve-wracking ending. I told tenzk to nerf that wave. I mean, he did, but it's still That Wave.

levels.name: Spectrum Switch
levels.creator: Hinds and Vlacc
levels.description: Among the least popular Hinds demons, but is well regarded by many. Has fast paced gameplay with a good mix of wave and ship, but has a decent focus on timings throughout.

levels.name: Speed RaXer
levels.creator: BoyoftheCones and more
levels.description: Another joke level that starts at Speed Racer difficulty for the first 39% until you are thrown into a tight straightly. Everything after that point is designed to be absolutely horrible.

levels.name: Spilled Milk
levels.creator: ErisethSP
levels.description: Unhinged 2.0 level with a lot of colorful effects and an intense swingcopter bossfight.

levels.name: Steam Shakedown
levels.creator: xrimsonn
levels.description: A very frontloaded level with obnoxious timings riddled throughout the first parts. Gets much more chill at the "drop" of the song past the Congregation-esque mini cube jumps.

levels.name: Super Of Everything
levels.creator: Roadbose
levels.description: A super memory based 1.5 Hard Demon made by none other than ROADBOASE (yeah, ICDX guy). Contains a stupidly difficulty ball section near the 70% range and was most likely hack-verified.

levels.name: Supernova
levels.creator: Zanek184
levels.description: Unhinged 2.0 level with simple decoration and a ton of invisible memory.

levels.name: Sweet Dreams
levels.creator: TrueAspiral
levels.description: Horrendously balanced purple Nine Circles level which is completely carried by the start of the wave and the last 7% of the level.

levels.name: Sweet Summer
levels.creator: TheBlackHell
levels.description: Weebish memory level that primarily focuses on figuring out how to navigate sections with lots of moving orbs moving, which move in predictable patterns.

levels.name: System Rift
levels.creator: CreatorRC and OverZero
levels.description: There is allegedly gameplay in this level, maybe a spike or a saw, a block or two, but no one really remembers it.

levels.name: Techno Blast
levels.creator: Gryllex and AZuLer
levels.description: 1.6 themed level made in 2.0 that more or less invented a lot of the techniques seen in todays GDPS. Contains a weirdly high amount of gravity changes.

levels.name: Technokinetic
levels.creator: FastRefleksX
levels.description: Generic 2.1 level with extremely fragile gameplay, feels like every single gameplay object was accidently moved by a half block before upload.

levels.name: the Debug
levels.creator: NASHII
levels.description: Defunct NASHII level even by their already ocean floor standards. Nostalgia goggles can't save this one. At least the absolute goat GOOBERT is from here. Watch out for the 56% transition that is so utterly powerful at sniping attempts.

levels.name: Theory of OverTime
levels.creator: OverZero
levels.description: Fast and intense early 1.9 memory demon. The first cube and dual are EXTREMELY difficult and then the level slowly tapers off after that.

levels.name: Tileset NULL
levels.creator: RavingRafters
levels.description: Level inspire by popular indie game VVVVVV that contains a lot of difficult gameplay in the second half including a very awkward and learny wave part.

levels.name: tipo B
levels.creator: classic10
levels.description: BEHOLD! BEHOLD THE SKULL!! Weird, unbalanced, and EXTREMELY flashy nine circles level with an awkward and hard ship.

levels.name: Toxic Airflow
levels.creator: Surv, Edge, and Deceptivepan
levels.description: Old goofy lil 1.9 demone, difficulty is pretty much exclusively two parts, a tight dual ship and an extremely stupid UFO spam right at the end. Allegedly looks like an ear canal.

levels.name: TRIPPY TRIPPY
levels.creator: Wulzy
levels.description: Level made in 7 days across 7 streams by Wulzy for a Youtube series, fast paced, unbalanced, and learny. British last click.

levels.name: UFO Circles
levels.creator: Soup26
levels.description: Esoteric-styled UFO based level with a severe difficulty spike in the third quarter of the level, where the gameplay suddenly becomes very awkward and relies on dependant clicks. Not actually a circles level.

levels.name: Unnamed 7
levels.creator: Shocksidian
levels.description: Slow paced level that has some tough ship parts and a skibidi slope click at 50%. Aph is not a fan.

levels.name: Utopian Delusions
levels.creator: nahuel2998
levels.description: Core level that starts off pretty relaxed until 70% when you are thrown into the laggiest and most utterly diabolical ending ever seen. Was also briefly updated to a copy of impossible level The Last Phantasm for some reason.

levels.name: Valwec
levels.creator: shrympo and Onvil
levels.description: we care's long lost cousin. This time, the level doesn't get hard until 70%, consisting of some downright mean timings.

levels.name: Vee
levels.creator: Mazl
levels.description: Classic early 1.9 level that has a mix of some memory, tricky timing parts, and nerve wracking ships near the end.

levels.name: Viridyans Dungeon
levels.creator: Sting871 and more
levels.description: Goofy orange flow collab which randomly cuts off towards the middle part of the drop.

levels.name: Voidless
levels.creator: PenguSit and GDSlimJim
levels.description: A solid 2.0 level in the pre-drop, and then turns into a blinding purple and black mass of deco that blurs a majority of the gameplay from the drop to the ending wave.

levels.name: Volken Turbo
levels.creator: Rob Buck
levels.description: Tedious and unbalanced Rob Buck level with multiple bursts of straight fly at the drop. Despite that, the hardest part is not choking in the shockingly tricky second half.

levels.name: Water Kingdom
levels.creator: Elzeko
levels.description: Blue Forest Temple ripoff with significantly harder gameplay featuring a brutal UFO/ship double whammy, and several stupid updates added onto it. The last of which being a dedications page which starts at 58 PERCENT.

levels.name: we care
levels.creator: wonduu
levels.description: Valwec's long lost cousin. Consists of a super goofy beginning which carries the level's difficulty, but from here it drops off.

levels.name: WHIMSY
levels.creator: friendless
levels.description: Very bright 2.2 level which hilariously had a now patched bug that made the level even brighter. The hardest part is remembering to not click the orb in the ending.

levels.name: Words Words Words
levels.creator: Salaxium and EndLevel
levels.description: Very frontloaded early 2.1 level that proudly displays the rapping talents of Bo Burnham with a song that was designed to be bad. He IS a gay sea otter after all. Has some very annoying dependent timings and a tricky wave.

levels.name: Xtravagant
levels.creator: brighyama
levels.description: 2.0 level with negative balancing. Features a hard wave followed by a very easy cube section. The hardest part of the level is one single yellow orb click at 77%. This click will steal your wallet and kill your dog.

levels.name: Z ZANIE
levels.creator: DangerousROBOT
levels.description: Energetic effect-focused level with a lot of fast-paced gameplay. Gets progressively more janky and unwelcoming the further in you get.

levels.name: Zephyrs Madness
levels.creator: Zephyr
levels.description: Superbuffed and horrendous looking Stereo Madness copy, with some absurdly difficult timings and brutal ship gaps for a Hard Demon. Was originally top 7 on the HDL before it got a nuking of a lifetime.

levels.name: A747
levels.creator: Dorami
levels.description: Inexplicably solid Dorami level that plays like it has absolutely nothing to do with Dorami besides a few awkward or blind transitions. Who are you and what have done with him.

levels.name: ABLAZE
levels.creator: zowl and hexitine
levels.description: Decent effect flow level with a dual thats satisfying but subject to breaking, plus an extremely chokable ending cube. This may be raised to the elusive "Relentless Tier" with the new info.

levels.name: Accelerate
levels.creator: xVainaja
levels.description: Painfully average "skill based" 2.2 level with a frustrating knack for killing you on the very corner of a spike.

levels.name: Acid Rush III
levels.creator: Serponge and more
levels.description: The third entry in Serponge's megacollab series featuring a brutal slope spider part and an ending slope section that was absolutely massacred by 2.2.

levels.name: Action
levels.creator: Lyal
levels.description: Early 2.1 level that actually uses breakable blocks but doesn't actually do anything creative with them. Makes up for it with massive moving structures constantly in the drop.

levels.name: Actino Rise
levels.creator: Norcda Childa and more
levels.description: 2.0 megacollab featuring such famous names like Creatorpig and MisterM, the beginning chews through attempts, as well as Jbeast and Norcda's parts being massive chokepoints.

levels.name: Adrenaline Chamber
levels.creator: VecToRx GD and more
levels.description: See "Astreans" and "Stormshard". Early 2.1 megacollab carried by chokepoints and a rare hard Zober part at the end.

levels.name: Advance3
levels.creator: Loltad
levels.description: Another well received Loltad thing. Learny but very consistent, the middle section has some chokepoints, and a rather awkward section spanning the 70s.

levels.name: AfterLocked
levels.creator: Mineber and more
levels.description: So imagine the most early 2.0 level off all time, and then throw that idea away immedietly cause AfterLocked beats it. The level is a complete mess even for its time and features balancing that stems very heavily around 20-50%.

levels.name: Alien Invazion
levels.creator: spirits310
levels.description: Fever dream of an early 2.1 level with constant text everywhere and jank gameplay comprising the entire level.

levels.name: Ampere
levels.creator: oleki
levels.description: Energetic and extra learny level with an infamously severe CPS increase in the wave, where most of the difficulty lives.

levels.name: Anya II
levels.creator: Anya21
levels.description: Extremely frontloaded timing level which looks the exact same throughout except for some colour changes here and there.

levels.name: Apache
levels.creator: TheJosiahTurner and Lithifusion
levels.description: Extremely well received raw level from early 2.1 that was very ahead of its time. Despite this, it took multiple years to get rated. Gets harder as you go along and hard checks your abilities to do controlled spam.

levels.name: Aquarius
levels.creator: Zephlin
levels.description: Ocean-themed level that contains a monstrously difficult ship part amidst a sea of more average gameplay.

levels.name: Arachnid Temple
levels.creator: ViPriN and Serponge
levels.description: The first cube is not out of place in an average Extreme Demon. Afterwards it calms down to some still difficult but much more reasonable awkward and learny gameplay. The spam at the end is also prone to just not work.

levels.name: ARANEO
levels.creator: Darwin
levels.description: Very popular former Insane Demon from early 2.1. Debatably a memory level, and while known for its spider gameplay, the hardest part by far is the 2x wave in the middle that everybody despises.

levels.name: Arcanine
levels.creator: CHUZA
levels.description: Actually fucking unexplainable gameplay with a fresh take on glow design. Chokepoints galore.

levels.name: Armadyne
levels.creator: Giron and HyperFlame
levels.description: Extremely frontloaded early 2.0 level that will not hesitate to make you double take every time you die.

levels.name: Artemisia
levels.creator: Eridani and more
levels.description: Purple collab hosted by Eridani. Received a random buffdate which added an invisible block at 64% (which is gone now) and uh... the last click. That's something.

levels.name: Artillery
levels.creator: RyanAB
levels.description: Insane even by RyanAB standards, as this checks all the boxes for the early 2.0 stereotype and then some that you didn't know even existed. Most of the difficulty is concentrated in a predrop with many difficult timings.

levels.name: Azure Paralyzer
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha
levels.description: Blade of Justice themed level that people either hate for being frustrating to play or excruciatingly boring, or find enjoyable for reasons not even the lucky few can explain.

levels.name: Backlines
levels.creator: gdParallax
levels.description: Extremely faithful Frontlines remake, sadly this means it keeps the bugs that Frontlines is famous for.

levels.name: Beast Mayhem II
levels.creator: HHyper
levels.description: HHyper's first rated level which is infamously known for it's questionable hitboxes and structuring.

levels.name: BIG FLOPPA
levels.creator: OFFmind and more
levels.description: This will be what gets the Doomsday Clock to half-past 12. Janky buggy flow parts with a weirdly offsync dual.

levels.name: Blood Menace
levels.creator: Toxic GD and Codex
levels.description: 1.9 memory Hard Demon that used to be one of the easier insane demons in the game. Has more orbs inside portals at the drop than one could ever possibly want.

levels.name: BLRPL LGHTS
levels.creator: Novaach
levels.description: Blvd hgh cps dmn tht hs qt th dffclty spk n th bgnnng f th drp. Wdly cnsdrd t b frst hlf hvy nd xtrmly lrny. Sng als smtms ds fr n rsn.

levels.name: Breakneck
levels.creator: Unbipentium, Flash, and Grindex
levels.description: 1 of only 2 Hard Demons in existence where you can title your completion "BREAKNECK [Hard Demon] FLUKE FROM 97%" and it wouldn't be sarcastic.

levels.name: Brimstone
levels.creator: Findexi, Evasium622, and Allan
levels.description: Bloodbath wannabe that has some very hard timing sections, but the difficultly falls significantly after 50%.

levels.name: brisbaN
levels.creator: cordeaux and scorpsi
levels.description: High speed deep blue level that never slows down. Be careful of the crazy ball timing at 69%. Weird wave at end that doesn't work on high hz.

levels.name: burh
levels.creator: Platnuu
levels.description: Oh hell yes you KNOW I love it when the Temporal Rift accidentally merges a part of Sakupen Hell into my standard Hard Demon across spacetime. Pretty normal Platnuu level except for the bonkers wave and a couple of other obnoxious chokepoints.

levels.name: cant let fly
levels.creator: Samzzx2YT
levels.description: No level so accurately represents a Kafka Dream as much as this. While no one can agree on how hard this is, everyone can agree that this is as raw as raw gets.

levels.name: Chaotic system
levels.creator: Giron
levels.description: Skill-based early 2.0 level (shocker) that doesn't abuse moving objects (double shocker) and isn't raw (SHOCKER HAT-TRICK). Hardest parts are in the middle of the level at the drop.

levels.name: Chaoz Twilight
levels.creator: RyanAB
levels.description: Super old RyanAB level with some of the most ridiculous wave gameplay ever conceived in any Hard Demon, including a random near frame perfect gap and a mirrored wave that is in fact as difficult as the one in Crimson Clutter.

levels.name: Circus Dash II
levels.creator: MCAASJ
levels.description: Lifelike animations and smooth movements come at a cost of being super laggy. Strangely high-cps clicksync gameplay with J-block jumpscares everywhere.

levels.name: Classical
levels.creator: RayOriens
levels.description: This level is considered by a lot to be one of the worst Nine Circles levels. Expect a lot of memory in the non-wave parts and absurd mini wave spam and awkward transitions in the wave part.

levels.name: Club Chamber
levels.creator: DreamEater
levels.description: Clubstep styled entry into the Zobros 1.6 creator contest. The level itself is comprised of weird cube timings, tight ship parts, and really jank UFO sections.

levels.name: Coreosious
levels.creator: HHyper
levels.description: Objectively one of the most awesome big robot lizard bossfight levels HHyper has to deliver. Unfortunately no HHyper level is perfect... or well optimized... so...

levels.name: Crackdown
levels.creator: Iid4sh3riI and TheRealDarnoc
levels.description: In classic early 2.0 fashion features a difficulty spectrum of 9 stars to Insane Demon, with all of the difficulty being concentrated in the second half.

levels.name: Crimson Flare
levels.creator: Toxic GD and more
levels.description: 1.9 megacollab consisting of a bunch of well-known creators in their time. Is much harder when playing from 0 due to the super hard dual part at 80%.

levels.name: Crispy Reaction
levels.creator: CrisPy Dash
levels.description: Essentially just a 2.0 memory level with 2 super long semi-visible block mazes. The last maze especially takes eons to learn.

levels.name: Cubic Force
levels.creator: Edooox
levels.description: Highly reminiscent of Distorzona, especially with that fast ship segment, except it has duals. As you can expect, it's a remake of Hexagon Force. It's pretty well made too. <-- Said the troll

levels.name: Cyber Dream
levels.creator: guppy28 and JamAttack
levels.description: XL JamAttack styled level that turns up the heat in the duals and in the ending, where it gets very fast and stressful.

levels.name: Danaes Button
levels.creator: Ares, TrueQuasar, and Sebbax
levels.description: How on earth was this mid 2.1...? This level features a lot of invisible memory nonsense and jank parts all around.

levels.name: Danksgiving
levels.creator: Koopazu and more
levels.description: Oh give thanks to The Magical Floating Turkey Leg That Glares At You Menacingly, for he is dank, for his turkey jpeg, endures forever. Now read that backwards (Watch out for Loltad's part and the end they are pretty weird).

levels.name: Dark Tides
levels.creator: rKath and more
levels.description: A glow-flow that starts off relatively chill, but randomly has a violent spike in difficulty at 74% and doesn't drop at all. Also has a bugged spider at 83%.

levels.name: DEAD BEAT
levels.creator: swwft
levels.description: #GETTHEMBUGS. Everyone has their own way of doing the first UFO transition. Every part has its own way of functioning... Surprisingly tight last wave. Notoriously hated for these reasons and more.

levels.name: Despair
levels.creator: ViPriN
levels.description: Extremely frontloaded with some absolutely diabolical chokepoints and bad transitions strewn throughout the level.

levels.name: Detonate
levels.creator: Dan1el256
levels.description: 1.9 GDPS level with very cool explosion-themed decoration, and a shockingly hard dual wave in the middle. Once contained a penis, unfortunately got nerfed.

levels.name: Dfx
levels.creator: Emily419
levels.description: Unique cube-only level using a relaxing song and atmosphere while featuring a variety of slow and fast paced learny and memory gameplay. The last 10% is very chokeable

levels.name: Diffuse
levels.creator: Hinds, Loogiah, and Vlacc
levels.description: I call this color palette Purple Lemonade. Popular Hinds level with an electrifying song and random impossible timing at 60%. This has an epic rating despite having a faithful 1.9/2.0 theme. Very polarizing difficulty

levels.name: Dualviper
levels.creator: Mulpan, Koreaqwer, and Xnail
levels.description: Super unbalanced level that loses all signs of any difficulty after 58%. Is entirely 2.0 gameplay and decoration save for 1 (one) black orb right at the end for some reason.

levels.name: E V A C U A T I O N
levels.creator: Nosef
levels.description: Viciously early 2.1 level that violently picks up the difficulty at the robot dual, which has a quirky jump that is ~2 frames on most common refresh rates because life isn't fair. This encourages you to play on 60, but oh jeez the level is ship and wave carried.

levels.name: Efetis Belis
levels.creator: Pennutoh
levels.description: Antiquated effect level with a lot of silly music sync and a noticeable difficulty spike in the buildup.

levels.name: El Eyon
levels.creator: KazVA
levels.description: Blindingly bright slow timing level. Not much else to say.

levels.name: Elemental Melons
levels.creator: 123Ev4n
levels.description: Really odd 2.0 core level that seems to really get off on making you do very awkward robot parts. Besides those, the level is a bit of a cakewalk, with the occasional surprise hard timing mixed in.

levels.name: Elemental Stones
levels.creator: Mazl and gluewis
levels.description: Early 2.0 collab that has a ton of invisible speed portals during the drop. Also has a diabolical wave gap at 43%.

levels.name: Elevatia
levels.creator: AngryBoy0644 and more
levels.description: Extremely generic glow collab that never got the playtesting it needed and it clearly shows when playing.

levels.name: Elucidator
levels.creator: Gusearth
levels.description: Fast paced and energetic dual-focused level that requires an encyclopedic knowledge of frame alignment and a heavy dose of the scientific method to get consistent at. If you can get past that, it's actually rather enjoyable.

levels.name: Epoch
levels.creator: Fluore
levels.description: Funny 2.0 lump thats contains mostly slope based gameplay and some absurd wonky waves. It just isn't very good and the gameplay feels like shit to play, with a ton of poorly thought out object placements.

levels.name: Eternal Flame
levels.creator: James
levels.description: Fairly uninteresting ship based level where the hardest part at 40% is also the laggiest.

levels.name: Euphoria
levels.creator: Dams778 and more
levels.description: Goofy flow collab which was meant to be called "Justice". Duals later on in the level were completely massacred by 2.2 so have fun with that.

levels.name: Evasion
levels.creator: Spectex
levels.description: Early 2.1 skillbased level with some awkward ship movements. Finding all coins with no video is close to impossible.

levels.name: Evermore
levels.creator: SirHadoken and more
levels.description: Geometry Dash equivalent of squishing your nuts when you cross your legs.

levels.name: Everything
levels.creator: BlazeRol
levels.description: Generic looking level with hard gameplay all around, peaking at the completely insane dual at the drop. False advertising, does not in fact include everything.

levels.name: Execute Phase 001
levels.creator: KazVA
levels.description: Visually stunning, but has questionable balancing, being almost entirely carried by the extremely difficult beginning and wave towards the end.

levels.name: EXHAUST
levels.creator: surveyor23
levels.description: Very well received, atmospheric level with learny gameplay that ramps up in difficulty as it goes, peaking in an absolutely ridiculous ship part right at the end. Also MINECRAFT SONG WOOOOO!!!

levels.name: Final Conflux
levels.creator: DriftGMD
levels.description: High octane, all around level with a major case of the sandwich balancing. This name sounds fake.

levels.name: Flow
levels.creator: GeonoxGD and more
levels.description: An attempt to remake "Flap" and "Trip" with the ship gamemode. Somehow managed to do everything wrong with an unclear difficulty ranging from 2 star to Extreme Demon. The Dorami Verification is the cherry on top.

levels.name: Flow
levels.creator: SirHadoken
levels.description: The long awaited follow up to Ebb that actually delivers. Is carried pretty heavily by some tough duals and a chokable last wave.

levels.name: Forrest Gamp
levels.creator: Th04
levels.description: Green, vaguely flow styled level featuring fast paced gameplay in a variety of gamemodes. Became the inspiration for Unbipentiums entire catalogue at some point.

levels.name: Fortitude
levels.creator: MythicalTG and more
levels.description: Older flow level with several tricky wave sections and an easy to choke ending.

levels.name: found
levels.creator: Rowanm
levels.description: Former Insane Demon. Experimental, short, and skill based gameplay, has a very claustrophobic feel to it. Rowanm glues a green orb to your ship at some point.

levels.name: Frostbound
levels.creator: Yakobnugget and more
levels.description: First level of Yakob's Christmas megacollabs, which is quite long and a bit janky considering its age (tf is Surv's part you are supposed to make a Christmas level instead of creepy Insane Demon).

levels.name: Fusion
levels.creator: Manix648
levels.description: One of Manix's better known works. Contains two very tricky duals and a standard Manix Bossfight (Shooting Big Laser Registered Trademark). The rest of the level is very standard for a 2.0 Manix level.

levels.name: HASH
levels.creator: Flash
levels.description: Well recived level that actually has balanced gameplay and a very fun drop. Rhymes with literally everything.

levels.name: HazardSector X
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha
levels.description: 3rd level in ZenthicAlpha's long running HazardSector series. The trick in this one is a diabolical first click that will very quickly eat attempts.

levels.name: Hibernal
levels.creator: Cassidyy
levels.description: Winter-themed level with consistently high CPS and a monstrous first 40%. After that it tapers off a bit.

levels.name: Hydration
levels.creator: Exylem and more
levels.description: Janky flow level with a brutal frame perfect click at 50%, as well as several other buggy chokepoints in the first half. Cleans up its act significantly in the second half.

levels.name: I Cant Fix You
levels.creator: IronIngot
levels.description: Early 2.1 level with no coherent theming and an absolutely impossible last 20%. Was randomly updated which added some 2.2 features and and a sus mode.

levels.name: i love lasagna
levels.creator: koko43
levels.description: garfield  you fat! cat why are you so big and fat! Cartoonish art level with incomprehensible hitboxes. Holds record for shortest reign for an HDL top 1

levels.name: Immortal Ichor
levels.creator: fin and more
levels.description: Incredibly raw old level that has wack transitions, difficult ship sections, and a goofy "bossfight" at the beginning of the drop. That demon face at the end rules btw.

levels.name: Impetus
levels.creator: ViPriN and more
levels.description: 2.0 megacollab featuring very middle heavy balancing with the gauntlet of Viprin, Kips and Zenthic's parts all back to back. Bingus bongus bass or whatever the song says at the drop.

levels.name: In Limbo
levels.creator: Intensa
levels.description: Standard 1.9 GDPS level that most people can't form an opinion on. Also seems to be heavily inspired by Chaotic Hell, but no one has ever confirmed this.

levels.name: Infernity
levels.creator: Jo2000
levels.description: Suprisingly good 2.0 Nine Circles level with a nasty first ship and some awkward wave bits.

levels.name: Jajagarasu
levels.creator: PlebKIngdom
levels.description: A supernerfed version of Yatagarasu with a very early 2.1 style and random memes. Most of your deaths will be the first 2%.

levels.name: Jeopardous
levels.creator: TD Epic
levels.description: Disturbingly brown level that is carried by the first quarter, mainly in the form of 2 nasty ship chokepoints. The creator of this had an actual feud with the creator of Emperors due to how similar the levels were.

levels.name: K A N G
levels.creator: kang131
levels.description: Weird early 2.1 bossfight memory level where the boss is the level creator. Will not be allowed to retire from the HDL.

levels.name: keygen
levels.creator: sycor and Rouzs
levels.description: Really buggy and chokepoint based flow level with admittedly pretty good glow deco. Verified by LordVadercraft except he actually made a pretty functional copy of the level. Too bad the creators uploaded the OG, making this technically hack verified.

levels.name: Kilpac
levels.creator: Shulkern
levels.description: This was Insane Demon for quite a while until it was nerfed and demoted, but it is debatable if the nerfs were harsh enough to warrant this. Suffers from a severe case of unbalanced.

levels.name: Kirbys Meltdown
levels.creator: Df0rDie and more
levels.description: Glow collab with actual solid but unbalanced gameplay. Was intended to be a beginner Insane Demon but was a bit too easy. Includes famous Kirby source material such as the Super Star from Mario and not Kirby literally ever.

levels.name: Late
levels.creator: KiwiPenguin
levels.description: Relaxed timing level that the author of this description is really having a hard time remembering, which means you probably are too.

levels.name: Leffe LeiffSkY
levels.creator: LeifY
levels.description: Colorful timing based level with an awkward straightfly at 23% and a spider part with two broken slopes, features the worlds goofiest Cant Let Go remix for a song.

levels.name: life
levels.creator: Salaxium
levels.description: XXL level built in the 1.9 GDPS style before it even existed back in 2017 but was rebalanced in and bugfixed in 2021. Really takes its time getting to the drop.

levels.name: Magnolia
levels.creator: tolstyh and EndLevel
levels.description: Welcome to HELLLFIRE HELLLFIRE I mean.. Magnolia! Just a really hard wave-and-ship-based Hard Demon that just so happens to have a really stupid wave at 66%.

levels.name: Majesty
levels.creator: FunnyGame
levels.description: Basically a low-demote carried by 2 high-insane demon waves, one of which being right at the end of the level. Expect to have plenty of deaths past 74%.

levels.name: Make it 5top
levels.creator: xSlendy
levels.description: A very flashy and flowy level focused generally on high CPS. Has a bunch of very fast wave spams and awkwardly structured ships.

levels.name: Mechanical Realm
levels.creator: Maxie25
levels.description: Another one of those XL Modern Tech Bossfight levels. Most of the difficulty comes from 20-50%, but the second half has an extremely chokeable dual. The first 20 both tests your patience and ears.

levels.name: Medley
levels.creator: Igno, Alkali, and Lumpy
levels.description: Downright bizarre remake of Bionic Button by TheRealDarnoc that was made for the Crystal Gauntlet depsite not containing any crystals. Uses very mindbending gameplay choices and a very difficult ending.

levels.name: Meeting With Diana
levels.creator: YellowAnimator
levels.skillset: Timings, Nerve Control, Don't fall asleep
levels.description: Slow timing level that many people find very boring and frustrating to play. Blacklisted from Awful Pack because it contains lesbians.

levels.name: Milkshake Draft
levels.creator: Evasium622 and andro3d
levels.description: Weird creation that has an insane difficulty spike in the middle sections culminating in an extremely tight wave click into a bad transition. Usually agreed to be around the same difficulty as its Insane Demon counterpart.

levels.name: Milky Caverns
levels.creator: CarterN2000
levels.description: Comically unbalanced 2.0 level and an entry to LazerBlitz and ViPriN creator contests. Is fairly inoffensive up until the ridiculously hard memory cube in the last 20%. Home of the CrunchWrap Supreme.

levels.name: Mythical descent
levels.creator: NASHII
levels.description: More NASHII bullshit, this time carried by a very silly and finnicky robot dual, some Firework dash orbs, and just other miscellaneous obnoxious timings.

levels.name: Nadji
levels.creator: ZephiroX
levels.description: Reminiscent of Hinds' style, featuring a bunch of tricky ships with various timing sections.

levels.name: Nerves
levels.creator: Alex1304
levels.description: Early 2.1 level that is primarily built around collecting keys as gimmick. If your coin health isn't 7 or above dont even talk to me.

levels.name: Neurotoxin
levels.creator: Britzlar and more
levels.description: Poorly received and vaguely toxic themed XL megacollab with some awful difficulty spikes. The original draft of this level plagiarized multiple parts from other creators.

levels.name: New Beginning II
levels.creator: Sebasthian60
levels.description: Standard 2.2 timing level which is chill for the first 40%, and then the camera controls and shaders start to get in the way a bit. Contains some hilariously misplaced click indicators as well.

levels.name: NightRise Night of Demon
levels.creator: KeiAs and Rhythm1C
levels.description: 1.9 Clubstep buff with a bunch of memory, tight timings, and wack wave parts. Was reuploaded in 2.0 for some reason.

levels.name: Njorun
levels.creator: gradientxd
levels.description: Slightly janky flow level that gets harder as it goes on and has a memory part thrown into the buildup for some reason.

levels.name: NOIR
levels.creator: Falkuma
levels.description: Very late 2.1 level that was updated with 2.2 camera triggers to get its signiture silent film look. Progress bar be like: 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥♿

levels.name: Omnir Release
levels.creator: Cirtrax and more
levels.description: Pretty poorly constructed early 2.1 megacollab that is notable for its song being a Top 10 Beats to Shake That Booty To.

levels.name: Osanda Verdict
levels.creator: v1tchrose and more
levels.skillset: Flow, HOW DO YOU LIKE THAT OBAMA
levels.description: Uninteresting red flow level with a random difficulty spike at the ending.

levels.name: PANICAL
levels.creator: CyberBT
levels.description: Absurd glow flow that tests your patience at every opportunity, especially at the long string of difficult ships at the drop and the part after containing several out-of-nowhere timings.

levels.name: Pinball Panic
levels.creator: TeamHFC and more
levels.description: Relatively long megacollab with a super stressful ending. Surprisingly super well received, actually.

levels.name: Pressure Chamber
levels.creator: Espii
levels.description: Sakupen Hell-inspired level with a handful of fake and moving object memory, a scary cube dual, and some devious wave chokepoints.

levels.name: Prismatic Domain
levels.creator: edenharley
levels.description: A journey through a fantasy world that's very rainbow. At times the gameplay can be hard to see. May or may not contain the hallow from Terraria.

levels.name: Proxima
levels.creator: ThatKai
levels.description: Pretty standard level with a janky pre-drop, shake-abusing drop, and Insane Duals the last 30%. Seriously don't play this with shake on.

levels.name: Pulsar
levels.creator: nestorboy and more
levels.description: Primordial 2.1 flow gameplay that's honestly surprisingly satisfying. Crazy hard ending due to unsatisfying portal placements.

levels.name: Quantum Variations
levels.creator: Darwin and GDSpeed
levels.description: Futuristic Darwin level that has a ton of crazy effects and backgrounds in an Echonox like style. GDSpeed made the gameplay which is why the waves are very slippery.

levels.name: Radiant Expanse
levels.creator: budgielover1234
levels.description: Awkward an unbalanced JamAttack CC5 entry with a dual that works somewhere between the can't and the won't, as well as some other weird chokepoints scattered throughout.

levels.name: rattlesnake
levels.creator: Konsi
levels.description: Utterly deranged flow level that quite literally works when it wants to that also comes with way too many random chokepoints. Don't lose your sanity playing this, a lot of people sure as hell did.

levels.name: reminiscence
levels.creator: Dzeser
levels.description: See "Breakneck" but now it's vaguely reminiscent (haha) of Theory of Everything 2 and the ending is a frame perfect jump instead of a weird spam.

levels.name: rgbwheregisgold
levels.creator: justabook
levels.description: A low hard demon for most of it, but 27-55% is randomly IDL difficulty fsr. Incredibly learny and doesn't get particularly consistent.

levels.name: Ribbit
levels.creator: Th04 and Codex
levels.description: 2.0 collab with atrocious transitions and non-functional gameplay. Also has maybe the most random and unfitting name ever (the song name is "Rip It" literally just name it that).

levels.name: RippLeZ
levels.creator: EndLevel and Failure444
levels.description: Uses a NONG but somehow both the replacment and NONG don't sync at all with the level. Also has a tough ship at 35%.

levels.name: Serpent
levels.creator: gergedan
levels.description: One of the only UFO-carried levels. Classic Lazerblitz design with a fake swingcopter part at the end.

levels.name: Shadow temple
levels.creator: N4xoL
levels.description: Uncharacteristically atmospheric 2.0 level with a very tough memory ball with several awkward timings. The difficulty takes a dive afterwards.

levels.name: sharp
levels.creator: kaval
levels.description: Known as the "player color" Nine Circles level. This level is most notable for its wave spam, awkward wave parts, and the 67% gap. Also the ending can only be described as evil.

levels.name: Sharp Minor
levels.creator: Giron and ASonicMen
levels.description: Super well known Nine Circles level that stayed as an insane demon for years upon years. Has a surprisingly tricky first UFO along with a super long and chokepoint-heavy wave to test the player's consistency.

levels.name: Shrill Manor
levels.creator: St1ngGD and more
levels.description: Flow-adjacent remake of Shrill Hallway with a lot of obscuring visuals and an extraordinarily hard to learn spider part.

levels.name: SIDEWAYS 8
levels.creator: Cirtrax and more
levels.description: Fast paced level almost entirely composed of black and white. The actual gameplay isn't too hard but the decoration tries as hard as possible to prevent you from seeing it.

levels.name: Skywanderers
levels.creator: TheBlackHell
levels.description: A Peaceful remake of Skywanderers.

levels.name: Snap
levels.creator: Darite
levels.description: Predrop carried with some unusual timings. Then you just spam while your computer flashbangs you for like a minute straight. This level literally made me (Aph) have a small scale seizure so be cautious (I'm ok dw).

levels.name: Somniare
levels.creator: oleki and kreno
levels.description: Fastest Hard Demon everrrr!!!! Flashy and rainbow designs!!!! Help me dear god!!!

levels.name: Sonic Chamber
levels.creator: GMDElite and more
levels.description: Fairly normal 1.9 megacollab up until 60% where god punishes you for your sins and throws you into an Extreme Demon ship part. Ball transition at 93 is also particularly awful.

levels.name: Space DementiA
levels.creator: Darwin
levels.description: Do you know who else has DementiA? Do you know who else has DementiA? Do you know who else has DementiA? Do you know who else has DementiA? Do you know who else has DementiA?

levels.name: Spectra
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha and more
levels.description: Oddly forgettable 2.0 collab that gets a lot harder in the last 20%.

levels.name: SPITZER
levels.creator: Brimbis
levels.description: Pretty standard 2.2 level that just magically ceases to work when going from 0.

levels.name: Splendid Mold
levels.creator: KuraiYonaka
levels.description: The easier of the 2 Molds where the predrop is much easier than the rest of the level. The last 3 robot clicks are tough and very chokeable.

levels.name: Steel Gear
levels.creator: Krmal and more
levels.description: Old S1lence level finished by KrmaL and a handful of other creators, mostly contains inoffensive gameplay except for Aquatius' part at the end, which is very wonky with an inconsistent dual and hard waves.

levels.name: Sulfuric Acid
levels.creator: mergan
levels.description: Janky level with a lot of very abrasive and unpolished decorum and gameplay, particularly in a bossfight that is dramatically harder than the rest of the level.

levels.name: Superior Sequence
levels.creator: Pennutoh
levels.description: A 2.0 level inspired by Sequence (by WOOGI1411) that fluctuates between very low and very high CPS gameplay. It features some tricky duals, as well as a couple of bugs.

levels.name: Surgeragon
levels.creator: HHyper
levels.description: Like most HHyper levels, it's quite laggy. It is a five minute long level that contains three bossfights that are almost pure memorization. The non-bossfight sections are also quite janky too.

levels.name: Switchblade
levels.creator: RyanAB
levels.description: A level featuring the classic RyanAB-isms: Meaning lots of random chokepoints throughout the level. The level also features a lot of appearing gameplay too, including a frame perfect ball click at 80% that is surprisingly tame.

levels.name: Terror Factory
levels.creator: Korita
levels.description: COME OUT!!! The decoration is exactly what you'd excpect from a very early 2.1 level. Most of the difficulty comes from the transitions into the ships and not the actual ships themselves.

levels.name: The Furious
levels.creator: Knobbelboy
levels.description: Very popular knobbelboy level that was often considered the easiest Insane Demon back when it was rated so. Mainly only difficult in the beginning and ending, where some hints of jank roam free.

levels.name: The Tempest
levels.creator: BIANOX
levels.description: This dual is completely out of control please someone nerf it.

levels.name: The Ultimate Core
levels.creator: RadiationV2
levels.description: Old 1.9 semi-flow project revived later that is made to be as scary looking as possible. If a surface can have a spike on it, theres several. Syncs hilariously well with Explore The Core.

levels.name: The Voidlands
levels.creator: dolphe
levels.description: One of dolphe's many bossfight levels. Expect to have to do a lot of memorization to get this level down. Thankfully the ending is not as difficult.

levels.name: Theory of IntercepT
levels.creator: Dorami
levels.description: Slightly less stupid than its FirePower counterpart. Features many blind clicks and a really difficult to learn ending ball maze. Went through a buffdate in 2021 like many other Dorami levels.

levels.name: Thing Five
levels.creator: Yoshme
levels.description: Shockingly, this 1.9 level is NOT an XL, but it feels WAY longer. The last quarter has some really nasty moments, such as an incredibly strange dual and a random straightfly at 88% cos why not.

levels.name: Three blocks wide
levels.creator: Dyspex
levels.description: Long and atmospheric level where the entire level takes place in an area only three blocks tall. The first 70% is 𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙚𝙧𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙮 not a demon before being deployed into an extremely nerve-wracking, extremely Extreme Demon ship part.

levels.name: Time Decay
levels.creator: Inoculist
levels.description: Inoculist, were you hacked? This is normal until like a quarter of the way through the drop, where the level vanishes into thin air. It's like you submitted a draft instead of a finished level, as is clear by the weird hitboxes everywhere.

levels.name: Torment
levels.creator: Vermillion
levels.description: Vermillion's hardest solo level that lets you experience what being blind feels like. Has a creative ball at the ending but is overshadowed by the frustrating ship before.

levels.name: Tormenta
levels.creator: SawiArtz and more
levels.description: Layout glow-flow megacollab. The CPS at the drop is surprisingly low despite how the level looks.

levels.name: Total Oblivion
levels.creator: Nox
levels.description: Former Insane Demon with some absolutely devious chokepoints such as the 27% blind click and 65% ball timing. Shamelessley rips Cataclysm a new asshole.

levels.name: Toxic Demise
levels.creator: lNitroxin
levels.description: Claustrophobic memory level that uses a buttload of teleportals and mirror portals to make for some difficult but fair transitions.

levels.name: Tremble
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha, dhk2725, and WOOGI1411
levels.description: Tremble in fear as the blocks start booty-shakin at the end! Twerkulation Nation!

levels.name: Turbo
levels.creator: LazerBlitz
levels.description: Former insane demon, and as expected from LazerBlitz, has a lot of learny duals, with some nasty transitions as well.

levels.name: Ultra Circles
levels.creator: iIiRulasiIi
levels.description: The hardest of the "ultra" styled NC levels, and by far the worst. Looks abysmal and plays even worse, with brutal spam sections, tight corridors, and annoying visual gimmicks.

levels.name: Universal Perception
levels.creator: AQTeam
levels.description: Try not to fall asleep! Beginning is around 10 spc (seconds per click). As the song ramps up, the level also ramps up in speed, bugs, and strange timings. Wait this is just opposite Droppy

levels.name: Unlocked
levels.creator: LaZye and Bloodshot
levels.description: Wacky Deadlocked inspired collab between two priests of the Church of Brain Hurt. The gameplay and decoration is riddled with questions and no one has found any answers yet.

levels.name: ValkyriE
levels.creator: ValkyrieMaster
levels.description: Silly level with a 2.2 bugged timing at 21%, along with some of the hardest duals ever baked up and caked up in a Hard Demon.

levels.name: Viridica
levels.creator: TheLasaga and more
levels.description: Somewhat boring 1.9 GDPS level that has a really good song. Technically it's a NONG but the original is more synced up and sounds exactly the same so who cares.

levels.name: WARZONE
levels.creator: Kentik and more
levels.description: Average 2.1 all around megacollab where none of the parts really stick out from each other. Has that 10/10 intense Clock Bossfight* at 66%.                                                                        Go play Clock Bossfight by Aph 104723166

levels.name: watch the throne
levels.creator: RatQuesadilla
levels.description: Kanye demon which is actually a Frank Ocean demon that has a tough robot section carrying most of the difficulty. Dark yet regal atmospheric theming.

levels.name: wave and also ufo
levels.creator: nplsm
levels.skillset: if you need to look here at all you are a lost cause
levels.description: "Slightly More Entertaining than Doing Nothing! You WILL stare vacantly at this level! PADS! ORBS! BLOCKS! SPIKES! This level HAS them!" -Infra, 2025

levels.name: WeIrDmAgGeDoN
levels.creator: iIHogartIi
levels.description: Completely unrelated to the Gravity Falls finale of the same name, but is somehow considered the third level in the Death Moon trilogy. Lots of red, pseudo-memory, and a scary dual at the end.

levels.name: Wonder Cosm
levels.creator: Rob Buck
levels.description: Purple level with an extremely funky UFO part in the first quarter.

levels.name: xes
levels.creator: wintertia
levels.description: Beware! Cuidado! Average 2.1 vaguely flow glow level with a big ending difficulty spike and a funky pre-drop ship, though the drop can be pretty fun. Say the level name backwards to instantly die.

levels.name: ABLAZE
levels.creator: zowl and hexitine
levels.description: Decent effect flow level with a dual thats satisfying but subject to breaking, plus an extremely chokable ending cube. We raised this because of the new info.

levels.name: Crux
levels.creator: Mercury6779
levels.description: Super vicious level with some downright cruel timings and some really funky dual blips that take a lil bit to get used to. Shoutout to Hexagon for demoting this for 2 hours.

levels.name: Demon Party
levels.creator: VegasKoneko
levels.description: Extremely epic Demon of Demons where you enter a houseparty featuring all the difficulties of Demon.

levels.name: Hdl level mix
levels.creator: JoacoPe25
levels.description: Cheeky lil mix of notorious chokepoints in levels on the Hard Demon list.

levels.name: Not Afraid
levels.creator: WindyOMG
levels.description: Fascinating early 1.9 level that needed to be uploaded with a secret way. Because of this there are a lot of abrupt and silly chokepoints.

levels.name: Poltergeist
levels.creator: AndromedaGMD
levels.description: The fact this even went down ever is stupid like what.

levels.name: Tr1ppy
levels.creator: ImNotNuub
levels.description: This was also a questionable demote indeed.

levels.name: Wither
levels.creator: JaoDay
levels.description: Fast paced shake level with lots of shaking that supposedly also may have some difficult ships and timings in the beginning.

levels.name: Before Machinery
levels.creator: Vizitek
levels.description: Incredibly long level that has a lot of similarities to Commatose by rply. The balancing is notoriously poor though, with 25-43 and 63-86 carrying the level's difficulty up by a lot, and mainly in the ship and robot parts.

levels.name: Castle Dedede
levels.creator: Pl4sma
levels.description: Like the self-titled king this is based on, Castle Dedede has had one of the biggest underdog arcs ever. Riddled with chokepoints and jank in every part to ensure that you will find every part hard for different reasons.

levels.name: Chasing Light
levels.creator: stardust1971
levels.description: Looks like a standard 1.9 stage, but a closer look reveal that none of this shit works lmao. Straight up, why is this ship dual built like so?

levels.name: Distorzona
levels.creator: Edooox
levels.description: Demon grinders FEAST on this level due to being completely timing based. Very well recived but can be a nightmare if you even have the slightest bit of timing deficiency or photosensistivity.

levels.name: Rainfall III
levels.creator: Windrayen and rreimu
levels.description: The third level in the Rainfall series which is a big jump up in difficulty from the last. It features some awkward gameplay with weird timings, a downhill part comprised entirely of blind timings and an insanely difficult wave at 54%.

levels.name: Scarlet Pulse
levels.creator: gecko0, SirHadoken, and Flash
levels.description: An exceptional Hard Demon with vivid red hues that is a remake of the classic 1.9 level "Scarlet Surge". Has a very consistent beginning but an easy to choke 2nd half due to requiring tight, slow ship and robot control near the end.

levels.name: 3cu
levels.creator: truongwf and more
levels.description: Multicolored but overall dark memory level with some interesting timing gimmicks and chaotic structuring.

levels.name: 3X 148e
levels.creator: YoWStick
levels.description: Unique old-styled level breaking the basic rules of creating, meaning it also has very putrid balancing.

levels.name: 4EPTOBO COJIHlLE
levels.creator: 47XPOMOCOMA
levels.description: Atmospheric level with some slightly irritating timings in seemingly random spots.

levels.name: 5000kelvin
levels.creator: Mmath
levels.description: The name is essentially a pun to it being themed around "cool colours", since they're over 5000kelvin.

levels.name: A Pretty Easy Demon
levels.creator: TruongWF
levels.description: An Easy Demon That Is Only Hard Demon Because The Creator Said To Everyone To Vote Extreme Demon™️

levels.name: Acousticophobia
levels.creator: TheRealSquizz
levels.description: 2.0 level that has super first half heavy balancing and lots of jank for you to encounter.

levels.name: Actiblast
levels.creator: RLDKOLDACCOUNT
levels.description: Who up dominating they triangles? Cool purple effect with some slightly goofy albeit fun clicksync gameplay. The song was made by Rooldook himself specifically for the level, which is usually a good sign.

levels.name: Ahririn
levels.creator: Ahririn
levels.description: Art level named after the creator, has a weird wave spam part at 50 and some odd difficulty spike timings at the end. Notable for being one of the easiest Hard Demons.

levels.name: Artificial Powder
levels.creator: DRisscuN8
levels.description: A normal Easy Demon that is suddenly carried by an extremely awkward and difficult robot near the end, plus some tight quads halfway in.

levels.name: Astral Journey
levels.creator: DuGouda
levels.description: 2.0 level that showcases some cool effects for the time, with gameplay that tests a bit of every skillset. Took 8 years to get rated.

levels.name: Astrum
levels.creator: ivyteal
levels.description: Purple fast paced flow level with some difficult timings and a Spider part at 50 that takes a while to get used to.

levels.name: Azure Sky
levels.creator: pg1004
levels.description: Old 2.0 pg1004 level with gameplay that gets odder (and slightly more learny) the further you go.

levels.name: B U R N
levels.creator: JustJrockGMD
levels.description: 2.2 Art/glow factory themed solo level with all around learny gameplay. The first drop part is the hardest to learn. Features a skippable cutsene at the start.

levels.name: Believe
levels.creator: CarPig25k
levels.description: Extremely synced level in the 2.0 style.

levels.name: bloom
levels.creator: AppleCr
levels.description: A flashy flow "Hard" Demon that needs a lot of learning to start going from 0. Has a few blind orbs as well.

levels.name: Borderline
levels.creator: Carminius
levels.description: Bordeline: Psychosis reboot with Carminius' own touch. Beware of the new 2.2 upside down physics!

levels.name: Circus Maniacus
levels.creator: EpicLucas
levels.description: A slow circus themed level with some really difficult robots and an insane dual at the end to top things off. Just know there are ZERO clowns in this level.

levels.name: Clubstep EX
levels.creator: ZenthicAlpha
levels.description: Clubstep copy and paste with buffed ships and UFOs, that's all.

levels.name: Conventional w1sdom
levels.creator: LEALHALZITX
levels.description: Recent modern level that uses the new 2.2 features to make some very interesting memory gameplay.

levels.name: Crisis Complex
levels.creator: Lemons
levels.description: A rather easy Hard Demon by Lemons that builds up to quick duals and some chokepoints.

levels.name: Cycles V Hard
levels.creator: DenDennisCool
levels.description: Fossil memory level that isnt very hard once you learn it. Notable for being one of the easiest Hard Demons and the creator having the best username of all time.

levels.name: Deaths Grasp
levels.creator: VagrantXXI
levels.description: Hell level that got rated in 2024 but was made in 2017. Contains an insane dual at 45 and has a few weird/buggy orbs as the last clicks.

levels.name: deconstruction
levels.creator: SirWafel
levels.description: Geometry Dash Becoming Uncanny (super gritty level that gets more chaotic as it goes, ending up with a 39 second auto sequence).

levels.name: Didi
levels.creator: Ivanpercie and more
levels.description: Well received "glow" "flow" that uses a ton of unique design choices for both gameplay and decoration.

levels.name: DRY BONES
levels.creator: whlt and more
levels.description: Did you know Spongebob's favorite color is beige? It's also this level's favorite color, with a runner up of black. Mildly psychadelic with a pinch of random memory sections.

levels.name: Dry Fake
levels.creator: GMDcmys1022
levels.description: An extremely strange 1.8 remake of Dry Out that adds very odd “trolls” to the level. The core gameplay doesnt even resemble Dry Out in the slightest.

levels.name: Dumal
levels.creator: MIRugene
levels.description: Very laid-back 2-player level with the intention of doing the rhythm for the level solo.

levels.name: EQUIS
levels.creator: EVILF and SmoothCris
levels.description: Super Duper colorful and full of energy 2.2 level thats very learny in the first half. It chills out a lot on the second half, with a cool city part where you watch the level on a big screen.

levels.name: EXIT THIS NIGHT
levels.creator: coldpot
levels.description: "Hard" Demon with lots of high CPS orb gameplay and a bit of spam at parts.

levels.name: Extreme Park
levels.creator: Rabbitical
levels.description: One of the first 5 demons and the first Hard Demon; if you beat this you can say you've beaten a former Top 1! Teehee

levels.name: Fire Temple
levels.creator: Michigun
levels.description: One of the easier temple levels in the series, containing a really bizarre UFO section in the middle.

levels.name: Forgotten Tea
levels.creator: MidNight2
levels.description: Old and unremarkable demon from the tar pits. Has a decently difficult beginning and mellows out afterwards.

levels.name: Glacier 15
levels.creator: dolphe and more
levels.description: Another Dolphe bossfight level. The gimmick of this level is random events. Watch out for the "random event indicators" and react accordingly. Also, be careful out there, you wouldn't want to freeze to death...

levels.name: gringus
levels.creator: wwintop
levels.description: Very well-received Medium Demon that tastefully uses 2.2 features to create a chill atmosphere. Was also the 8000th demon rate.

levels.name: Hallucinogenic
levels.creator: MaxK
levels.description: A rainbow 2.0 memory demon with a lot of clicks that are way harder than they should be due to the nature of the level, like the predrop which has a lot of slightly late timings which makes the part extremely sketchy to do. DRUGS!!!

levels.name: howjlesmkidod
levels.creator: Sdubo
levels.description: (Fondly tapes an orb on you <3)  Vibrant gimmick level with black orb and dash orb shenanigans. Double click every orb between 22% and 51% as the orb gimmick breaks in 2.2.

levels.name: Hypernova
levels.creator: The Bouncy
